16.35: Wenda mbǝta fa sak michikǝn thlǝnkǝndǝ hansǝsalchǝ ndatwa: "Kǝ kalndǝ nofchihiyu!"
16.36: Lǝpu pursunatǝkǝnhar ndangna Bulus wa: "Ndak fa sak michikǝnwa, kǝ kalfichǝ kunihi nakǝnya, chamakis pǝɗam ngwalngwal."
16.37: Ngǝrkǝ Bulussǝwa: "Tǝpangnda kani a ɓaniti nofchǝ talyar, sahhawundǝ mikaniwa, a nakǝn kanang Romawecha, paɗ pǝkkǝndǝkani pursuna. Nakǝnnya yahkǝndǝ kalǝkanihi ɓuɓweta? Auwa! Kǝ ɓanda harandǝ kanikish tǝ i'ndengnanda."
16.38: Kǝ ɗǝt hansǝsalchiyu mbu i'niyu, nak fa samichikǝnna lechita, ɓaknda sǝndǝwa Bulus tǝ Sila Romawecha.
16.39: Ɓaknda tǝrandakandǝhi. Kanda harandǝ kandakish, tǝpaɗ hwanangndǝkanda kǝmalndǝ hǝmǝtkǝnhi.
16.40: Ɗiffitǝ cheta nda Bulus tǝ Sila kishsha pursuna, ngǝrangndǝ'ina hura'a Lidiya. Humkǝndǝhi mbǝnniyu tǝ fichile fǝrkǝkit mbwa'angndǝ shuwuncha kanda, paɗ ɓaknda soktǝ tǝ alchit hanɗǝkiketa. Pǝɗaknda.

17.1: Kuwurkǝndǝ tǝ Amfibolis tǝ Afolloniya, saakǝndǝ Tassalonika kǝ mbǝɗi nat kǝtǝn humta Yahudawecha.
17.2: Bulus yimkǝna thlǝmmatnanda nda i sǝntǝnhi, mbǝraɗ farǝ yiptǝhi mǝkkan mǝlla halǝ'i'ndǝ tǝ kanda a hur ɗelwercha Fara.
17.3: Nakna chekanda kanda, paɗ kǝna sǝnanda kandǝsi tǝ ndatwa, keekesi kǝ saa Kǝrǝsti pwene, paɗ kǝ thlaaka hur mǝmmatcha, ngǝrkǝn ndatwa. Yǝso ti nati mbwa'andakunniya, mǝllan naka Kǝrǝsti.
17.4: Paɗ funǝ Yahudawecha, kahhafichi hur'inchengnanda, hummangndǝ i'ndǝ tǝ Bulus tǝ Sila, kichupaɗ sǝt Helinawechǝ oi fa lechanda Fara, tǝ kichupaɗ sǝt pǝktat nischǝ oi fa mbutǝ kǝ sǝkficha.
17.5: Nak Yahudawechikǝna sǝrǝhta, ngommang ndǝ hwanchǝ rǝnnecha a lumo. Kǝ ngomtǝnnda, tǝrkaakǝndǝ thla'andǝ hur'i'nda a hur hǝmmǝtkǝn. Yimkǝnnda hurhura'a Yason nak nda kat Bulus tǝ Sila kǝthlǝm kǝ ɓandǝ tǝ kanda mbanitǝ nofcha.
17.6: Kǝ ɓǝssawuchitndǝ kanda, kahkǝndǝ Yason tǝ funǝ hwanmancha, ɗǝkndǝ tǝ kanda mbanitǝ fa sak miiya, nak nda hwatta kanda ndatwa: "Nofchiya naka thlahur'i'nda chika ayi hurkisshita, ɓeɗnda mbǝɗya paɗ.
17.7: Yason thliɗtǝ kanda, ufnda kǝllundǝssa kussa Kaisarwa, ndatwa yunǝ kutursi, thlǝmkǝnwa Yǝso."
17.8: Thlaakǝ hur'i'nda Nofcha tǝ fa sakmicha kǝ sǝktǝndǝ ichiniyu.
17.9: Kǝ thlǝɗ ndǝ hanɗǝɓǝl punofchǝhar a harra Yason tǝ tahǝt nofcha kalkǝndǝ kandǝhi kǝ pǝɗanda. Bulus tǝ Sila a Biriya
17.10: Chat kǝ sǝt fiɗikta, ɗǝfkǝ hwanmancha ndǝ Bulus tǝ Sila kǝ pǝɗanda Biriya. Kǝ saatǝnda mbǝnniyu yimkǝnnda kǝtǝn humta Yahudawechihi.
17.11: Yahudawechi naka ɓǝɗya pǝɗanda fichilehi naka Tasalonika tǝ hur'i'nda, kǝthlǝm thliɗndǝ shuwunkǝn tǝ harchǝ chap chap, lanaknda tausandǝ shunda Farǝ wembǝta kǝ nandǝ ndu i mbutǝ Bulusyu kit.
17.12: Oiya hur Yahudawechi fǝrkǝkit, Paɗ tǝ funǝ nishchǝ Helinawecha fichile naktǝ mwanda tǝ hishchǝ paɗ.
17.13: Kǝ sǝktǝ Yahudawechi naka Tassalonikayu, tǝ ndatwa Bulussa ɓassǝ pathla Fara a Biritiya, ɗǝknda nata chikandǝ kanda kǝnnda thla'andǝ hur'i'nda nofcha.
17.14: Chatkichuyu ɗǝfkǝ fafǝrkit Bulus kǝ pǝɗaka mihawurta, nda Sila tǝ Timoti thlarkǝndǝhi mbǝnniyu.
17.15: Fichile ɗǝfkǝ Bulusyu saakǝndǝ tǝndi kǝ Atina. Naknda ngǝrandǝ'in thlǝkndǝ thlǝnda ɓǝɗa Bulus ndatwa, yehsi nda Sila tǝ Timoti kǝ ɗǝnda mbǝsndǝ leɗleɗ, pǝɗaknda. Bulussa Atina
17.16: Kǝ nat Bulussa pu kanda a Atina, sǝɓkǝ hanɗǝkiketǝ'enaɗi kaǝn, kǝ natǝn hǝmǝtkǝn nihiɗaɗi tǝ ɗǝhhacha.
17.17: I sǝka para la nakna halǝ'i'nda kǝtǝn humta Yahudawechǝhi kandang tǝ funǝ Helinawecha fa lechanda Fara. Chika ɓǝɗi nat lumo fichile la ɓǝlaakǝ nata ɓǝnniyu.
17.18: Funǝsǝ paɗ Abikuriyawecha tǝ Sitokiyawecha fa mbǝr'ǝna halkǝndǝ'i'ndǝ tǝ ndi. Funengnanda ndakndǝwa: "Mǝ yahtǝ lǝ ɗaakiya mbuta?" Ndakfunǝwa: "Nda lǝɓassǝ ɗǝhhacha nofcha." "Mbukǝndǝ kichu kǝthlǝm Bulussa ɓassǝ Yǝso tǝ thlata mǝmatcha.
17.19: Tǝrkǝndǝndi ɗǝkndǝ tǝnda ɗar Arasa, ndakndǝwa: "Ndu nu mbǝlla mbwa'andakani witǝ yuwa sakayiɗi natu sakandaɗiya?
17.20: Kǝthlǝm ɓanǝ yuwa icha thlǝmechengnani, yahkanisi kǝ sǝnnani i naka sakchikǝn."
17.21: Nakǝnya nat Atinawecha tǝ romchi naka mbǝɗengnanda, ǝnsǝ lǝ sǝnndǝ kǝ sherangka mbu yuwa shuwuncha tǝ sǝk yuwa icha.
17.22: Thlaakǝ Bulus thlarkǝnhi hurɗifitǝ Arasacha, ndakǝnwa: "Kunang nofchi Atinacha, a mbǝssaɗi wa kunang fa tǝr mbandǝ chika tǝ teni.
17.23: Kǝthlǝm manja mbǝrtǝhi tǝ hǝmǝtkǝn, lanaki ichi natuni mwananda, a naki mbǝt fǝr pofǝn tǝ yarata ɗarkǝn ndatwa: "Kǝthlǝm Fari sǝnuchit ficha. Lenatuni mwanandǝ sǝnuchituniyu, mǝllan nati mbwa'anda kuni.
17.24: Fara letinkǝ kisshita tǝ ichinaka hurkǝn uf, mǝllan naka Lǝmwanda afshi tǝ kisshita, shokwa kǝtǝn kapat hura'a Farǝ letintǝ nifǝwa.
17.25: Kichu paɗ ɓahwa kat nifǝ kǝ kǝssaansǝ tǝ harchǝ'enwa, ɓahwa yah ǝnwa, kǝthlǝm mǝllan tǝ i'ndi'en la fǝrang shisshingta nifa, tǝ yipta tǝ ichi natna yahtǝ nat.
17.26: Mǝllan paɗ tinkǝ yakat terǝ nofcha tǝ mbǝɗa nifǝ ǝrta, kǝthlǝm kǝ soknda hur kisshitǝ nat, tahsaǝn sǝrǝt naɗengnandǝhi, tǝ sǝrǝt hǝmchengnanda.
17.27: Sǝk Farǝ kichuyu kǝthlǝm kǝ kandǝndi, mbahya nanda taptǝ kǝ mbǝssangnda, chika sokkǝn nga nakǝn langngǝ tǝkǝmwa.
17.28: Kǝthlǝm: "Tǝ mbǝɗ'en natǝmhi, lanatma yipta, paɗ tǝ mbǝɗ'en mwaatǝmhi. Nda i mbutǝ funengnuni fa at imshi ndatwa: "Kitchitkǝn, kǝmnang ma witǝkǝn nakǝm.'
17.29: "Nakǝn kǝmnang witǝ Fara, kamusi kǝ yarǝm tǝ ndatwa Farǝ nakǝn nda zinariya ndu azurfa ndu ngwiya, le tahhǝstǝ nifǝ tǝ ɗathlǝ'enwa.
17.30: A hur soh tǝrra Farǝ chumwandǝ'enaɗi a ɗar tor ɓomchita. Nakǝnya mbwa'aɗa nofchǝ nat, chika tǝ tee'ǝn kǝtǝrndǝhi.
17.31: Kǝthlǝm tahsaɗǝ farihi natna ɓata sa kiita kisshitǝsi, i kitchitkǝn tǝ mbǝɗa nofchi tahsaɗǝnhi, kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn firtǝ kitchitkǝn kǝ mbǝɗa chika wunni, tǝ thla'a nda hur mǝmatcha."
17.32: Kǝ sǝktǝndǝ shuwun thlata mǝmatcha, funengnanda njirkǝndǝndi, ndak funǝ paɗwa: "Yahkani kǝ ngǝrani sǝk i natu mbuta kǝ ɗar shuniya paɗ."
17.33: A mbǝnniyu saktǝ Bulushi tǝ kanda ɓǝɗakǝn.
17.34: Funengnanda ngǝrang ndǝ'ina mbǝɗa Bulus, fǝrkǝndǝ kit. A hurnanda Diyonisiyus, lǝ sakmicha, tǝ nuhnifa le nat thlǝmkǝnwa Damaris, tǝ funǝ paɗ fichile naka thlǝmatnanda.

18.1: Ɗiffitǝ ndǝkǝn, malkǝ Bulus Atinahi pǝɗakna Korinti.
18.2: Kǝmkǝndǝ tǝ lǝ Yahudawata mbǝnniyu nat thlǝmkǝnwa Akila lǝ Fontusta. Le ɓak nakǝnya a Italiya, kandang tǝ nuhkǝn le nat thlǝmkǝnwa Biriskila, kǝthlǝm Kalaudiyus firtǝ kus ndatwa nat Yahudawecha kǝ malndǝ Romahi. Ɗǝk Bulussa mbǝskanda.
18.3: Nakǝn tor harengnandǝ ǝrtǝ tǝ nofchiyu, tor tahhasǝ tenti, sokkǝnna thlǝmatnanda naknda sǝt torra.
18.4: I'sǝka farǝ yipta Yahudawecha, la yimkǝna kǝtǝn humta Yahudawecha, a la nangna kahandǝ hur'inda Yahudawechǝ tǝ punofcha.
18.5: Kǝ ɓaɗnda Sila tǝ Timoti a Makidoniya, ɓaknda mbǝs Bulus firtǝ fat'enna ɓassa, mǝlla cheɗanda Yahudawecha tǝ kitwa, Yǝso naka Kǝrǝsti.
18.6: Halangndǝ'i'nda nak nda i'erandǝfa, tǝppaǝn njelechi'ennaɗi ndangna kandǝwa: "Hekke tǝ fwarchengnuni tǝ inchengnuni! njang cheɗikish. Thlata nakǝnya kǝ mban ɗǝki mbǝɗa punofcha."
18.7: Malkǝn mbǝnnihiyu pǝɗakna hura'a nifǝ lǝ atfichiwa Titiyus Yustus, lǝmwanandǝ Fara, huraa'en nduk tǝ mikǝtǝn humta Yahudawecha.
18.8: Kirisbus, kappat nifa mbǝt humta Yahudawecha, fǝrkǝn kit kǝmbǝɗa Fara, kandang tǝ nofchi huraa'ennat. Korintiyawechi oi sǝkkǝ ɓassa Bulus, fǝrkǝndǝkit sanfichǝ baptisma kanda.
18.9: Farǝle fiɗikta, chenɗang Lǝmwanda Bulus hur'ǝn nda sǝnnatawa: "Mǝlechinuwa, ɗumban tǝ ɓasseku paɗ mǝngasinǝ ɓaawa,
18.10: Kǝthlǝm njangtǝsa, paɗ nifǝsǝ na walǝsa kǝ sukǝn'ǝnwa, kǝthlǝm nofchengnǝsi oi hur hǝmmǝɗiya."
18.11: Sokkǝ Bulushi mbǝnniyu, hurat'ǝrta tǝ ndǝraa tehethl, mǝlla sakandǝ pathla Fara ɗi a hurnanda.
18.12: A fari nat Galiyo sǝt kuturichita furǝt Akaya, thla'ang Yahudawechǝ Bulussafa, ɓakndǝtǝnda mbanitǝ fasakmiya.
18.13: Ndakndǝwa: "Nifiya mǝlla kahhandǝ hur'i'nda nofcha, kǝ mwanangndǝ Fari nguchik keeke tǝ kus."
18.14: Kǝ nat Bulus nduk kǝ shunǝn, ndǝkǝn ndandǝ Galiyo Yahudawechǝkǝnwa: "Makǝthlǝm sǝt'ǝn nduɗuwa ndu kapat ɓǝɓi'ǝna, mani kathlǝmmatakuni.
18.15: Nakǝn pathlǝ sahmi kǝ ɗar shuwuncha, tǝ thlǝmcha tǝ paɗ kus engnuni, kǝllamǝn kunang tǝ inchengnuni. Njang ngi mbǝlla thlandǝ shundǝhi kǝ ɗar witǝ ichiyawa."
18.17: Nat nda kǝsangndǝ Sostanus lǝhǝm mbanita a mbǝt humta Yahudawechǝhi, tǝppangnda a mbanitǝ fa sakmikǝn. Kǝmmawuchik'ǝn Galiyo kǝ ɗar i'sǝtnda Ngǝraa Bulus Ina Antakiya Ɗǝkǝn chaa tǝ Hur Suriya
18.18: Ɗiffitǝ ndǝkǝn sokkǝ Bulushi hanmunchǝ oi tǝfafǝrkit a mbǝnniyu, ndangna kandǝwa nan malǝkandǝhi, a yimkǝnna kommbawal, ɓǝɗakna Suriya kandang tǝ Biriskila tǝ Akila. Kǝ saatǝnda Kankiriya, hǝsaǝn hwasǝ indǝ'enaɗi, kǝthlǝm kǝ nǝhɗaǝn shunihi mbuɗtǝn.
18.19: Saakǝnda Afisa, malkǝn Biriskila tǝ Akila mbǝnniyu, mǝllan tǝ i'ndǝ'en yimkǝnna kǝtǝn humta Yahudawechihi, nakna tausandǝ shuwunkǝn tǝ Yahudawechikǝn.
18.20: Hwanangndǝwa kǝ sokka mbǝnniyu hanmunchǝ oi, cherkǝnfa.
18.21: Nakna pǝɗata ndangnakanduwa: "Ni ngǝrandǝ'inna mbǝɗengnuni ma ngǝmma Fara." Yimkǝnna kommbawal pǝɗakna Afisa.
18.22: Kǝ tǝrtǝnahaya a Kaisariya, pǝɗaknashi ɗǝkna nda'ǝnna fa tǝrmbanda, pǝɗatahai kǝ Antakiya.
18.23: Ɗifitǝ munchi sǝtna mbǝnniyu, thlaakǝn wiyaan furǝt Galatiya tǝ Firijiya nakna kuwur hǝmtǝ hǝmta, kǝna cheka alchita fa tǝrmbandǝ nat. Ɓesh Afolos tǝ Alchitafa a Afisa
18.24: Lǝ Yahudawatsi thlǝmkǝnwa Afolos ɓaka Afisa. Mǝllan lǝ Iskandariyatǝ nakǝn. Lǝ mbǝr shunda shintǝ'ǝnkaǝn, nat tǝ yarat shunda Fara.
18.25: Sakafǝchǝ pathlǝ mbanda Lǝmwandǝhar, paɗ nakǝn tǝ alchita fa hur Shemeɗa, la mbukǝn paɗ kǝ sakaan'ichaɗi kǝ ɗar Yǝso keeke, nat tǝ kichu baptisma Yohanna ndak sǝntǝn.
18.26: Tǝrkaakǝn shundǝ tǝ alchitafa, a kǝtǝn humta Yahudawecha, kǝ sǝktǝ nda Biriskila tǝ Akila ndi, tǝrkǝndǝnda huri, chekangndǝ mbwa'a pathla Farǝ kaǝn.
18.27: Kǝ yahtǝ Afollossa ɗǝta Akaya, chekang hwanmanchǝ alchita, paɗ yarangndǝ ɗelwera fa tǝr mbandǝsi kǝthlǝm kǝ thlǝndǝndi tǝ harchǝchap. Kǝ saatǝn, kǝssangna fichilesi fǝrkǝkit kaǝn, tǝ mbǝɗa kafata.
18.28: Kǝthlǝm sheraɗa Yahudawecha tǝ alchit kaǝn, fǝraan harǝfata kanda mbanitǝ nofcha, la cheɗkǝnwa hur pathla Fara Yǝso naka Kǝrǝsti.

19.1: A thlahmbǝɗi nat Afollossa korinti, Bulus wuyaǝn hur thlet hǝmǝtkǝn saakǝna Afisa, mbǝɗi mbǝsandǝn tahhǝt kimshechǝkǝn.
19.2: Ndangna kandǝwa: "A thlinduni Shemeɗ Chiɗchiɗ a thlahmbǝɗi fǝrtuni kitwa?" Ndangndǝwa: "Auwa, ɓahwani tamta sǝktǝwa Shemeɗsi Chiɗchiɗwa."
19.3: Ndakǝnwa: "Witǝ baptisama tǝmǝ sandǝfichǝkuni?" Ndakndǝwa baptisma Yohanna."
19.4: Ndak Buluswa: "Yohanna sǝkǝn baptisma kǝchendǝnwa tǝrnifǝhi, nakna ndanda nofchuwa kǝ fǝrndǝ kit kǝ mbǝɗa le na ɓata ɗiffitǝkǝn, naka Yǝso."
19.5: Kǝ sǝktǝndǝ kichu, sang fichǝ baptisma kanda a hur thlǝm Lǝmwanda Yǝso.
19.6: Kǝ ɗǝffandǝ Bulus hara kanda in, ɓak Shemeɗ Chiɗchiɗ kǝ ɗarnanda, naknda shundǝ tǝ hanshuwunchǝ somsomǝn, paɗ naknda mbu'icha.
19.7: Ufnda nak ndǝ nifǝ kumngǝrǝnsi chap.
19.8: Yimkǝ Bulussa kǝtǝn humta Yahudawechihi nakna ɓassa lechitfuwa shee ndǝraa mǝkkan, mǝlla halǝ'i'ndǝ tǝ kanda, nakna kahhandǝ hur'inchengnanda kǝ ɗar mwanda Fara.
19.9: Paɗ funǝsa hurnanda tǝ kwaakwachit i'nda cherkǝnda fǝrkit, naknda njirandǝ mbanda Lǝmwananda mbanitǝ nofcha, kǝthlǝm kichu Bulus sakkǝnhi tǝkanda, pǝɗakǝn tǝ fa fǝrkit, nakna sakandaɗi i sǝkka wembǝta a makaranta Tiranus.
19.10: Hurat chap mǝlla sǝt kichu, tǝ kichu nat nofchi naka hǝmǝt Asiya shikndǝ pathla Lǝmwanda, Yahudawecha tǝ punofcha. Hwecha Sikeba
19.11: A shiɗ Farǝ ǝnat sheka i'ndǝ oi tǝ mbǝɗa Bulus le tamuchit ficha nata.
19.12: Chika mayani'en ndu njelaa'en, le tǝkanghara fat'enfa, la ɗangficha hacha kǝ kǝnda hur hafaɗeng nanda, paɗ kǝ sakndǝhi tǝ ɓǝɓishemecha.
19.13: Funǝ Yahudawecha fichile la naka wiyandǝ hǝmǝtkǝn, la naknda rǝk ɓǝɓishemecha, la sǝkndǝ tor tǝ thlǝm Lǝmwandǝ Yǝso, a ɗar fichile nak tǝ ɓǝɓishemechikǝnafa la ndangndǝwa: "A hur thlǝm Yǝso lela ɓastǝ Bulussa ɗarkǝn chamakish."
19.14: A hurnanda hwechǝsi muɗ kǝ hishcha, naka i kapat pǝrist lǝ Yahudawata le nat thlǝmkǝnwa Sikeba, uf nda lasǝkndǝ kichu.
19.15: Ngǝmang ɓǝɓishemeɗ kǝn kandǝwa: "A shini Yǝso paɗ a shini Bulus, kunang paɗ kunang miicha?"
19.16: Nifi nak tǝ ɓǝɓishemeɗɗǝ fiyu pǝrkǝnna ɗarnanda, sherangna kandǝ tǝ alchita, cheknda kissha hurikǝn tǝ wesha tamkwal tamkwal paɗ ɓǝskǝndǝ ndindicha.
19.17: Fichile nak tǝ sokta a Afisa, Yahudawecha tǝ punofcha, kǝ sǝktǝndǝ i sǝkyu kǝsang lechit kandǝ nat, mwanang ndǝ thlǝm Lǝmwandǝ Yǝso.
19.18: Oi a hur yuwa fafǝrkit, ɓaknda nata mbu ɓǝɓi ɗǝssǝcheng nanda tallara.
19.19: Nofchǝ oi fa kulecha ɓakndǝ tǝ ɗelwercheng nanda, 'yangndaɗaɗi a mbanitǝ nofchǝ uf, kǝ sakandǝndǝ hanɗǝɓǝl ɗelwerchi ikkaɗi, mbǝssang ndǝwa a shee azurfa aru kumchit kum ɗurman (50,000).
19.20: Shunda Lǝmwanda nakna ɗǝta mban tǝ alchitafǝ kaǝn. Thla Hur'i'nda a Afisa
19.21: Ɗiffitǝ ichini sǝknatyu, Bulus yarkǝnna hanɗǝkiketi'enwa niɗǝttǝ Makidoniya, tǝ Akaya ka cheta Urshelima, ndakǝnwa ma ɗiɗi mbǝnniyu waat kǝ ɗi hǝmmǝt Roma."
19.22: Thlǝnkǝn funǝ chap hur fa kǝssa torchǝsi, nda Timoti tǝ Arastus, kǝ Makidoniya, mǝllan thlarkǝnhi a hǝmmǝt Asiya tolla.
19.23: A hanmunchiniyu thlakkǝ kapat thla hur'i'nda, kǝ ɗar pathlǝ fa tǝrmbanda Yǝso.
19.24: Thla hur'inkǝn ɓakǝn tǝ mbǝɗa lǝ ɓǝlta, le nat thlǝmkǝnwa Dimitiriyus, lelǝ sǝk tor tǝ hurita, kǝnna ɓǝl kǝtǝn ɗǝhhacha Artemis. Lanakna mbǝssa hanɗǝɓǝlta fa torharkǝnsǝ kaǝn.
19.25: A ngomaǝn kandǝ nat tǝ fichile nat witǝ torhareng nandǝ ǝrta, ndakǝnwa: "Nofcha, ashinuniwa tǝ tori engnaniya mbǝsti kǝnnecha.
19.26: Kuna nata kuna sǝkta nga Afisa ɗengwa nat tǝ Asiya, Bulus kahhaɗǝ hur'i'nda nofchǝ oi, paɗ tǝɓrandǝ nofchihi oi, tǝ ndatwa ɗǝhachi lǝ tintuni tǝ harcha nga Farǝwa.
19.27: Mbǝrramsi mborro ɓata naficha sǝɓandǝ thlǝm torengnǝmmaɗi. Ɗiffitǝ ndǝkǝn paɗ tǝ kǝttǝn nuhɗahata kapat alliya a Artemis, nan soktǝ nga ǝnwa, paɗ nan saktǝhi tǝ mwandǝ'en, mǝllan ti lamwanandǝ hǝmmǝt Asiya tǝ kishitǝ nat."
19.28: Kǝ sǝktǝndǝkichu sǝɓkǝ hurcheng nandaɗi, naknda hwat tǝ ndatwa: "A shok kapat mwanda Artemis a Afisawecha!"
19.29: Nǝhǝɗkǝ hǝmǝtkǝnaɗǝ tǝ sheka i'nda, rahkǝndǝ kǝ mbǝt terǝkǝn, kǝssangndǝ Gayus tǝ Aristarkus, shikechǝ wita Bulus a Makidoniya.
19.30: Yeh Bulus si kǝ yimka hur nofchǝkǝn, ngǝmauchik fa fǝrkit.
19.31: Kuturchǝsa Asiya naka shikechǝkǝn, thlǝnangndǝ shundǝ tǝ ndatwa, mǝ ɓahiɗa yimta hur nofchi oi yuwa.
19.32: Yakat nofchi ngomkǝhiyu, kanda hur sheka'i'nda, kǝthlǝm shekndǝhi, funǝ tǝ mbǝɗyu funǝ paɗ tǝ mbǝɗya, sokkǝn terchin fichile sǝnuchik i humang kandǝhi.
19.33: Funǝ Yahudawechǝsi pǝkkǝndǝ Alekzanda mban. Mǝlan paɗ thla'a'ǝn hara kǝthlǝm kǝ ngasfichǝ ɓa, mbah nan mbwa'anda kandǝ i sǝka.
19.34: Kǝ mbǝssandǝndǝwa lǝ Yahudawat nakǝn, hanthlikchǝ chap ufndǝ kanda hwata, tǝ kapat ɓurata ndatwa: "Kapat mwanda Artemis a shoka Afisawecha!"
19.35: A mweshitkǝn, lǝ yaratkǝnna hǝmǝtkǝn ngassaǝn nofchihiyu, ndakǝnwa: "Kunang Afisawecha, wun sǝnuchikwa hǝmmǝt Afisa naka hǝrǝm kǝttǝn ɗǝhhacha kapat Artemis, tǝ kweshcha ngwiyi hǝmka haya afshi?
19.36: Nda i natǝm ichiniyu, kamusi kǝ halǝm i'ndǝwa, kamkǝnsi kǝ ngassuni ɓa mǝ wesshiɗuniwa.
19.37: Ɓakuni tǝ nofchiya ɓǝɗya, chika sokkǝn herkunda kǝtǝn ɗǝhhachengnǝm, ndu kǝ mbundǝ ɓǝɓi'ǝn kǝ ɗar nuhɗǝhhachengnǝmwa.
19.38: Ma Dimitiriyus tǝ shikechǝkǝn tǝ fa sǝt torchi'en, ma ǝnsa thlerǝnandǝ tǝ yuna, a i'nafichǝ kǝtǝn sakmichǝhi, paɗ fa sakmikǝnsi ɗǝknda muh hanhara.
19.39: Ma ǝnsǝ yahtunisa ɓattǝkǝn kǝ mban, ɗǝk ma mweshanda mbanitǝ pǝktecha.
19.40: Kittǝkǝn kǝmna hur lechit ngǝm muhhanhar thlahur inni ɓukweya, kǝthlǝm ngǝma mbǝlla mbu i ɓaktǝ thlahuri'ndǝ kǝ ɗarnandǝwa.

20.1: Kǝ tuɓwat thlahur'i'nda, Bulus akǝn fafǝrkit, chekaǝn alchita kanda hur hanɗǝkiketa, ɗǝkǝn ndandǝnakandǝwa sefarǝyuna, pǝɗakna hǝmmǝt Makidoniya.
20.2: Kǝ wiyandǝn thlet hǝmchikǝn, chekaǝn alchita fafǝrkit kaǝn, ɓakna hǝmmǝt Hellas.
20.3: Sǝkǝn ndǝraa mǝkkana mbǝnniyu, nakna harǝfa kǝ pǝɗaka Suriya a hur kombawal, nak Yahudawecha yaraa ɓǝɓi'ichafa. Ndǝkǝn yartǝnwa nan ngǝrandǝ in tǝ Makidoniya.
20.4: Nofchi ɗǝfkǝ Bulus nda: Sufata hweya Farus lǝ Biriyata, tǝ Aristarkus tǝ Sakundus, Nofcha Tassalonika, tǝ Gayus nangna Darbe, tǝ Timoti, nat tǝ Tikikus tǝ Tarofimus, nofcha Asiya.
20.5: Fichile lak pǝɗata ɓan puukǝndǝ kani a Toruwas.
20.6: Kanang paɗ malkani Filibihi yimkani kommbawal, ɗiffitǝ chi njohmi nguchit mehndǝsa fi'en, hur mundǝ ɗurman ndǝkani mbǝskanda a Toruwas sokkani ɓǝnniyu mundǝ muɗ. Thla'a Fichǝ Murǝt Aftikos a Toruwas
20.7: Tǝrka mundǝmuɗ ngomkani uf kǝthlǝm kǝ chichangani njohmǝhi. Thlaakǝ Bulus ɓassangna kandǝsi. Nakna harǝfǝ kǝthlǝm yehsa pǝɗata ɓingǝtkǝn, nakna ɓassǝ toltol taa kǝ ɗar fiɗikta.
20.8: A kǝtǝni ngomtani a huri afshi tikkeshchisǝ oi.
20.9: Hwan kimshaasi thlǝmkǝnwa Aftikos sokkǝn ɗassa tinkummbata, kǝssang ɓweni kaǝn. Bulussa ɗar ɓassǝ toltol yimkǝna ɓweni kasat, hǝmkǝnnahaya mǝkkatǝ tǝrkǝtǝnkǝn, tǝrkǝ fichiɗǝ kǝ murǝtkǝn.
20.10: Tǝrkǝ Bulussa haya kǝ ɓǝɗi nat hwaniyu, ɓirkǝnhi ɗarkǝn tǝrkǝnnda kapahɓa ndakǝnwa: "Mǝ thla'i hur'i'ɗengnuniwa mwe tǝ shisshingtafa.
20.11: Ngǝrang Bulus inna huri afshi ɗǝkna chichandǝ njohmǝhi chiikǝn. Nakna shundǝ tǝkanda kǝ wenda ɓǝta kanapǝɗata.
20.12: Pǝɗakndǝ tǝ kimshi'iyu tǝ shisshingtafa nangnda kwalǝ kaǝn. Witǝ Thlata Toruwas kǝ Miletus
20.13: Kǝ natani sa'a'ndǝ kommbawal, yimkanisi kǝ Asus kǝthlǝm kǝ tǝrrani Bulussa mbǝnniyu nda i tahsandǝnhi, mǝllan yarkǝnwa tǝsar natna ɗǝta.
20.14: Kǝ ɓatna mbǝskani a Asus, tǝrkaninda hur kommbawal ɗǝkani kǝ Mitilin.
20.15: Thlaakani ɓǝnniyu ɓingǝtle a hur kommbawal ɓakani kǝllari Kiyos. Iskichitkǝn changani kǝ Samas ɗiffitǝ mundǝ ǝrtǝ paɗ saakani Miletus.
20.16: Tǝrkǝ Bulus hurwa ngu thlarǝhi Afisa wa, kǝthlǝm mǝ sǝɓɓaɗǝ han thlikchaɗa Asiya wa. Mǝlla weshi kǝ saaka Urshelima ma mbandǝsi a farǝ Pentikos. Shuna Bulus Pǝktecha a Afisa
20.17: A Militus thlǝntǝ Bulus, kǝ Afisa kǝ ang fichǝ pǝktecha, mbǝt hwanda kǝ ɓanda mbǝsndi.
20.18: Kǝ ɓatnda mbǝsndi ndangnakandǝwa: "Kunang tǝ inchengnuni a shinuni witǝ soki sokti tǝkuni, i'sǝka para njang tǝ kuni, thlata fari ɗǝfti sarengnǝ kǝ Asiya.
20.19: Nja sa tor Lǝmwanda tǝ amtita tǝ ɓahmwa'i'nda tǝ ɓahhi satti tǝmbǝɗa ɓǝɓi yarǝcha Yahudawecha.
20.20: A malawi mbwa'a i'chakuni le na kǝssanda kunisǝwa, paɗ lanaki sakandakunihar a hur nofcha ɓuɓwetǝfǝwa, tǝ paɗ la yimkǝ huraa hura'a.
20.21: Kahhaɗi hur'i'nda Yahudawecha tǝ punofcha kǝ tǝrndǝhi mbanitǝ Fara, paɗ kǝ fǝrndǝ kit kǝ mbǝɗa Lǝmwaɗengnǝm Yǝso Kǝrǝsti.
20.22: Nakǝnya ɗǝki Urshelima tǝ ɓǝɗa alchita Shemeɗ Chiɗchiɗ. Paɗ sinwi'i'na kǝsnja mbǝnniyuwa,
20.23: A nakǝn cheɗi Chiɗchiɗtǝ Shemeɗwa, i'sǝka hǝmta na pursunachita natsi, tǝ ɓahta le naka punji.
20.24: Chika tǝ kichu tǝrwi shisshintengnǝ nda ǝn ndiichinwa, ndu kapat ǝnkǝ fandengnǝwa, mani mbǝlla tuɓwandǝ tori fǝritǝ Lǝmwandǝ Yǝso, le naka ɓassǝ kweshcha kusheng shunda kǝ ɗar kafata Fara.
20.25: Nakǝnya a shiniwa ngusa hurnuni na ngǝrnatnjuwa, kunangti wiiyaandi kuni kǝni ɓassa kuturichita Fara kunisi.
20.26: Tǝpaɗ nja sǝnnanda kunisi ɓukweya, mwa'u fwara yunengnunisa ɗar indengnuwa,
20.27: Kǝthlǝm a sǝkwi lǝklǝkchit mbwa'a yaara Farakuni natwa.
20.28: Mbǝramsa inchengnuni, tǝpaɗ uf chaɓi ɗǝftǝ Chiɗchiɗchita Shemeɗ kuni, kǝnuni fa putǝhar kǝ ɗuni mban tǝ hǝrǝm nofcha, fa kuwur mbanda Fara, fichile mbǝssandǝna i'ndi'en tǝ mbǝɗa fwara hwe'en.
20.29: A shini tǝ ndatwa ma pǝɗeɗi funǝ ɓǝɓi nofcha nanda yimta hurnuni, paɗ ngunda malandǝ chaɓǝkǝnwa.
20.30: Tǝpaɗ funa hurnuni nanda thlata kǝnnda shuwun lekta, kǝthlǝm kǝ kahangndǝ fa kuwur mbanda Fara kǝ thlǝmmantnanda.
20.31: Kǝthlǝm ɗǝkǝn sokam tǝ tahhasǝffa, kǝ kuɗkuni, hurat mǝkkan fiɗiktǝsǝwa farǝsǝwa, mallawi mbwa'anda kuni natuni tǝ amtitwa.
20.32: Nakǝnya njang firi kuni ɓǝɗa Fara, paɗ tǝ shuwun kafat'en, le na mbǝlla tinandǝkuni, paɗ kǝ fǝrangka kuni i tahsandǝnhi nat tǝ fichile nakchiɗchiɗ.
20.33: A yahwi zinariya ndu azurfa ndu njelecha yunǝwa.
20.34: Kunang tǝ inchengnuni a shinuniwa a shiɗi tor tǝ harchi'engnǝya kǝthlǝm kǝ kwanayi indengnǝ i'yahtǝn tǝ fichile naka thlǝmmatna.
20.35: A hur ichi nat cheɗaɗi sakǝtkǝnakuni tǝ ndatwa, sokkǝn waat kǝsuni tor kicheya kǝthlǝm kǝ kǝssangnguni fichilesi nguchik tǝ alchitafa, kǝnuni kuɗuk pathla Lǝmwandǝ Yǝso mǝllanti ndakwa: "Fǝr'ǝnna pǝɗaɗa thlǝthi tǝ mbǝsta.'"
20.36: Kǝ mweshandǝ Bulus mbutǝkichu, kopkǝnhi hwakǝn nat tǝ kandang.
20.37: Mǝrkǝndǝhi tit ufnda, hǝmmangndafa kǝskǝndǝndǝhar i saktǝhi.
20.38: Nakndǝ tǝ sǝɓhura, kǝthlǝm shuni ndandǝnakandǝwa ngundangǝrnatndǝwa, thlaakǝnda ɗǝfkǝndǝndi kǝmbǝt kommbawal.

21.1: Kǝ maltanikandǝhi, yimkani hur kommbawaltǝkǝn pǝɗakani kǝ Kos, wendambǝt paɗ ɗǝkani kǝ Rodes, thlaakani mbǝnniyu paɗ kǝ Fatara.
21.2: Kǝ mbǝstani kommbawalti na ɗǝtǝ furut Finikiya, yimkanisi pǝɗakani.
21.3: Kǝ tǝrkaatani nat Sayifurus, malkanihi tǝ kukun hishingta, ɗǝkaniɓan tǝ pǝɗata hǝmmǝt Suriya. Tǝrkanihaya a Taya, kǝthlǝm a mbǝnniyu nat kommbawaltǝkǝnna harandǝ ichi'enna haya.
21.4: Kǝ mbǝstani fafǝrkit, sokkanihi mbǝnniyu mundǝmuɗ. Tǝ mbǝɗa shemeɗa ndangnda Buluswa mǝɗiɗa Urshelimawa.
21.5: Tǝ kichu kǝ saatǝ munchi natani thlata, kǝnkanihursǝ tǝ wita. Thlaakǝnndǝ ufnda tǝ nishcha tǝ hwecha ɗǝfkǝndǝ kani kǝ ɗǝffitǝ hǝmta, mbǝnniyu kopkanihi mi ama hwankani,
21.6: kanani saktǝhi tǝkanda. Kanani yimta hur kommbawal, kandang paɗ ngǝrangndǝ'ina huri.
21.7: Kǝ tuɓwandani witengnani a Taya, saakani kǝ Tolemayis, ndangani ǝnna fahchǝnani, sǝkani mundǝ ǝrta mbǝɗengnanda.
21.8: Wembǝtle thlaakani ɗǝkani kǝ Kaisariya, yimkani kǝ hura'a Filibus lǝ ɓassa, le nak ǝrta a hur fichile muɗ taatǝ fichǝharyu.
21.9: Hwechǝ'ensi fwaɗa kǝ hantarcha ngwanauchit fichǝkanda, lanaknda mbu'icha.
21.10: Ɗiffitǝ sǝt hanmuncha mbǝnniyu, ɓak yunǝ lenaka tapǝna'a nat thlǝmkǝnwa Agabus nakna Yahudiya.
21.11: Kǝ ɓat Agabussa thlǝmmatnani, tǝrkǝn sahǝt kǝnhura Bulus. Ndǝkǝn kǝnandǝn harchi'en, tǝ sarǝchi'en ndakǝnwa: "A i'ndat Chiɗchiɗ tǝ Shemeɗkǝnya, 'kichu Yahundawecha Urshelima, nanda kǝnandǝ lǝ sahǝt kǝnhuriya, paɗ kǝ fǝrndǝndi kǝ mbǝɗa punofcha."
21.12: Kǝ sǝktani kichu, kanang tǝ nofchi naka mbǝnniyu, hwanangani Bulus mǝ ɗiɗa Urshelimawa.
21.13: Ngǝmmang Bulus ndakǝnwa, "Kǝthlǝmmi natuni sǝtkichu? Kǝthlǝmmi natuni tita kǝnuni sǝɓandǝ hanɗǝkiketengnaɗi? A tehshifa nga kǝnitǝ ɗengwama, ndu kǝ ɓǝllikǝficha a Urshelima kǝthlǝm thlǝm Lǝmwandǝ Yǝso."
21.14: Mbǝla'uchikani tǝɓrandǝ yarǝ'enhiyu, ngaskani ɓa, ndakaniwa: "Suku sakta Lǝmwanda kǝ nǝhɗǝnhi."
21.16: Funǝ fafǝrkitsa Kaisariya ɗǝfkǝ kani, ɗǝkndǝ tǝ kani mbǝɗa Manason lenatani tǝrtahaya mbǝt'en, nifǝkǝn lǝ Sayifurustǝ nakǝn, nakǝn ǝrta a hur fafǝrkitti tǝrkakǝnyu. Bulus Ɗiɗǝ Urshelima
21.17: Kǝ ɓatani Urshelima, thlǝk fahchǝnanikani tǝ mbǝnfat kaǝn.
21.18: Wendambǝta pǝɗakani tǝ Bulus kǝ mbǝɗa Yakubu, pǝktecha fafǝrkit kanda mbǝnniyu.
21.19: Ɗiffitǝ nda ichakanda, ndǝkǝn mbwa'andǝna kandǝ ǝrtǝ ǝrtǝ ichi sǝt Fara a hur punofcha, tǝ mbǝɗa tori sǝt Bulus.
21.20: Kǝ sǝktǝndǝ kichu, mwanangndǝ Fara. Ndangnda Buluswa, "Neɗnǝwa hwanmanani, terǝ nofchǝ oi a hur Yahudawecha firndǝ kit, ufndǝ fa sǝrǝh kuwur kussa Musa naknda.
21.21: A mbwa'a fichǝ kushengwa kandǝ ndatwa, sokǝn lasakagnga Yahudawechihar uf fichile naka hur punofcha wa muhang ndǝ kussa Musa ɗi. Paɗ la ndakuwa mǝ heshafichǝ hwechengnandǝwa, paɗ mǝ kurindǝ tormurteng nandǝwa.
21.22: Nakmasǝtwa kǝniya chu? Kǝthlǝm nanda sǝk kushsheng ɓaɗeku.
21.23: I naksi su i ndutani kǝ sǝna. Nofchengnanisǝ fwaɗa, fichile ak ichimi.
21.24: Haru nofchiniyu kǝ ɗuni sapandǝ faɗengnuniɗi, kǝ kwanǝ i la kwantǝficha, kǝthlǝm kǝ hǝssang ndǝ kanda. Tǝ kichu nat ficha sǝndǝ tǝ ndatwa, i mbwa'andǝ ficha kanda nga kitchitsuwa, paɗ nakndanat nda sokǝn naka kuwur i mbutǝ kustǝkǝn.
21.25: Paɗ punofchi fǝrkǝkit, a thlinani ɗelwer tepi thlaɗanihi, mǝngǝmiɗunifa kǝ sǝmmuni i'thlandǝficha ɗǝhhachiwa, tǝ fǝllawichitta, tǝ chi i'ɓekrandǝfichǝ ɓurat'en, paɗ tǝ chi thlu tǝ fwar'en.
21.26: Ɓingǝtkǝn Bulus tǝrkǝn nofchǝkǝn, sapangfichǝ kandaɗǝ ufnda. Yimkǝnnda kapat hura'a Fara, kǝthlǝm kǝ sǝnaǝn farǝ nǝhata saptengnandaɗi, a fari nat ficha fǝr poffǝn kǝthlǝm chikawuni. A Kǝssafichǝ Bulus a Hur Kapat Hura'a Fara
21.27: Kǝ nat mundǝ muɗɗa yah nǝhata, Yahudawechi ɓaka hǝmǝt Asiya nakndǝ Bulus a kapat hura'a Fara. Ndǝkǝn chikandǝndǝ terǝ humkǝn ufnda, kǝssangnda.
21.28: Naknda hwata kannda ndatwa: "Nofcha Isra'ila, kǝssamnakanisi! Le nifiya lasakaǝn ɓǝɓi'ichaɗi kǝ ɗar nofchengnǝm chika ayi, kǝnambwa'anda chika wuni, kǝ njirndǝ kussa Yahundawecha. Lashuwungkǝn ɓǝɓi'icha ɗar kapat hura'a Fara, paɗ latǝkmaǝn kweshcha mbǝɗihi chiɗchiɗya tǝ mbǝɗa ɓattǝ punofcha hurkǝn.
21.29: Kǝthlǝm soh neɗ ndǝ Tarofimus lǝ Afisawata, kanda mbǝt ǝrta a hur hǝmta, tǝrkǝndǝwa Bulus yima kapat hura'a Fara tǝ ndi.
21.30: Chatkichuyu shekɗang in'ndǝ hǝmta, ɓaknofchǝ tǝ rahtǝ ufnda, kǝssang ndǝ Bulus kahkǝndǝnda kish, a hur kapat hura'a Fara, chatkichuyu ngǝllang fichǝ mikǝtǝncha.
21.31: Kanda ɗar yarǝ ɓǝllanda, saakǝ kushengkǝna mbǝɗa kapat lǝthlǝrhwata, ndatwa kim Urshelimahi tǝ thla hur in'nda.
21.32: Chatkichuyu harkǝn fathlǝrhwecha tǝ pǝktat fathlǝrhwecha Roma, rahkǝnda hai kǝ mbǝɗi nat ngomnofchǝkǝn. Paɗ kǝ natndǝ fathlǝrhwechǝkǝn tǝ kapat nanda malang ndǝ tǝp Bulus.
21.33: Ɓak kapatnandǝ nduk kǝssaǝn, ndakǝnwa kǝ kǝnnang ficha, tǝ chalalochǝ chap. Kanna sahtǝwa ndu wunnakǝn, tǝ i paɗ sǝttǝn.
21.34: Thlaakǝ terǝ nofchiyu naknda muh hanhara, ndakfunuwa kǝcha, nak funǝndatpaɗwa kǝcha. Kǝthlǝm yakat thlahur in'nda hullaɗa mbǝssandǝ ɗarshuwunkǝn, ndakǝnwa kǝ ɗafichǝ tǝnda hura'a fathlǝrhwecha.
21.35: Kǝ saatǝ Bulus kǝmi tǝrta, tǝrkǝ fathlǝrhwechǝkǝnndi kǝthlǝm thlahur'inda terǝ nofcha,
21.36: Yakat nofchǝ oi kuwurkǝkanda, kanda hwata tǝ ndatwa: "Ɓǝllamǝn!" Shuna Bulus Nofcha
21.37: Kǝ natndǝ nduk yimtǝ tǝ Bulus kǝ hura'a fathlǝrhwechǝkǝn, ndǝkǝn ndandǝna kapatnandǝwa: "Ni mbǝlla shunutǝwa?" Ngǝrkǝ kapatnandǝtǝkǝnsuwa: "Awi la mbǝrku Helenanciwa?
21.38: Awi nga sokǝn naka Lǝmasarawatwa, naka a hurechi mbǝrkǝhi humang thlahur'indǝyuwa, kahkǝ nofchǝ aru kumchit kum fwaɗa fa ɓǝlfata kǝ loktarǝyuwa?"
21.39: Ndǝkǝn ngǝmmandǝ Buluswa: "Ə, njang Lǝyahudawata naki a Tarsus, a hachahai Kilikiya. Njang ɓaki hǝmǝɗi sǝntǝficha, nja hwanuta malitǝn kǝ shunayi nofcha."
21.40: Kǝ fǝrandǝn mbanda, thlarkǝ Bulus kǝ mbǝt thlara, thla'anghara kǝmbǝɗa terǝ nofcha kǝthlǝm kǝ ngasndǝ ɓa. Kǝ ngastǝ ndǝ ɓa, shunaǝn kandǝ tǝ mi Aramayata, ndatwa:

22.1: "Hanmanchina tǝ shinchina sǝkamnji, kǝ mbwa'ayikuni isǝka kǝthlǝm kǝ cheɗayikuniwa suwuni'ǝnwa."
22.2: Kǝ sǝktǝndǝndǝ shunaɗǝkandǝ tǝ mi Ibraniyanci, ngaskǝndǝ ɓa. Ndǝkǝn ndatǝnwa:
22.3: "Njang lǝ Yahudawat naki, ngǝtkǝfichinja Tarsus, a hachahai Kilikiya. Nat tǝkichu mwanki hǝmmǝɗiya, paɗ sakikǝfichǝ changkathar tǝ mbǝɗa Gamaniel, le sakikǝ ichǝhar uf kǝ ɗar sakta kakechengnǝm. Lǝ sǝrǝhki kuwur Fara, nda i uffuni lǝ sutuni a ɓukweya.
22.4: Ɓahhaɗi fa kuwur mbanda Yǝso, paɗ lanaki ɓǝllandǝkanda, lanaki kǝnandǝ nofcha nda hishcha tǝ nishcha, la muhki kanda hur pursuna.
22.5: Kapat pǝrist tǝ pǝktat fasakmicha, tǝ fa hǝmmbanicha, na sheta kǝ ɗarna. Mbǝɗengnandǝ thlitti ɗelwer kǝ mbǝɗa fahchinǝm Yahudawecha, thlaaki pǝɗakǝ kǝ Dimaska, kǝ thlǝm kǝ hari fichile naka mbǝnniyu, kǝ ɓitǝkanda Urshelima a kǝnnda, ɓah nanda fǝraa pwane kanda. Bulus Mbwitǝ Tǝrtǝ'ennhi
22.6: "Nja ɗar pǝɗata, kǝ saati nduk tǝ Dimaska, kana hur fara sata, chatkichuyu ɓak ɗwachita afshi, finikǝn.
22.7: Hǝmkǝnhi kǝ hachahaya sǝkki ɓurata ɗitǝwa: 'Shawulu, Shawulu, i'mi natu fǝri pwancha?'
22.8: Njang paɗ ngǝmayiwa, sokǝn wuni, Lǝmwanda?' Ndǝkǝn ɗitǝnwa: "Njang Yǝso Lǝnazaratta, le natu fǝra pwancha.
22.9: Paɗ fichǝle naka thlǝmmatna, neɗɗi ɗwaachikkǝn, nattǝkichu sukundǝ ɓurata lenaka shundǝ tǝ njiuwa.
22.10: Ndakiwa, mǝnati sǝtta Lǝmwanda?" Ndǝkǝn ɗitǝ Lǝmwanduwa, thla'u kǝ yimna Dimaska, a mbǝnniyu nat ficha mbu'u i tahsandǝ fichǝhi kǝ sǝnna.
22.11: Kǝ hullandi nat mbǝta kǝthlǝm ɗwaachit hwaɗiyu, thlaakǝ fichile natani mbǝt ǝrtǝyu kǝskǝndǝ harengna, saaki kǝ Dimaska:
22.12: "Yunǝsi nat thlǝmkǝnwa Hananiya, la kuwur Farǝ nakǝn nda iyarandǝ kus hi, lela shunang Yahudawecha nat kǝ sǝkndǝndi fichile nak tǝ sokta mbǝnniyu.
22.13: Ɓakna mbǝsnji, thlarkǝn nduk tǝ nji ndikǝnwa: "Shawulu hwanya thlu natmbǝɗeku." Chatkichuyu naki nat mbǝta nakindi.
22.14: Ndakǝnwa: "Tǝɗ Fara kakechengnǝmsa kǝthlǝm kǝ sǝnnǝ sakti'en, kǝ nana lǝ kachita kǝ sǝknǝ shunda mi'en.
22.15: Kǝthlǝm kǝ sǝnna lǝ sheta'en kǝ mbǝɗa nofchǝ nat kǝ ɗar i'natu, tǝ'i'sǝktu.
22.16: Nakǝnya mǝnatu puta? thla'u, kǝ sukǝ fichǝ baptisma kǝthlǝm kǝ sapang fichǝ ɓǝɓifaɗekuɗi, tǝ mbǝɗa at thlǝmkǝn." Eɗ Farǝ Bulus kǝ Mbǝɗa Punofcha
22.17: "Kǝ ngǝrandi'ina Urshelima, naki hwanda a kapat hura'a Fara, ɓak ǝn nda sǝnnata mbǝsnji.
22.18: Naki Lǝmwanda, nangna nditǝwa: "Suleɗleɗ kǝ chenakisha Urshelima, kǝthlǝm ngunda thlǝt sheta e'ku kǝ ɗarnǝwa."
22.19: Njang paɗ ndakiwa: "Lǝmwanda, kandang tǝ inchengnanda a shinnda i sǝka kǝtǝn humta Yahudawechǝhi, a kǝnnaɗi fichile fǝrkǝkit kǝmbǝɗeku, paɗ a tǝppaɗi kanda.
22.20: Kǝ thlǝrandǝ fichǝ fwara Istifanusa ɗi, lǝ sheta ti e'kuyu, njang ma njang kitta mbǝnniyu, nja kuwur i sǝt ficha, nja pu njelecha fichilehar ɓǝlangyu."
22.21: Ndikǝnwa: "Thla'u puɗu, ni thlǝnsa langna kǝ mbǝɗa punofcha."
22.22: Terǝ nofchǝkǝn naknda kathlǝmata Bulus, ɓakna mbu shuniniyu, mǝlla ɗar mbu'ichiniyu, thla'ang ndǝ hwata kanda ndatwa: "Ɓǝllamǝn! Sakamǝn witǝ nifihiya tǝkishita, kamusi kǝ nan tǝ shisshingtǝwa!"
22.23: Naknda hwata nak nda muhandǝ ɗǝsupchengnandaɗi, naknda thla'andǝ tǝnnata,
22.24: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn Lǝmbanita fathlǝrhwata shuwunkǝn tǝ ndatwa, kǝ ɗa fichǝ tǝ Bulus kǝ mbǝɗi la soktǝ fathlǝrhwata, kǝthlǝm kǝ tǝpangnda kǝ sǝnndǝ isǝk nat nofcha hwanda kicheya.
22.25: Kǝ kǝnnandǝnda kǝthlǝm kǝ tǝppangnda, ndang Bulussa kapat lǝthlǝrhwatkǝnna Roma lenak kit nduktǝndi: "Awi, hur kus keekesi kǝ sangnǝ ǝn ndu kǝ tǝpang ficha nifi naka hanhura'a Romawecha nga tǝ sang fichǝ kitasǝwowa?"
22.26: Kǝ sǝktǝ kapat lǝthlǝrhwata Roma kichu, ɗǝkna mbǝs lǝmbanikǝn ndaǝnwa: "Mǝnatu yarǝsǝta? Nifiya hwan Roma nakǝn."
22.27: Ɓak kapat nanda mbǝs Bulus ndaǝnwa: "Mbu'i'tǝn kit, sokǝn hwan hachahai Roma wa?" Ndang Bulus, "Ə."
22.28: Ngǝmmang kapat lǝthlǝrhwatkǝnwa: "njang tǝ hanɗǝɓǝltǝ oi mbǝsti nata hwanhǝmta. Ndang Buluswa: "Njang ɗǝkǝn ngǝttǝfichǝ nji."
22.29: Fichile naka yarǝ tawasǝndi chatkichuyu mbahkǝndǝ ɗifi'in. Kapat lǝthlǝrhwatkǝn kǝsǝntǝnwa Bulus lǝ hwan hachahai Roma nakǝn lechǝkǝn, paɗ teppa kǝnnaɗa. Bulus Mbanitǝ fa Sakmicha
22.30: Kǝ wentǝ mbǝtta, ɓak kapat lǝthlǝrhwatakǝn yahkǝnsa sǝn kachit i sǝk ɓat Yahudawecha muhhanhar Bulus, ɓakna kwasandǝhi, mbukǝn tǝ kapat ɓurat ndatwa, i sǝka pǝrischa tǝ fasakmicha kǝ ngomndǝhi. Ɓakǝn tǝ Bulus kǝ thlarnka mbanitǝnanda.

23.1: Thlaakǝ Bulus nakna kǝlandǝ fa sakmichǝkǝn, ndakǝnwa: "Kunang hwanmanchina, kǝ ɓukweeya a hur hanɗǝkiketengna mwa'u ǝn'sǝ ngweɗechin ndu ǝnat thlahur'i'ndǝ kǝ ɗar naɗengnǝhi a mbanitǝ Farawa."
23.2: Kǝ sǝktǝndǝ kichu, thlaakǝ Hananiya kapat pǝrist, ndǝfkǝn fichile nak nduk tǝ Bulus, kǝ tǝpndǝnda mi.
23.3: Ndak Buluswa: "Sokǝn kohat nifa! Sokǝn thlari pa'andǝ fichi fur kurrata, sokǝn ma na Fara tǝpsa! Sokkuhi kǝnna si kitasi kǝ ɗar sakandaɗa Musa, a landǝfku kǝ tǝpfichi nji, i nguchik keeke a hur sakakǝnnaɗi."
23.4: Fichile nak kikit mbǝnniyu ndangnda Buluswa: ''Kapat Pǝristsa Farǝ natu era?''
23.5: Ndak Buluswa: "Hwanmanchina, a sǝnwiwa mǝllan naka kapat Pǝristwa. Kǝthlǝm a yeraɗficha a hur shunda Farǝ, ndatwa: "Mǝ erinǝ lǝhǝm mbanita nofchǝwa."
23.6: Kǝ sǝntǝ Buluswa, funǝ Sadukiyawecha funǝ paɗ Farisawecha, thla'a'ǝn ɓurata hur fasakmicha, ndakǝnwa: "Hwanmancha, njangma lǝ Farisiyawat naki, Hweya Farisiyawa. Andiya kǝthlǝm ɗifi inndǝ kǝ ɗar thlata mǝmatcha ndǝkǝn sǝk natuni sakimiya."
23.7: Kǝ mbuɗtǝn kichu, thlaakǝ halǝ'i'nda tinnda Farisiyawecha tǝ Sadukiyawecha, sakkǝ ngomnofchǝkǝnhi kurutkǝn chap.
23.8: Ndak Sadukiyawechuwa, thlata mǝmatchǝsuwa, mala'ikachisǝwa, ndu Shemeɗa. Farisiyawecha kandang ngǝmmandǝwa neesi nat mǝkkanwa.
23.9: Thlaakǝ kapat sheka'inda naknda shundǝ kǝ afshi, funǝ malndǝmchǝ fa sakandǝ kussa Musaɗi, Farisiyawecha thlarkǝndǝhi kit, naknda halǝ'innda, ndakndǝwa: "Kanang a mbǝssawani ɓǝɓi i'sǝt nifiyawa. Mbahya yunǝ Shemeɗa ndu mala'ika shunangnga."
23.10: Kǝ thlaatǝ halǝ'inkǝn kaǝn, lechik kapat lǝ thlǝrhwatkǝn kǝthlǝm mǝni nda thlǝthlahhandǝ Bulus hi. Fǝrkǝn mi tǝndatwa, fathlǝrhwatkǝn kǝ tǝrndahaya kǝ thlǝndǝ Bulussa ɗǝ tǝ alchita, kǝ ɓandǝ tǝndǝ kǝ mbǝt sokta fa thlǝrhwata.
23.11: Sǝk fiɗikta thlarkǝ Lǝmwandǝ nduk tǝ Bulus, ndakǝnwa: "Ɗu mban tǝ alchit hanɗǝkiketa, nda i fǝrtu sheta kǝ ɗarna a Urshelima, kichu paɗ kamkǝsi kǝ fǝrnǝ sheta ɗarna a Roma." Shiɗ Fichǝ Ɓǝɓi Sakta kǝ Ɓǝlang Fichǝ Bulus
23.12: Wendambǝta, Yahudawecha tahǝskǝndǝfa kǝthlǝm kǝ ɓallangndǝ Bulus. Akndǝ ichǝmi tǝ ndatwa, ngunda sǝmtǝwa ngunda satwa, se ma ɓǝllandǝ Bulus.
23.13: Fichile sǝk ɓǝɓi tahasinifiyu, pǝɗanda nifǝhi kumchit fwaɗa.
23.14: Ɗǝknda mbǝɗa pǝktat pǝristcha tǝ fa hǝmmbanita, ndakndǝwa: "A eɗɗani kapat ichimi tǝ ndatwa, ngani sǝm'ǝnwa ngani sat'ǝnwa sema ɓǝllaɗani Bulus.
23.15: Kǝthlǝm kichu, nakǝnya kunang tǝ fasakmicha, hwanamǝn kapat lǝ thlǝrhwatkǝn, kǝ ɓaǝn Bulussa kuni, nda tǝ yahunisi kǝ ngǝruni sahamihar kaǝn, kanang paɗ tehshanifa kǝ ɓǝllangngani kana sata."
23.16: Kǝ sǝktǝ hweya hwanman Bulus witǝ tahasifǝ nanda sita, ɗǝkna yimta mbǝt sokta fathlǝrhwatkǝn mbwa'angna Bulus.
23.17: Bulus akǝn yuna hur kapat fathlǝrhwata Roma, ndakǝnwa: "Ɗu tǝ hwankimshi'iya mbanitǝ kapat fathlǝrhwata, shundǝsǝ yahtǝnsa mbwa'anda."
23.18: Kapat lǝthlǝrhwatkǝna Roma tǝrkǝn hankimshikǝn, ɗǝkǝn tǝnda mbǝɗa kapatnanda. Kapat lǝthlǝrhwatkǝnna Roma, ndakǝnwa: "Bulus hwan pursunatiyu, aknji, hwanikǝnwa kǝ ɓitǝ hwankimshi'iya mbǝɗeku, kǝthlǝm ǝnsǝ natna mbu'uta."
23.19: Kapat lǝthlǝrhwatkǝn kǝskǝn hara kimshikǝn, kahkǝnda kǝlar, sahaǝn miya ɓuɓweeta: "Mǝnani yahtusa mbwi'itiyu?"
23.20: Ndang kimshikǝnwa: "Pǝktecha Yahudawecha tahsandǝhi, nanda hwanuta kǝ ɗangnǝ Bulussa kanda mbanitǝ fasakmichǝ ishki, nda yahkǝndǝ kǝ ngǝrndǝ tausandǝ shuwunkǝn'enhi kaǝn.
23.21: Paɗ mǝ ngǝmmana kandǝsǝwa, kǝthlǝm pǝɗaɗa nifǝhi kumchit fwaɗa kanda ɗuwetndi kanda kat kǝ ɓǝllangnda, paɗ tepa eɗndǝ i'chimi ndatwa, ngunda sǝmtǝwa ngunda satwa sema ɓǝllanda. Nakǝnya a tehishndǝfa, ngǝmteku ndak nannda puta."
23.22: Kahhang kapat Lǝthlǝrhwatkǝn thlǝmata hwankimshikǝn tǝ ndatwa: "Mǝ mbwa'ana yunuwa mbu'i'nǝ shuniyawa." Kalkǝndǝhi kǝ pǝɗan. Thlindǝ Bulus kǝ Mbǝɗa Ngomna Felis
23.23: Kapat lǝthlǝrhwatkǝn akǝn pǝktat fa thlǝrhwechǝkǝnna Roma chap, ndangnakandǝwa: "Tahsamfa ɗukuni Kaisariya, hwanthlikǝn hanherta i'fiɗikta tǝ fa thlǝrhwechǝ kumchitkum chap, tǝ kumchit muɗ fa pǝrpirishcha, tǝ fa thlǝrhwat kumchitkum chap fa mbat tǝ pela."
23.24: Kǝ kuni pirshihar le nat Bulussa pǝrtǝsi, kǝ ɗunitǝnda mbǝɗa Ngomna Felis ngwalngwal.
23.26: "Thlata Kalaudiyas Lisiyas, Kǝ mbǝɗa lǝ mwandǝ Ngomna Felis. Ndat ǝn oi.
23.27: Nifiya kǝsandǝ Yahudawecha, ndukndǝhi kǝ ɓǝllangnda, thlaaki leɗleɗ tǝ fathlǝrhwecha thlǝkindaɗi, kǝthlǝm a shikiwa mǝllan hwanhǝmǝt Roma nakǝn.
23.28: Yahkisǝ kǝ sǝki isǝtǝn nannda tǝramifa, ɗǝkitǝnda mbanitǝ fasakmichengnanda.
23.29: Ɓaki mbǝssandǝwa naknda tǝramifa kǝɗar shuwun sakandengna nda ɗaɗi, kǝthlǝm i'sǝtǝn saawa ɗǝffandafǝ kǝ kǝnangnda ndu kǝ ɓǝllangndǝwa.
23.30: Kǝ mbu'i'tǝfichiwa ɓǝɓi ǝnsǝ natficha yarandǝfa, chatkichuyu thlǝnukindi. Ndǝkǝn ndandǝ fichile muhkǝ hanharkǝnwa, kǝ ɗǝnda mbuta mbanituwa i'nat ndǝ sǝtǝn ndǝɗuwayu."
23.31: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn fa thlǝrhwatkǝn tǝrkǝndǝ Bulus, nda i mbwa'andǝ ficha kanda, ɗǝkndǝ tǝndi kǝ Antifatiris a fiɗikta.
23.32: Ɓingngitkǝn malkǝndǝ fa thlǝrhwatkǝn fichile la pǝr kǝ pirishcha kǝ ɗǝnda mbantǝndi, kandang paɗ ngǝrangndǝ'inna mbǝtsoktengnanda.
23.33: Kǝ ɓat fathlǝrhwatkǝn, fichile la pǝr kǝ pirihcha saakǝnnda Kaisariya, fǝrangndǝ ɗelwera ngomna, malkǝndǝ Bulushi a hurhar'en.
23.34: Kǝ changkandǝ ngomna ɗelwertǝkǝn, sahaǝn mi Bulus ndu ɓakna hǝmmǝt mi? sǝkǝnwa ɓakna Kilikiya,
23.35: ndakǝnwa: "Ni kathlǝmmata shundeku, a fari ɓatfichile muhkǝ hanharwa: "Ndǝkǝn fǝrtǝ ngomna shunda kǝ ngǝllangficha, a huri kuturichita Hiridus le tintǝn. Kǝ puufichindǝhar.

24.1: Ɗiffitǝ munndǝ ndurman kapat pǝrist Hananiya, ɓeɗ tǝ funǝ pǝktecha, Paɗ tǝ yunǝ lǝmbǝr shunda le nat thlǝmkǝnwa Tartulus. Kǝthlǝm kǝ muhndǝ hanhar Bulus a ɓanitǝ ngomna.
24.2: A yimang fichi Bulussi, Tǝrkaakǝ Tartulus muh hanhar Bulussa ɓanitǝ ngomna Felis, ndakǝnwa: "Nakǝn tǝ ɓǝɗa sǝndeku sandǝ fichi kachit nofchengnǝm, Paɗ kǝthlǝm lakǝllaku langnga, ndǝkǝn sǝk tahǝstǝ fichi ichi oi fichile sokka kachitta nofchengnǝm.
24.3: Nofchengnǝm chika ayi kanda su usoko nga sǝrtǝfuwa.
24.4: Paɗ kǝthlǝm mǝ sǝɓaɗi hanthlik chikǝn eku'ndǝwa, nja hwanuta hur kachiɗeku Kǝ kangnǝ thlǝmmata i nguɗǝh nattani ɓuta.
24.5: Mbǝssaɗani ndatwa nifiya lǝ ɓat tǝ thlahur'inda, lanakna ɓat tǝ thlahur'inda thlerǝ Yahudawecha, chika tǝteni a hur kishita, Paɗ mǝllan nalǝ mbanita i leki la atfichiwa Nazarawa.
24.6: Keɗ kǝ tǝkmaǝn kapat hura'a Fara ɗi, Paɗ a kǝssangngani.
24.7: Paɗ Lisiyas lǝ ɓanita, ɓakna thlǝtndaɗaɗi harengnani tǝ alchitta.
24.8: A ɗiftǝ fa muhhanhar nifiya kǝ ɓanda ɓanituwa. Ma usanǝ mihar sokǝn tǝ i'ndeku, nu mbǝlla sǝnda mbǝɗ'en nat ichi nattani muh hanharkǝn.
24.9: Yahudawecha kwiyirndǝ ɗiffitǝkǝn kichu. Ngǝmangndǝwa, nak ǝnnatkǝn kichu. Hǝrka Bulus Fat'enna Mbanitǝ Felis
24.10: Fǝrang ngomna mba shunda Bulus, ndǝkǝn ngǝmandǝ Bulus ndakǝnwa: "Ni hǝrkandǝ indengna tǝ chiɗchiɗchit hanɗǝkiketa, kǝthlǝm shiniwa shiɗnǝ hurechǝ oi, sassa kiita nofchiya.
24.11: Ma tausanǝhi nu mbǝssandǝ wa, mbǝrawa munndǝhi kumngǝrǝnsǝchapwa, Kǝ pǝɗati Urshelima ka hwanda.
24.12: Fa muh hanharnǝtiya tamunda mbǝssitǝ nja halǝ'i'ndǝ tǝ nifǝwa, ndu nja thla'andǝ hur'i'nda nofcha kapat hura'a Fara ndu a mbǝt humta Yahudawecha, ndu a hur hǝmǝtkǝn.
24.13: Ichi nat'nda mbuta ɗar i'ndengnǝ nakǝnya ngunda mbǝlla fǝru sǝndǝwa.
24.14: Ən ǝrtǝ ngǝmandi, ndǝkǝn naka nja kuwur Fara kakechengnǝm tǝ mbanda nofchi la kuwurkǝ Yǝso, la atfichiwa Nazarawa, lǝnaki fǝrkitta ɗar ichi uf yarandǝ fichihi nda i lasakandǝ Musaɗi paɗ tǝ laulawecha Tapǝnecha.
24.15: Nja ɗǝf hanɗǝkiketa mbǝɗa Fara, nda i nat fichileya sǝta, ndatwa, naficha thla'andǝ mǝmatcha, fa kafata tǝ fa ɓah kafat nat.
24.16: Ndǝkǝn sǝk pware lanati kweetǝhi a hanɗǝkiketengna, kǝ soki nga kweeɗechinna mbanitǝ Farǝ tǝ nofchǝwa.
24.17: Paɗ ɗiffitǝ hanhurechǝ nguɗeh, ɓakiɗi kǝ Urshelima kǝthlǝm kǝ fǝripoffǝn kǝ mbǝɗa nofchengnǝm, paɗ tǝ thlǝr icha.
24.18: Nja hur sǝt kichu, mbǝssikǝnda shepiɗi a hur kapat hura'a Fara, nga tǝ ngomnofchǝwa, ndu thla hur'i'ndǝwa.
24.19: Funǝ Yahudawechǝsi a hachahai Asiya fichile naka mbǝnniyu, kandang kamkǝsi kǝ ɓanda mbanituwa ka muh hanharna, ma shundengnandǝsi kǝ faɗengna.
24.20: Mangakichuwa malamǝn nofchiya kǝ mbundǝ i mbǝssitǝndǝsi a fari thlartihi mbanitǝ fa sakmicha.
24.21: Manga kǝ ɗar i'ǝrtǝ mbwa'andi kish tǝ alchita fari thlartihi mbanitǝnandǝ ndatwa: "Lenaka ɗar thlaata mǝmatcha, sǝk nati mbanitǝnuni ɓukweya." Kuɓla Fichi Bulus a Kaisariya
24.22: Felis paɗ nakǝn tǝ sakǝt sinnda kǝ ɗar mbanda Yǝso, thlaraǝn kandǝhi, ndakǝnwa: "Sema ɓeɗ Lisiyas lǝmbanitǝ kwaɗǝn kani thlandǝ kiita engnunihi.
24.23: Ndǝkǝn fǝrtǝ Felis shundǝ kǝ mbǝɗa kapat lǝthlǝrhwata Roma, kǝnna pu Bulus har, Paɗ kǝ fǝraɗǝ pwene oi wa, kǝ njaɗa shikechǝkǝn kǝ ɓanda mbǝɗ'enwa, ndu kǝ kǝssangndǝsuwa.
24.24: Ɗiffitǝ hanmunchikǝn ɓaknda Felis tǝ nuhkǝn Durusila, lǝ Yahudawata, a thlǝnkǝn kǝ ɓa fichi tǝ Bulus, a kaǝn thlǝmmata kǝ ɗar shuwun kitchita Yǝso Kǝrǝsti.
24.25: Tǝrkaakǝ Bulussa fǝr sakǝtkǝn kǝ ɗar kitchitta, tǝ pǝɗa yah ǝnat alchitta fat hi, tǝ farǝ ɓahhi naka ɓatyu. Sǝkkǝn kichu kǝsang lechit Felis, ndangna Buluswa: "Nakǝnya ngǝran'in. Ma mbisshi mbanda ni atsa."
24.26: Mǝlla ɗǝf hanɗǝkiketǝsuwa na Bulussa fǝraa hanɗǝɓǝlta, ndǝkǝn sǝknat Felissa nata atndǝ noknok kǝna shundǝ tǝndi.
24.27: Paɗ a ɗiffitǝ hurat chap, sǝk Fokiyus Festus kǝ ngomna kǝ kwar Felis. kǝthlǝm Felis mǝlla kat chiɗchiɗachita fwara mbanitǝ Yahudawecha, ndǝkǝn sǝk maltǝn Bulussa pursuna.

25.1: Ɗiffiti munndǝ mǝkkan, saakǝ Festus kǝthlǝm kǝ kǝssǝn tor ngomnachita, thlaakǝna Kaisariya pǝɗakna Urshelima.
25.2: Pǝktat Pǝristcha tǝ fa hǝmmbanita Yahudawecha, ɗǝknda muh hanhar Bulussa mbǝɗ'en.
25.3: Hwanangnda, kǝ ngǝrang fichi Bulus kǝ Urshelima, kǝthlǝm a tahsandǝhi wa nanda ɓǝllanda mbanda.
25.4: Ngǝmang Festus ndakǝnwa: Ndif fichi Bulus hi a Kaisariya, njang tǝ i'ndengna nja tǝrtǝhurwa ni ɗǝtta mbǝnniyu hanmunchiya.
25.5: Ɗǝkǝn ndatǝn paɗwa kǝthlǝm kichu, pǝktechengnuni kǝ ɓandǝ tǝnji, ma nifiya ǝnsǝ sǝttǝn nga keekewa, Kǝ ɓanda muh hanharkǝn.
25.6: Mbǝrawa mundǝhi foɗfoɗǝ ndu kum a mbǝɗengnandǝwa, ndǝkǝn ngǝrandǝn'ina Kaisariya. Ɓingngitkǝn sokǝnna mbǝt soktǝ'en i'kiita, thlǝnkǝn kǝ ɓa fichi tǝ Bulussa mbanitǝkǝn.
25.7: Kǝ ɓat Bulus, Yahudawechi ɓaka Urshelima thlaakǝnda taurangndǝhi, naknda ɓattǝ muh hanharengnandǝ oi kǝɗarkǝn, naknda cheka fǝra pwanchǝ kaǝn, ichi mbutǝnda ngunda mbǝla mbu kakatitǝkǝnwa.
25.8: Paɗ Bulus hǝrkaǝn fat'en ndakǝnwa: "Njang sawi ɓǝɓi'ǝn sakta Yahudawechuwa, tǝ paɗ sawi ɓǝɓi'ǝn kapat hura'a Farǝwa, paɗ sawi ɓǝɓi'ǝn Kaisarwa chika nguɗehwa.
25.9: Yahkǝ Festussa tǝraandǝ hanɗǝkiketa Yahudawechǝhi, sahaǝn mi Buluswa: "Ndunu ngǝmtǝfa kǝ ɗǝna Urshelima kǝ sukǝ fichi kiitasa mbanitǝna kǝ ɗar ichiniyu.
25.10: Ndak Bulus wa: "Njang kitta mbanitǝ kiita Kaisar, a mbǝɗya kamkǝsi kǝ sikǝ fichi kiitasi. Sawi ɓǝɓi'ǝn Yahudawechiwa, sokǝnma shinnǝ kichu kaǝn.
25.11: Ma njang la sǝk i kamuchiksi, paɗ mashiɗi ɓǝɓi'i saaka kǝ ɓǝllikǝ ficha, ngi cherifa kǝ ɓǝllikǝ fichǝwa. Paɗ manga kitchitsǝ kǝ ɗar muhhanhari nat nda muhta ɗarnǝwa, Paɗ nga nifǝsi na mbǝlla fǝrnja mbǝndengnandǝwa. Nja hwanda kǝ thla'ang fichi muh hanharengna mbanitǝ Kaisar.
25.12: Ɗiffitǝ yarandǝ icha nda Festus hi tǝ fa sakmichi'en, ngǝmkǝn ndakǝnwa: "Makichu hwanu kǝ thla'ang fichǝ hanhareku kǝ mbǝnitǝ Kaisar paɗ natu pǝɗata." Bulus a Mbanitǝ Agiriffa tǝ Banis
25.13: Ɗiffitǝ hanmunchǝ ɗimek, Agiriffa kutura tǝ Banis ɓaknda Kaisariya kǝthlǝm kǝ sangndǝ marapa Festus.
25.14: Nakǝn nanda sǝt hanmunchǝ oi a mbǝnniyu, ndǝkǝn ɓat Festus tǝ shuwun Bulus kǝ mbǝɗa kutura. Festus ndakǝnwa: "Nifǝsi malitǝ Felis hi a pursuna.
25.15: Thlahmbǝɗi nati a Urshelima pǝktat Pǝrischa tǝ fa mbanicha Yahudawecha ɓikǝndǝ muh hanhar nifiya, hwanikǝnnda kǝ thlang fichi kiitasi.
25.16: Paɗ ndayi kandǝwa, kanang Romawecha sǝnwanihi tǝ sa kiita le sǝk ɓǝɓi'ǝnwa, sema ɓeɗndǝtǝndi kǝ mbǝɗa fa muh hanharkǝn hwanitǝ tǝ hwanita, paɗ sema fǝraa fichi mbanda kǝthlǝm kǝ hǝrkaǝn i'ndi'en kǝ ɗar muh hanhari sǝt ficha.
25.17: Kǝthlǝm kichu, ɓak nda mbǝɗya rǝmmǝ tǝ ndi, a sǝɓawi hanthlikǝnnaɗǝwa, ɓingnetkǝn sokki mbǝt soksakmiya, ɗǝfki ke ɓafichǝ tǝ nifǝkǝn.
25.18: Kǝ thlaatǝ fa muh hanharkǝn, ɓundǝ tǝ muh hanharkǝn kǝ ɗar ɓǝɓi i nati yarǝ kǝ ɗarkǝnwa.
25.19: Nakǝn shuwunchengnandǝsi le fǝruchit ndǝ kitsi kǝ ɗar Bulus, kǝ ɗar tǝr mbandengnanda, tǝ yunǝ wa Yǝso le mǝrka, Paɗ le thlartǝ Bulus tǝ alchitwa mǝllan tǝ shisshingtafa.
25.20: Njang paɗ mbahki i nati tausandǝ ichihiya, sahayi Bulus ndu nan ngǝmtǝfa kǝ ɗǝka Urshelima kǝsang fichǝ kiitasi kǝ ɗar ichiniyu.
25.21: Paɗ kak Bulus kǝthlarang fichǝ shundǝ'enhi, Kaisar kapat kutura kǝ thlaǝn kiita enhi, fǝrkǝn shunda kǝnna ficha pundǝhar kǝ fari nati thlǝnnda kǝ ndang ficha Kaisar.
25.22: Agiriffa kutura ndangna Festus wa: "Njang ma ni ɓata kathlǝmmata nifiya tǝ i'ndengna." Festus ndakǝnwa: "Nu sǝkndǝ ishki.
25.23: Wendambǝta Agiriffa tǝ Banis yimkǝndǝsi tǝ mwanda witǝ i kuturcha, ɓak ndǝ tǝ pǝktat fa mbecha tǝ pǝktecha hǝmǝtkǝn. Fǝrkǝ Festus shundǝ tǝndatwa kǝ yimang fichǝ Bulus kǝ kǝttǝn sakmiya.
25.24: Ndǝkǝn ndat Festuswa: "Agiriffa kutura, nattǝ nofchi natǝm tǝ kandǝ rǝmma, a nifi ɓitǝ nofcha Yahudawechǝ hanharkǝn kǝ Urshelima, tǝ mbǝɗya paɗ, Kanda hwattǝ ndatwa Kammusǝ kǝ malfichi ndi tǝ shissingtǝwa.
25.25: Paɗ njang nuwi i sǝttǝn le saaka i ɓǝllandǝwa. Nakǝn paɗ mǝllan tǝ i'ndi'en keɗ tǝ ndatwa kǝ ngǝrang fichi kita'enna mbanitǝ lǝ mwandǝ Kaisar, ndakiwa ni thlindǝ tǝndǝ mbǝɗ'en.
25.26: Paɗ nga kakati tǝ shundǝsi nati yaranda kutura Roma lǝ mwandǝsǝwa. Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn ɓaki tǝ ndi kǝ mbanitǝnuni, kapatkǝnna mbanitǝwa sokǝn Agiriffa kutura, kǝthlǝm ɗiffitǝ usamihar ndu ni mbǝs i nati yarata ɗarkǝn.
25.27: Kǝthlǝm njang a na ndengna, mbomchita kǝ thlǝn fichi hwan pursuna, nga tǝ cheɗ fichi ɓǝɓi ichi sǝtǝnwa."

26.1: Ndang Agiriffa Bulus wa: "Fǝrrufichi mbanda ke hǝrkangnǝ i'ndeku." Thla'ang Bulus hara, tǝrkaakǝn shunda ndakǝnwa,
26.2: A shiɗi sa'a, naki hǝrkandǝ i'ndengnǝ ɓukweya a mbanitǝ Agiriffa kutura kǝ yakat shuwunchi mbutǝ Yahudawechǝ kǝ ɗarna.
26.3: Sokkǝn lǝ mbǝrtǝ naku sǝn ǝ'nat sǝtta Yahudawecha tǝ ichi lanatnda halǝ'i'nda ɗarkǝn. kǝthlǝm kichu nja hwanuta kǝ kikǝnnǝ thlǝmmata tǝ kǝrǝsta.
26.4: Nat Yahudawecha shinndǝ witǝ soki sokti njang kǝ hwankimsha'a, thlata tǝrkakǝnna hǝmtengna paɗ tǝ Urshelima taakǝ ɓukweeya.
26.5: Shinndǝ nji kǝ soh, paɗ ma yehndǝsi nanda mbǝlla fǝr sheta ndatwa, naki hur humihi sherkǝ tǝ kuwur kus a hur tǝr mbandengnǝm, sokki kǝlǝ Farisiyawata.
26.6: Nakǝnya njang kitta mbanitǝnuni kǝthlǝm kǝ sikǝ fichi kiitasi kǝthlǝm ɗiffi hanɗkiketengna kǝ ɗar nǝhhata ɗǝf shuni fǝrandǝ Fara kakechinǝm.
26.7: Ɗǝfshuwunkǝn naka kachitnǝm kumngǝrǝnsǝ chap ɗǝfkǝndǝsi mbah nanda nat nǝhatǝ'en, paɗ nak nda kǝn hursi tǝ kuwur Fara nda fiɗiktǝ tǝ fara. Sokǝn kutura, kǝthlǝm ɗiffi hanɗǝkiketa ɗar nǝhata ɗǝfshuniniyu, sǝk nat Yahudawecha tǝrimifa!
26.8: Mǝ sǝka a naɗengnuni ɓahwanatwa na Fara thla'andǝ mǝmatchǝwa?
26.9: Njang tǝ i'ndengnǝ soh kǝllayi nda keeke kǝ si ichǝ oi, kǝnji shunda Yǝso lǝ Nazaratta kǝ ɗǝka mban.
26.10: I sǝti hacha a Urshelima, a mbishi alchita mbǝɗa pǝktat pǝrist cha, kǝthlǝm kǝ kuɓlayi fa tǝr mbandǝ oi kǝ pursuna. Tǝ Paɗ fari nat ficha ɓǝlandǝ kanda nja kuwur ɗiffitǝnanda.
26.11: Lafǝrayi pwancha kanda mbǝt humta Yahudawechihi lǝɗǝfki kandǝ kǝ shuwunndǝ ɓǝɓishundǝ kǝ ɗar thlǝm Yǝso. Kǝthlǝm lanaki kǝs komlǝ tǝ kandǝ kaǝn, lǝ naki kuwur kandǝ kǝ funǝ hǝmchǝ somsomǝn kǝni sa pwanchǝ kanda. Bulus Mbu'tǝ Kusheng Tǝɓǝtǝ'enhi
26.12: Ficha hur sǝtkichu, farǝle nja pǝɗata Dimaska, tǝ yahta pǝktat pǝristcha tǝ yarat ɗelwerti fǝritǝnda.
26.13: A hur hwatfara mbanda, Sokǝn kutura kǝ nanǝhi, neɗi ɗwachita le sherangnga ɗwachita hwatfara, finkǝnna afshi taurikǝnhi njang tǝ shikechi witengna.
26.14: Uffani hǝmkanihi hachahaya, Sǝkki ɓurata nditǝ tǝ mi Ibraniyanci, 'Shawulu, 'Shawulu, Kǝthlǝmmi natu fǝri pwancha? Nanna fǝra pwene i'ndeku tǝ sǝt atikrechit tǝ nji.'
26.15: Ndakiwa, 'Wunnaku Lǝmwanda? "Ndikǝ Lǝmwandǝwa, 'Njang Yǝso le natu fǝrapwancha.
26.16: Paɗ thla'u kǝ thlarnǝhi kit. Cheɗki fandengna mbǝɗeku kǝ ɗǝffisa kǝllasi tora, paɗ kǝ fǝrnǝ sheta kǝ ichi natu kǝ ɗarna, paɗ tǝ ichi nati cheɗutǝ kǝ mban.
26.17: Ni hǝrkuta mbǝnda nofcheku tǝ punochǝ paɗ. Ni thlinsa mbǝɗa punofchǝkǝn,
26.18: Kǝthlǝm kǝ i'nangnǝ hwanichengnaɗǝhi, Kǝ tǝɓǝrndǝhi a hulta kǝ ɗwachitta, paɗ tǝ thlata alchita sheɗan kǝ alchita Fara, tǝ kichu nannda mbǝskaɓiɗi ɗar ɓǝɓichitfecha, tǝ mbǝs'ǝnhar nat tǝ fichile sokkǝ chiɗchiɗ kǝthlǝm a firndǝ kit kǝ mbǝɗengna.
26.19: Kǝthlǝm kichu, sokǝn Agiriffa kutura, a cherwi kǝ fǝrayi mwanda ǝnnda sǝnnatǝwa ɓaka haiya afshi kǝ mbǝɗengna.
26.20: Tǝrkaaki ɓasanda nofchisa Dimaska, kani sanda nofchǝsa Urshelima chika ayi a thlet hǝmmǝt Yahudawecha, sayi punofchǝsǝ paɗ, ndatwa kǝ tǝrɗǝhi kǝ tǝmǝrɗǝhi kǝ mbǝɗa Fara, kǝ sǝndǝ ichi nachetǝwa tirɗǝhi.
26.21: Ndǝkǝn sǝk kǝssitǝ Yahudawecha a kapat hura'a Fara, naknda kat kǝ ɓǝllikǝnnda.
26.22: Paɗ kǝssikǝ Farǝsi kǝ nakǝnya, ndǝkǝn nati mbǝɗya kǝni fǝr sheta kǝ ɓǝɗa pǝktecha tǝ hwecha. Nga ǝnsomǝn nati mbutuwa, se i nat Tapǝnnecha tǝ Musa ndatndǝwa nan sǝta,
26.23: Keekesi Kǝrǝsti kǝ san pwane, kǝ sokka tǝrka thlata mǝmatcha, Kǝthlǝm kǝ ɓan tǝ ɗwachitta mbaɗa nofcha, Yahudawecha tǝ punofchǝ nat."
26.24: Bulussa ɗar hǝrkandǝ fat'en Festus thlaǝn ɓurat tǝ alchita ndakǝnwa: "Bulus, luwurchǝ naka tǝrutǝwa! Yakat changngandeku tǝb'raɗǝ i'ndekuhi!"
26.25: Ndak Bulus paɗwa: "Festus lǝmwanda, nga luwurchǝtǝrikǝwa. Kit nati mbuta a hur i'nda.
26.26: Paɗ kutura shintǝ ichi natya, lǝ naki shunandǝ lechitfǝwa. A shinisǝwa kileesa ichini natyu, kǝthlǝm nga ɓuɓweetǝ sǝt fichiwa.
26.27: Agiriffa kutura, a firnǝ kit tǝ Tapǝnnecha? A shiniwa firnǝ kit."
26.28: Ndang Agiriffa Bulus wa: "A hur hanthlikchi ɗimekya yahtusa lǝmnji kǝsi Kǝrǝsta?"
26.29: Bulus paɗ ndakǝnwa: "Chika hanthlikchǝ ɗimek, ndu njang ndu nga njangwa nja hwandǝ tǝ ndatwa kǝɗǝf Fara mǝniɗa sokǝn ɗengwa, nat tǝ fichile naka sǝknji ɓukweya, kǝnandǝ nda i'nati, nga nat tǝ chalalotiyawa."
26.30: Thlaakǝ kutura, kichu paɗ ngomna tǝ Banis tǝ fichile natndǝ ɗǝndassa mbǝt ǝrta.
26.31: Cheknda kishsha mbǝt kiita ndangnda ndaniwa: "Nifiya sutǝ i'kamkǝsi kǝkuɓlang fichǝwa, ndu kǝ ɓǝlang fichǝwa."
26.32: Ndang Agiriffa Festus wa: "Ma nga i'nakǝn nifiya thla'a ɗǝ muh hanhar'enna ɓanitǝ Kaisar wa, ma kǝ kalfichǝndǝhi."

27.1: Kǝ tahsandǝ fichi kanihi hur kommbawal kǝ thlaani kǝ thlet hǝmmǝt Italiya, Ndekǝn fǝrtǝɗǝ Bulus tǝ funǝ hwanchǝ pursunacha a hara kapat lǝthlǝrhwata Roma le nat thlǝmkǝnwa Yuliyus, ǝrta hurfa thlǝrhwatkǝna Kaisar Augustus.
27.2: Yimkani kommbawal tǝ le i Adiramitiyum, le tahǝskǝ thlaata kǝ thlet hǝmchi naka kǝllarǝ Asiya, Tǝrkaakani wita. Aristarkus lǝ Tasalonikata i hachahai Makidoniya, mǝllan tǝkǝm.
27.3: Ɓingǝtkǝn kana Sidon. Yuliyus chendaǝn kafata Bulus, kǝ ɗǝka nat shikechikǝn, kǝ kǝssangndǝsi.
27.4: Thlaakani mbǝɗya hur kommbawal nak rǝnna'a ɓahhandǝ kani. Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn ɗǝkani tǝ ɗiffitǝ tingring Sayifurus mbǝɗi nguchit rǝnnaa tǝ alchitsi.
27.5: Ɗiffitǝ cheɗǝngnanikishsha hawurkǝn le nak nduk tǝ hachahai Kilikiya tǝ Famfiliya, Saakani Mira hachahai Likiya.
27.6: A mbǝnniyu kapat lǝ thlǝrhwata Romawecha mbǝskǝn kommbawalla Alekzandariya lǝ ɗǝta hachahai Italiya, Sikǝnkani hurkǝn.
27.7: Sǝkani mundǝ tǝ muncha kweekani nata witǝ hǝɓakka, tǝ kweetǝ saatani nduk kǝ hǝmǝt Kinidus. Kǝ njandǝ rǝna'a kani ɗǝta mban, Kuwurkani tǝ kǝllar tǝ mbǝɗi nguchit rǝnnasi, tǝ ɗiffitǝ tingring Kirit nduk tǝ Salmoni.
27.8: Nakani kwee mbǝrandǝhi, kǝ mbǝɗi lǝ atfichiwa Kwescha mbǝt thlara kammbawalcha, nduk tǝ hǝmǝt Lasiya.
27.9: Nakǝn sǝɓafichi hanthlikchaɗi oi, wikǝn paɗ sokkǝn tǝ mboro, kǝthlǝm a hanthlikchiniyu shiɗ hurat langnga har kǝ farǝ kǝr kwisshimta i farǝ ɓǝɓichitfata mbirhi. Tiɗɗang Bulus thlǝmmechengnanda.
27.10: Ndangna kandǝwa: "Shisshingchengnuni kǝ sǝn tolla, Kǝllaɗi wiiya nannat tǝ mboro paɗ tǝ kuɓat ichi oi, nga kuɓat icha kommbawal ndengwa nat tǝ Shisshingchengnǝm."
27.11: Kapat lǝthǝrhwatkǝn ngǝmaǝn tǝ i mbutǝ Buluswa, Kǝthlǝm kichu kan thlǝmata shunda lǝ koharǝ kommbawaltǝkǝn paɗ tǝlǝ kommbawal tǝkǝn.
27.12: Nakǝn mbǝt ngomta kommbawalcha Lasiya su keeke kǝ sok kommbawalchi fekta mbǝɗyawa, nakǝn yakat funengnani ngǝmkǝndǝfa kǝ ɗaficha mban tǝ wita, Paɗ kǝ kweefichihi kǝ saa ficha Finiks manan sǝtta, kǝthlǝm kǝ sokɗǝ fekta mbǝnniyu. Finiks mbǝt humta kommbawalchihi a chicheng Kirit le naka kǝllaɗǝ kukuwun hishingta tǝ mbǝt hǝmfara, paɗ tǝ kukuwun harsǝmta tǝ mbǝt hǝmfara. Kapat Rǝnna'a Hawurta
27.13: Tǝrkaakǝ rǝnnaa thlata tǝ kukkuwun harsǝmtǝ ngunngundeh, saǝn nofchifiyuwa nanda mbǝlla sǝt i naka handǝkikechengnanda, kahangndǝ tǝppasiɗǝ kǝskǝ kommbawal tǝkǝn har, kuwurkǝndǝ tǝ chicheng Kirit, nduk tǝ mi hawurta.
27.14: Su tolluwa ɓak kapat rǝnna'a tǝ kukuwun harsǝmta tǝ mbǝt chet fara, thlaakǝ rǝnnǝkǝna tingringta.
27.15: Kǝtǝptǝ rǝnnikǝn kommbawaltǝkǝn, hulangna kǝllaɗǝ rǝnnikǝn, ndǝkǝn malandani nak rǝnnikǝna pǝkkani.
27.16: Kuwurkani tǝ ɗiffitǝ hantingringta le nat thlǝmkǝnwa Kauda, mbǝɗi tahtǝ alchita rǝnnahi, kweekani kahhandǝ kommbawal tǝkǝn ka ɗǝfta mi chichengta.
27.17: Ɗiffitǝ kahhandǝ hwan kommbawal tǝkǝn kǝ hur kapat kommbawaltǝkǝn, ɗathlkǝnda kǝnang ndǝhi kǝffa kapat kommbawaltǝkǝn kǝthlǝm mǝninda fǝffathlaɗi. Tǝrangndǝ kuwurta kommbawaltǝkǝnna haya mbah na rǝnna'a njek nda kǝllar kǝthlǝm mbǝlla'undǝ koharǝkǝnwa, sǝkndǝ kichu kǝthlǝm kanda lechita mǝniɗa muh kanda hansohhi Sirtis lela mǝhɗang ichi uf.
27.18: Kǝthlǝm rǝnnikǝna ɓahandǝkandǝ kaǝn, ɓingǝtkǝn tǝrkaakǝndǝ harandǝ ichihaya hur kommbawaltǝkǝn, somkǝnnda hur ama.
27.19: A farǝ mǝkkatǝkǝn kandang tǝ harchengnanda sommangndǝ ǝnat tor kommbawalchikǝnnaɗi.
27.20: Kǝ sǝtani munchǝ oi nuwani farǝ tǝ hanndǝrechuwa, paɗ kapat ɗǝf er tǝ rǝnna'a nakna tǝppandakani, kǝtangani hanɗǝkiketakish tǝ ndatwa ngani hǝrǝktǝwa.
27.21: Nakǝn mwinndǝhi sǝmunɗǝ ɗǝsǝmtǝwa, thlaakǝ Bulus kit a hurnanda, ndakǝnwa: "Nofcha, mamashikuni shundengna, tǝndatwa mǝ thla'iɗuni a tingring Kiritwa, ma hǝmwuni hur mboro tǝ kuɓat'ichiyawa.
27.22: Nakǝnya nja kahhandǝ thlemaɗengnuni sam alchit fata, kǝthlǝm nga yunǝsǝ nasǝt mboro tǝ shisshingtǝ'ena hurnuniwa, kommbawaltǝkǝn natficha sǝt mboro tǝkǝn ndak.
27.23: Kǝthlǝm a fiɗiki ɓǝraayu mala'ika Fara le nati kǝ'ikǝn nati mwananda, thlarkǝn nduk tǝ nji,
27.24: ndakǝnwa: "Buluswa, mǝlechinuwa. Sokǝn waat kǝthlarna mbanitǝ kaisar. Andiya paɗ tǝmbǝnda kafata Fara nan hǝrkandǝ shikechǝ witeku."
27.25: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn sam alchitafa kunang nofcha, kǝthlǝm firikit kǝ mbǝnda Farǝ tǝndatwa i'mbwi'itǝfichǝyu, nakna nat kichu.
27.26: Sokkǝn waat kǝ muhang rǝnnaa kǝmmaɗi kǝ ɗar hansohi tingring le."
27.27: A fiɗik kumgǝrǝnsǝ fwaɗa tǝkǝn, nak nda njekkani a hawur Meditereniya. A ɗarfiɗikta fa koharǝ kummbawaltǝkǝn tǝrkǝndǝwa nakani nduk tǝ hachahaya.
27.28: Kikeɗangndǝ hwengngǝchitta amkǝn, mbǝssangndǝ a shee ishtǝ sarǝ aru tǝ kumchitchap. Ɗǝkkani mban kuɗeh ngǝrkǝnda kikeɗanda, mbǝskǝndǝ ishtǝ sarǝ kumchit hanherta.
27.29: Kǝthlǝm rahlechita mǝɗi kommbawal egnani kuk ngwichǝwa, kalkǝndǝ ǝnnat thlarandǝ kommbawaltǝkǝn hi fichile nak lǝklǝk fwaɗa, tǝ ɗǝffitǝ kommbawaltǝkǝn kǝthlǝm kǝ njaǝnwita. Hwankǝndǝ Fara kǝthlǝm kǝ wenmbǝt leɗleɗ.
27.30: Paɗ fa koharǝ kommbawaltǝkǝn kakndǝ mba hǝrǝkta. Tǝrangndǝ hwan kummbawaltǝkǝnna haya naknda sǝt ɗathla nda nanda tǝrandǝ tǝppasi hai lǝklǝkyu kǝ mbanitǝ kapat kommbawaltǝkǝn.
27.31: Ndǝkǝn ndandǝ Bulussa kapat lǝthlǝrhwatkǝna Roma tǝ fathlǝrhwechǝkǝnwa: "Ma thlaru nofchihiya hur kommbawaltiyawa, nga mbandǝsǝ natuni hǝrǝktǝwa."
27.32: Thlithlang fa thlǝrhwatkǝn sahǝt hwan kommbawal tǝkǝnaɗi kalkǝndǝhi kǝ pǝɗaka ɗar ama.
27.33: Kǝ nat mbǝt nduk wenda, hwanang Bulus kandǝwa kǝ sǝmndǝ ɗǝsǝmta ndakǝnwa: "Ɓukweya mundǝ kumngǝrǝnsǝ fwaɗa kuna puta, sǝmwuni ǝnwa.
27.34: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn nja hwanandǝkuni kǝ sǝmmuni ɗǝsǝmta kǝthlem ngwalngwalchit faɗengnuni paɗ yunǝsa hurnuni na mɓah hwasǝ'en chika ǝrtǝwa."
27.35: Kǝ mbutǝn kichu, tǝrkǝn njohma saǝn usoko Fara a mbanitǝnanda chichaǝnhi tǝrkaakǝn chiita.
27.37: Uffani hur kommbawaltǝkǝn nakani nifǝ aru kumkum chap tǝ kumchit muɗ ngǝrǝnsǝ tehethl (276).
27.38: Kǝ sǝmtǝnda ngelnda, tahhandǝ lǝkta kommbawaltǝkǝnhi, naknda som alkama hur ama. Fǝfathla Rahhaa Kommbawalaɗi
27.39: Kǝ wentǝmbǝta, fa koharǝ kommbawaltǝkǝn mbǝsaundǝ furuɗi nanndǝwa, mbǝtsi nguɗuk tǝ hansohitǝsi. Tahaskǝndǝfa kǝ ɗǝndǝ tǝ kommbawaltǝkǝnna ɗar hansohikǝn manansǝta.
27.40: Thlithlang ndǝ sahǝt tǝppaskǝnaɗǝ malkǝnda hur ama. Chatkichu paɗyu nangnda kwasandǝ sahchǝkǝnhi a fa i latǝprang kommbawaltǝkǝnhi. Thla'angndǝ kuwurchi naka kommbawaltǝkǝn keeke tǝ mbayi natrǝnnaa njekanda mban ɗǝffanndǝ innda kǝlarǝ hawurkǝn.
27.41: Kǝ saatani mbǝtkǝmta ama, tǝpkǝ kommbawaltǝkǝn hansohita yimkǝ'innda kommbawaltǝkǝna hur hansohikǝn mbǝlla'utǝ hǝhǝrtǝfuwa. Tǝrkaakǝ kommbawaltǝkǝn fǝfathlǝɗi tǝ ɗiffi kǝthlǝm rahha'a. Fǝfethl Kommbawallaɗi
27.42: Tahǝskǝ fathlǝrhwatkǝnfa kǝthlǝm kǝ ɓǝllangndǝ pursunechǝkǝn, mǝni yuneng nanda kun'ngoftǝ kǝ hǝrkǝn.
27.43: Nakǝn kapat lǝthlǝrhwatkǝnna Roma yehsa hǝrkandǝ Bulus, njangnakanda. Fǝrkǝn shundǝ tǝ alchita ndatwa: "Nat fichile mbǝrkǝ ama kǝ pǝparnda hurkǝn kǝ chang ndǝ kǝ mi chicheng le."
27.44: Tahhǝt pursunachǝkǝn kǝ tǝrnda ɗar chichet afchǝkǝn ndu hur chichet kommbawaltǝkǝn. Tǝkichu chetndakish kǝ mi chichengkǝn ngwalngwal.

28.1: Ɗiffitǝ hǝrǝktengnani, sǝkaniwa, awi thlǝm tingringǝyuwa Malta.
28.2: Nofchi mbǝnniyu cheɗangdǝkafata kani kaǝn. Thlǝkndǝ kani natani, njihangndǝ hwatakani kǝthlǝm ersi paɗ mbitǝsi.
28.3: Ngomkǝ Bulus afcha nakna sǝtta hwaɗiyu, chek hwithlnda kissha hur hwaɗiyu lenat yethaftǝ'en thlerthler, njo'aǝn hara Bulus.
28.4: Kǝ nat nofchi naka mbǝnniyu hwithlinkǝnna hǝhhǝrtǝfa hara Bulus wangarra, ndangnda ndaniwa: "Kitchitkǝn nifiya lǝɓǝlfatanakǝn! Andiya, chikanakǝn hirikka hurhawurta, nattǝkichu alhaki enna kuwurndi nan mǝrta.
28.5: Bulus paɗ saktaǝn har'en muhaǝn hwithinkǝnna hur hwata, mbǝsutǝ ndinditwa.
28.6: Naǝn kandǝhiwa nan hǝthlta ndu kǝ hǝmǝnhi chat kǝ mǝrrǝn, sǝkndǝ tolla nunda saǝnwa, ngǝrkǝndǝ yarǝtǝ ndatwa mǝllan witǝ farǝ mǝ nakǝn.
28.7: A mbǝɗǝ ndukya mbichisi i lǝ mbani tingringkǝn lǝ at fichiwa, Fubiliyus. Mǝllan thlǝk kani, fǝraǝn mbǝt munda kani ndiichin, kǝllakndǝsa kani, i'mundǝ mǝkkan.
28.8: Shin Fubiliyus nduk tǝ hafat kakǝnnda tǝ i ɗǝlǝhta. Yimkǝ Bulussa thlǝmatken hwanaǝnsi, ɗǝffaǝn hara in, kǝnkǝ nifǝkǝnaɗi.
28.9: Paɗ kǝ sǝkǝn kichu, nat tahǝt haacha fichile naka thlet tingringǝniyu naknda ɓata nak ficha kǝnandǝ kandaɗi.
28.10: Fǝrangndǝ poffǝna kani oi. Nakani thlata kommbawal tǝkǝn, ngomangndǝ icha kani lenatani yahta. Shee Bulus kǝ Hǝmǝt Roma
28.11: Ɗiffitǝ ndǝraa mǝkkan, thlaakani a tingring Malta hur kommbawal Alekzandiriya le tumbang fekta tingringkǝn. Tahsa fichi mirshing mǝhɗat hwanmanchisi nda farǝcha.
28.13: A mbǝɗya paɗ pǝɗakani kǝ Rikiyum. Ɗiffitǝ mundǝ ǝrta, thlaakǝ rǝnnǝ kukuwun harsǝmta, Wendambǝt paɗ saakani Futiyoli.
28.14: A mbǝnniyu kǝmkani tǝ hwanmancha fa fǝrkit, hwanangndǝ kani kǝ sani mundǝ muɗ tǝ kanda. Tǝ kichu saatani Roma.
28.15: Kǝ sǝktǝ fa tǝrmbanda Roma kusengnani, ɓaknda sa marapa kani a lumo Affiyus, tǝ paɗ mbǝndi la ndat fichiwa mbǝt tǝrtahai Mǝkkan. Nak Bulus kanda saǝn usoko Fara, ngǝrkǝn mbǝs alchitafa.
28.16: Kǝ yimtani Roma ngǝmang ficha Bulus si kǝɗa sokta a huri haiya rǝmmǝ tǝ lǝ thlǝrwhaɗi naka pundǝhar. Ɓasa Bulus a Roma
28.17: Ɗiffitǝ mundǝ mǝkkan, Bulus akǝn pǝktat Yahudawecha ngomkǝndǝhi ndǝkǝn ndandǝna kandǝwa: "Kunang hwanmancha, chika nakǝn sawi ɓǝɓi'ǝn nofchengnǝmwa, ndu ɓǝɓi'ǝn i tǝrmbanda kakechengnǝm, nat tǝ kichu a kǝssi ficha a Urshelima fǝrkǝfichi nji kǝ Roma kǝkǝnnikǝnda.
28.18: Kandang paɗ kǝ usitǝndǝmihar, Yahkǝndǝsi kǝ kalndǝ njihi, kǝthlǝm mbǝsiwundǝ tǝ ɓǝɓi'ǝn le saaka ɓǝllitǝwa.
28.19: Paɗ cherkǝ Yahudawechi ngǝmtǝfa, ɓakna soktǝ waat kǝ tǝrayi muh hanharengna mbanitǝ Kaisar, chikanakǝn ngatǝni muh hanhar nofchengnǝmwa.
28.20: Ndǝkǝn sǝk kati kǝ nikuni, paɗ kǝ yaraam ichihi tǝ kuni, kǝthlǝm le ndǝftǝ Isra'ilawechǝ hanndǝkiketa natnda pu'ɓat'en sǝk kǝnitificha tǝ chalalocha."
28.21: Ndǝkǝn ndaɗǝɗǝwa: "Kanang mbǝswani yarat ndelwer a thlet hǝmǝt Yahudiya kǝ ɗarwuwa, nga yunǝ hwanmananisi ɓak tǝ kushengwuwa ndu kǝ mbu'un ɓǝɓi shunda ɗarwuwa.
28.22: Paɗ yahkanisi kǝ sǝkani yareku amiyeku, kǝthlǝm i sǝntani, yuwa humǝhi i lekiyu chikawuni mǝla shuwun ɓǝɓi icha ɗarkǝn.
28.23: Ɗǝfkǝndǝ fari natnda humtǝhi tǝ Bulus, ndǝkǝn ɓatnda mbǝt tǝrtǝ'enahaya, ɓakndǝ kaǝn. Thlata ɓingta kǝ farǝhufta mǝlla mwa'anda kanda tǝ sǝna kuturichita Fara kandǝsi, nakna kweetǝhi kǝ kahǝn kanda ɓǝɗa Yǝso tǝ mba sakanda Musaɗi tǝ ɗelwercha Tapǝnecha.
28.24: Funa ngǝmmangndǝ i mbutǝn, funa paɗ cherkǝndǝ fǝrkitsi.
28.25: Kǝthlǝm kichu halǝ'indǝsa thlerǝnanda. Naknda malǝ mbǝnnihiyu shunang Bulus kandǝ ǝrta ndatwa: "Awi Shemeɗ Chiɗchiɗ mbwitǝ kit, Shunandǝn kakechinuni tǝ miya tapǝnaa Ishaya ndatwa:
28.26: "Ɗu mbǝnda nofchiya, kǝ ndangna kandǝwa, Sǝkta, nuni nata sǝkta, Paɗ nguni sǝndǝwa, Nat paɗ nuninatanata, nguni mbǝssandǝwa.
28.27: Kǝthlǝm hanndǝkiketa nofchiya shiɗ kwaakwaa, resh thlǝmechengnandaɗi, ngǝlangndǝ hwanichengnanda, kǝthlǝm mǝ nindǝ tǝ hwanichengnandǝwa kǝ sǝkndǝ paɗ tǝ thlǝmechengnanda, kǝ mbǝsangndǝ tǝ hanɗǝkikechengnanda, kǝ tǝɓǝrndǝhi mbǝɗengna kǝ kǝnayi kanda ɗi.
28.28: Paɗ, kǝ sǝnuniwa, Fara a thlintǝ kuseng hǝrǝkta kǝ mbǝnda punofcha. Kandang paɗ nanda kat thlǝmatsi.
28.29: Kǝ mbukǝn kichu, thlaakǝ Yahudawecha mbǝnniyu tǝ halǝ'indǝ kaǝn a hurɗiffitǝnanda.
28.30: Bulus sokǝna huriini natna kwandǝyu hurat chap mǝlla thlǝt fichile ɓaka mbǝɗ'en.
28.31: Nakǝn njawundǝ ɓasǝwa, nakna ɓasǝ kuturichita Fara, nakna sakandaɗi kǝ ɗar Lǝmwandǝ Yǝso Kǝrǝsti nga lechitsuwa.

1.1: Yarat ɗelwertiya ɓakna mbǝɗengna njang Bulus, at Fara tǝ ngǝmtǝ'en kǝ naka lǝthlǝnda Yǝso Kǝrǝsti. Paɗ yaraki ɗelwertiya tǝ hwanmanǝm Sastanis.
1.2: Nakani yarat ɗelwertiya kǝ ɓǝɗa fa tǝrmbanda Fara hur Korinti, tǝ mbǝɗa fichile taɗtǝ fichihar a hur Yǝso Kǝrǝsti, atfichǝ kandǝ kǝnandǝ chiɗchiɗ, nat tǝ fichile chika ayi la ak thlǝm Lǝmwaɗengnǝm Yǝso kǝrǝsti, Lǝmwaɗengnanda tǝ inǝm:
1.3: Kafata tǝ yuyurchita mbǝɗa Shinnǝm Fara tǝ Lǝmwaɗengnǝm, Yǝso Kǝrǝsti kǝ mbǝɗengnuni. Sǝt Usoko
1.4: Kǝnding la naki sandǝ Farǝ usoko kǝthlǝm kunang, kǝthlǝm kafaɗi Farǝ fǝrandǝna kuni tǝ mbǝɗa Kǝrǝsti Yǝso.
1.5: Chika tǝ mba yeni fǝraɗǝ hurmichita kuni a fat'en, hur shuwunchengnuni tǝ sǝn'ǝn paɗ nat,
1.6: kǝthlǝm ɓeɗ ficha mbǝsandǝ sheta engnani kǝ ɗar Kǝrǝsti a hurnuni.
1.7: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn ɓahwuni chika witǝ fǝr shemeɗ muwa, nda i natuni ɗǝf hwanita ɓata Lǝmwaɗengnǝm Yǝso Kǝrǝsti;
1.8: Le na kǝskunihar tǝ alchita kǝ mweshitkǝn, kǝthlǝm kǝ sokuni nga fa chithansarǝhiwa a farǝ ɓata Lǝmwaɗengnǝm Yǝso Kǝrǝsti.
1.9: Fara, lǝ nǝhɗandǝ ɗǝfshundǝhi mǝlan ak kuni kǝnuni ɓweet tǝ hwe'en Yǝso Kǝrǝsti Lǝmwandengnǝm. Sakchǝhi a Hur fa Tǝrmbanda
1.10: Hwanaɗi kuni, hwanmancha, a hur thlǝm Lǝmwaɗengnǝm Yǝso Kǝrǝsti ndatwa: "Natuni kǝ ngǝmuni tǝ ndani mǝni saktǝhi sa hurnuniwa, kǝ humangnguni inda kǝna yarengnuni ǝrta, hanndǝkikechengnuni paɗ ǝrta."
1.11: Hwanmanchina mbu'i nofchi hura'a Kuluwi yu, ndatwa mbatsa thlerǝnuni.
1.12: I nati yarǝ ndatwa, chika wuna hurnuni mǝla mbu ǝn somǝn, ndatwa: "Njang i Bulus, "Yuna ndatwa, "Njang i Afolos, "Yunǝ paɗwa, "Njang i Kefas, "Yunǝwa" Njang i Kǝrǝsti."
1.13: Awi a shek Kǝrǝsti hiwa? Ndu Bulus kukwandǝfichihi kǝthlǝm kunang? Ndu sang fichi baptisma kuni hur thlǝm Bulus?
1.14: Saɗi Farǝ usoko sawi baptisma yuna hurnuniwa, nda Kirisbus tǝ Gayus ndak sandi kanda,
1.15: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn yunǝsǝ na ndatwa sangfichi baptisma hur Thlǝmnǝwa.
1.16: Kit a saɗi baptisma nofchi hura'a Istifanus. Ɗifitǝ ndǝkǝn kuɗukwi ndu saɗi baptisma yunǝ paɗwa.
1.17: Thlǝnu Kǝrǝsti njiwa kǝ si baptisma wa, paɗ kǝ ɓassi laulawata nga tǝ mbǝr sǝn'ǝna nifǝwa, kǝthlǝm mǝ sǝɓa fichi alchit palita Kǝrǝsti ɗǝwa. Kǝrǝsti Alchita Fara tǝ Sǝn'ǝn'en
1.18: Pathla palita ɓomchita mbǝɗa fichile naka mba thlǝrǝttaɗi, paɗ kǝ mbǝɗengnani kanang ti hǝrǝkka alchita Fara.
1.19: Kǝthlǝm yara fichǝhi ndatwa: "Ni wuwelandǝ sǝn'ǝna lǝ sǝnda ɗi, kǝ sayi ɗathla lǝ ɗathlaɗi kǝ'ǝn pofǝn."
1.20: A ai fa ɗathla? A ai fa sǝn'icha? A ai fa halǝ'inda kisshi'iya? A chawu Fara kishwa ɗathla kisshi'iya ɓomchitwowa?
1.21: Sokkǝn a hur ɗathla Fara, sǝnu kisshitǝ Farǝ tǝ mbanda ɗathlǝ'enwa, mbǝnangna Farǝ fa kǝ hǝrkaǝn fichile fǝrkǝkit, tǝ mbǝɗa ɓomchit ɓassǝ laulawatkǝn.
1.22: Keɗ Yahudawechǝ kǝ nandǝ sakǝtkǝn, Helenawecha naknda kat ɗathla,
1.23: kanang kana ɓassǝ Kǝrǝsti kukwandǝ fichǝhi, i sokka ǝnat chithansarǝhi mbǝɗa Yahudawecha, ɓomchit paɗɗaa mbǝɗa punofcha,
1.24: A nakǝn mbǝɗa fichile at Fara, ndu Yahudawecha ndu Helenawecha nat hwaa, Kǝrǝsti alchita Fara tǝ ɗathla Fara.
1.25: Kǝthlǝm i tǝrtǝ fichǝwa shiɗ Farǝ ɓomchita, sheraɗa ɗathla nifa, paɗ ɓah alchita Fara, sheraɗa alchita nifa.
1.26: Hwanmancha yaramǝn naɗengnunihi fari at fichi kuni. Nga terchǝnuni nak tǝ sǝn'ǝn witǝ i nifǝwa; nga terchin nak tǝ mwandǝwa, paɗ nga terchin ngǝttǝ fichǝ nda kuturchǝwa.
1.27: Farǝ taɗkǝn i har naka ɓomchita kish, kǝthlǝm kǝ harangfat fa ɗathla, taɗkǝ Farǝ i nak ɓukɓukka hur kisshita kǝ harangfat fa alchita.
1.28: Taɗkǝ Farǝ ǝnat kuɓanda fata tǝ i njirtǝ kisshita nat tǝ ichi nguchǝksi kǝthlǝm i la nat nofcha tǝrtǝwa ndiichin kǝ saǝn nga'ǝnwa.
1.29: Nat ichiniyu, sǝkǝn kǝthlǝm mǝ tǝri nifǝ tǝ hwasa'inwa ǝn nakǝn a mbanitǝ Farǝ wa.
1.30: Farǝ sǝka natuni hur Yǝso Kǝrǝsti, le sokka ɗathlengnǝmma mbǝɗa Fara, mǝllan sokka fǝrkit engnǝm, chiɗchiɗchita tǝ hǝrǝktengnǝm.
1.31: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn nda i natna hur yaratkǝn: "Chikawun na thla'a'ndǝ inda kǝ thla'angka hur Lǝmwanda."

2.1: Hwanmancha, ma ɓeɗi mbǝɗengnuni, ɓuwi kǝthlǝm kǝ mbwa'aikuni i naka ɓuɓweeta Fara, tǝ mbǝr shunda ndu tǝ sǝn'ǝnwa.
2.2: Kǝthlǝm tepi tirihur yahwisa sǝn'ǝn somǝn naki tǝ kuniwa, Yǝso Kǝrǝsti ndak, le kukwandǝfichǝhi.
2.3: Ɓaki mbǝɗengnuni hur ɓah alchita tǝ lechita, paɗ tǝ saktatfǝ kaǝn.
2.4: Lǝmfatsi ndu ɗathla hur shuɗengnǝ tǝ ɓassengnǝwa, tǝ cheɗndǝ alchita Shemeɗa,
2.5: Kǝthlǝm fǝrkitchiɗengnuni mǝniɗa ɗar sǝn'ǝna nofchǝwa, kǝ naka ɗar alchita Fara. Sǝn'ǝna Mbǝɗa Shemeɗa
2.6: Chika tǝ kichu, la shuwunkani sǝn'ǝna kǝ mbǝɗa fichile mwanka hur fǝrkit, nga sǝn'ǝna kisshi'i nakǝnya ndu i kuturchi nakǝnya, fichile naka thlǝrǝttaɗǝwa.
2.7: La nakani shuwun sǝn'ǝna Fara hur ɓuɓweetǝ yu, le naka hur ɓuɓweetǝ soh, sǝn'ǝni fǝrtǝ Farǝ soh kǝ tǝrka nathi kǝthlǝm mwaɗengnǝm.
2.8: Hur kuturchi nakǝnya ngusǝ mbǝsang sǝn'ǝniyawa, mamuwa mbǝsanda, ma kukwawundǝ Lǝmwandǝ le nak mwanchinwa.
2.9: Nda i nat yaratkǝna hur laulawatkǝn: "I tahsandǝ Fara fichilesǝ la mbǝnkǝfatkǝn, tamu hwanita natwa, thlǝmatsǝ tamka sǝktǝwa, hanndǝkiketa nifǝsǝ tamka yarandǝhiwa."
2.10: Kanang cheɗandǝ Fara kani tǝ mbǝɗa Shemeɗ'en. Shemeɗ la kaǝn chikamǝnat, chikamǝ naka hwengngǝchit icha Fara.
2.11: Wuna hurnofcha sǝnkǝ yara nifa, manga Shemeɗi nifǝkǝn ti naka fi'enwa? Kichu paɗ nifǝsǝ sǝnkǝ yara Farǝ wa Shemeɗa Farǝ ndak.
2.12: Thluwani shemeɗa kisshitǝwa, Shemeɗi ɓaka mbǝɗa Fara thlǝtani, kǝthlǝm kǝ sǝnani ichi fǝrandǝ Fara kani pofǝn.
2.13: La mbwa'angani ichiya kuni, nga tǝ shuwunchǝ le sakandǝ fichaɗi tǝ mbǝɗa sǝn'ǝna nifǝwa tǝ shuwunchi sakandǝ fichaɗi tǝ Shemeɗa, tǝ mbu i naka kitchita shemeɗa a hur shunda Shemeɗa.
2.14: Nifi nguchit Shemeɗa fi'en thlutǝ ichi ɓaka mbǝɗa Shemeɗa Farǝ wa, kǝthlǝm nakǝn kǝ ɓomchita mbǝɗ'en, paɗ ngu mbǝlla sǝn kandǝwa, kǝthlǝm tǝ mbǝɗa Shemeɗ la sǝntǝfichǝ kanda.
2.15: Nifi nat Shemeɗsa fi'en la sǝnkǝ ichǝ nat, mǝllan tǝ indi'en nifǝsǝ na kikeɗandǝwa.
2.16: "Wun sǝnkǝ yara Lǝmwanda har natna sakandǝhar?" Kanang yarengnani i Kǝrǝsti.

3.1: Hwanmancha, ngi mbǝlla mbwa'a' ǝna kuni nda nofchi naktǝ shemeɗa fǝwa, nda nofchi naka kisshita, paɗ nda hangwa'yarcha hur tǝrmbanda Kǝrǝsti.
3.2: Yah fǝrandǝ kuni nga ɗǝsǝmtǝ kwaakwaawa, kǝthlǝm sǝkwunisa sǝm'ǝn kwaakwaa kwaɗǝnwa. Chika nakǝnya sǝkwunisǝwa,
3.3: Kǝthlǝm paaya mwakuni hur fata. Makuna sǝrǝh ndani paɗ thlangǝtmisa thlerǝnuni, nga mwakuni hur fatwowa? Ɗǝsǝchengnuni nga nda tǝ fatwa?
3.4: Kǝthlǝm ma ndeɗ yunǝwa, "Njang i Bulus", "Ndak yunǝwa", "Njang i Afolos", Nga tor fat natuni sǝtyuwa?
3.5: Wun naka Afolos? Wun naka Bulus? Nga mafechǝwa fichile fǝrtuni kit tǝ mbǝɗengnanda, nda i fǝrandǝ Lǝmwanda tora chikawun engnanda?
3.6: Njang hǝfkǝ hanwǝtǝkǝn, thlǝrkǝ Afolos amsǝ, paɗ Farǝ mwanangnga.
3.7: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn, lǝ hǝfkǝn tǝ le thlǝrkǝ amsi nga naknda mi ǝnwa, Farǝ ndak mǝllanti la mwanangnga.
3.8: Lǝ hǝfkǝn tǝ lǝ thlǝr amkǝnsi nakndǝ ǝrta, chika wuna hurnanda nakficha kwanandǝ keeke tǝ tor'en.
3.9: Kǝthlǝm kanang shikechǝ fa torcha Fara, kunang hita Fara, tinda Fara.
3.10: Tǝ mbǝɗa kafaɗi fǝritǝ Fara, a ɗǝfi thlorǝ tindǝhi kǝ lǝ mbǝr tinda, ɓakyuna nata chekandǝ tinkǝn kǝ ɗarkǝn. Chikawuni kǝ sǝn hǝɓaakǝ tǝ witǝ tindǝ'en.
3.11: Kǝthlǝm nifǝsǝ na ɗǝf thlorǝ tinda kǝ pǝɗangka le hi ɗǝftǝ fichǝhiwa, le naka Yǝso Kǝrǝsti.
3.12: Nakǝnya ma tin yunǝ kǝ ɗar thlorǝ tinkǝn tǝ zinariya, ndu tǝ azurfa, ndu tǝ ngwichǝ ɗiichin, ndu tǝ afcha, ndu tǝ hwelaa, ndu tǝ kofcha,
3.13: na tora chikawuna chetakish, kǝthlǝm fariniyu nan chetakissha ɗwaachitkǝn. Nak tora chikawuna chetakish tǝ hwata, hwatkǝn na kikeɗandǝ tora chikawuni.
3.14: Ma tini sǝtficha kǝ ɗar thlorǝ tinkǝn hiriki iwaɗǝwa, le tinka nan thlǝt kǝnikǝn.
3.15: Ma iɗ torkǝna ɗi, le tinka nan sat ɓahta, mǝllan tǝ indǝ'en nan hǝrǝkta nda nifi kuwurkǝ tǝ hur hwata.
3.16: Awi sǝnwuniwa kunang tǝ inchengnuni naka kapat hura'a Farǝwa, paɗ nak Shemeɗa Farǝ tǝ sokta a hur hanndǝkikechengnuniwowa?
3.17: Chikawun sǝɓang kapat hura'a Fara ɗi, na Fara sǝɓandaɗi; kǝthlǝm kapat hura'a Fara la nakǝn chiɗchiɗ, kunang naka kapat hura'a Farǝkǝn.
3.18: Mǝ lǝmiɗuni inchengnuniwa. Ma yunǝsa hurnuni la yarkǝwa ɗathlchin a hur kisshi'i nakǝnya, kǝ saǝn fat'en nda ɓoma, kǝthlǝm kǝ sǝka lǝ ɗathla.
3.19: Ɗathla kisshi'iya ɓomchita mbǝɗa Fara. Nda i natna hur yarat laulawatkǝn: "La kǝsaǝn fichile nak ɗathlchin a hur ɗathlengnanda."
3.20: Tǝpaɗ: "A shin Lǝmwandǝwa yara fa ɗathlǝ nga ǝnwa."
3.21: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn mǝ hupa nifǝ hǝsǝr tǝ nifǝwa. Kǝthlǝm chikamǝ nat innuni,
3.22: ndu Bulus, ndu Afolos, ndu Kefas, ndu kisshita, ndu shisshingta, ndu mǝrtaɗi, ndu ichi nakǝnya, ndu ichi naka mban, nat innuni.
3.23: Kunang paɗ i Kǝrǝsti, Kǝrǝsti paɗ i Fara.

4.1: Tǝkichu kemsi kǝ tǝruni kaniwa mafecha Kǝrǝsti, tǝ fichile ngǝmandǝ fichǝ kǝnandǝ tǝ ichi Farǝ naka ɓuɓweeta.
4.2: Sokkǝn waat nifi malandǝ fichǝ ichahar kemsi kǝ mbǝsang fichǝ tǝ kitchita fa.
4.3: A mbǝɗengna, hanhwan'ǝna kǝ nda fichǝwa kunang na sakimiya ndu mbǝt sakmiya chikawun nifa. Kitchitkǝn, njang mangi sakamiya faɗengniwa.
4.4: A shini hur indengniwa naki yalfar, chika kichu ngu soktǝwa chiwi hansarǝhiwa. Lǝmwandǝ na kikeɗita.
4.5: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn mǝ thlaɗuni sakmihi kǝ ɗar yunǝ pofǝn sa'u hanmunchikǝn kwaɗǝnwa; pwa'ama kǝ farǝ nat Lǝmwanda ɓata. Mǝllan na chandǝ ichi kissha ɓuɓweeta kǝ ɗwachitkǝn, kǝ cheɗin yara hanɗǝkikecha. A farǝniyu chikawun nan thlǝt hamtǝ'ena mbǝɗa Fara.
4.6: Nakǝnya hwanmanchina, fǝrki sakǝt ichi natya kǝ faɗengnǝ tǝ Afolos kǝthlǝm kunang, kǝ sakuni ǝn tǝ mbǝɗengnani kǝ ɗar shuni ndatfichǝwa: "Mǝ mbǝraɗuni ihi yarandǝ fichihi hur laulawatkǝnwa." Mǝ thla'a yunǝ inda hurnuni kǝ mbǝrangka lehi kǝ ɗar yunǝwa.
4.7: Wun sukǝ somǝnhi tǝ tahhǝt nofcha, mǝnakseku le thluchitu? Sokkǝnma tǝ thlǝna, mǝsǝk natu thla'a'ndǝ inda nda nga tǝ thlǝnǝwa?
4.8: Tepi mbǝshuni nat ichi yahtuni! Tepi shokuni kǝ hurrumcha! Tepi shokuni kuturcha nga tǝ kanangwa! Mayahtengna kǝ sokuni ka kǝ kuturcha, kǝthlǝm kanang ma kǝ sokani kuturichitkǝn tǝ kuni.
4.9: A naɗengna cheɗ Fara a ɗwachitkǝnwa, kanang fathlǝncha njirandǝ fichǝ kaniɗi kǝ ndukwatkǝn chika mi, nda nofchi thlandǝ fichǝ sakmi mǝrtaɗa kandǝsi, sangfichi kani kǝ ǝnat nata kisshita, tǝ mala'ika cha nat tǝ nofcha.
4.10: Shokani kǝ ɓomcha Kǝrǝsti, kunang nakuni kǝ fa ɗathla hur Kǝrǝsti! Kanang fa kuɓanda fata, kunang nakuni kwaakwaa. Ficha natkuni tǝ kapatichita fa, kanang nga ǝnnakaniwa.
4.11: Paa kǝ nakǝnya, nakani hur mita tǝ kusshimta, thlǝthlah njelecha naka fechengnani, ficha tǝpanda kani paɗ hurechengnanisǝwa.
4.12: La sani tor kaǝn tǝ harchengnani. Ma erndǝ kani, ndǝfangani mbǝs'ǝnhara kanda; ma fǝrandǝ pwancha kani, kǝrǝskani.
4.13: Ma sǝɓandǝ thlǝmchǝnaniɗi, la shunangani kandǝ tǝ kachita. Paaya sokkani nda chirǝfta kisshita, i nat chikawuna wuɗekta.
4.14: Nga yaraki iya kǝthlǝm kǝ harangfat kuniwa, kǝ tahsayi kuni nda hwanchi yahti.
4.15: Chikama sokkǝn fasakchengnunisǝ aru kumchitkum (10,000) a hur Kǝrǝsti, shinchǝnunisǝ terchinwa, kǝthlǝm njang naka shinnuni a hur Yǝso Kǝrǝsti tǝ mbǝɗa laulawata.
4.16: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn nja hwanandǝ kuni kǝ sakuni nji.
4.17: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn nja thlǝna Timoti kuni, hwe'engna le la mbǝntifatkǝn, le nak tǝ kachita a hur Lǝmwanda. Nan kuɗkanda kuni tǝ mbanda naɗengnǝhi a hur Yǝso Kǝrǝsti, nda i soktǝn keeke tǝ i sakandi ɗaɗi chika ayi hur chika yen mbǝt tǝrmbanda.
4.18: Funa thla'a'ndǝ inda nda ngi ɓata mbǝɗengnuniwa
4.19: Ma ngǝma Lǝmwanda ni ɓata mbǝɗengnuni chetchetya, kani tausandǝ alchiɗi mbǝstǝ fa thla'a'ndǝ iniyu kish tǝ shuwunchengnanda.
4.20: Kǝthlǝm kuturichita Fara nga pathla shundǝwa pathla alchita.
4.21: Mǝ yahtunisi? Kǝ ɓi mbǝɗengnuni tǝ kuɓwerǝwa, ndu hur mbǝnfata paɗ tǝ ngwallǝchit shemeɗa?

5.1: Shikiwa fǝlawichitsa hurnuni, witǝ le tamuchit ficha sǝta chika hur fa sǝt tor ɗǝhhacha, yuna sok fǝlawichit tǝ nuh shinkǝn.
5.2: Nakuni thla'a'ndǝ inda! Nga kwesh sǝtuni sǝɓhurwa? Chikawun sǝk iniyu kǝ chang ficha kissha hurnuni.
5.3: Chika sokkǝn njangsǝ tǝ iɗengna mbǝnniyuwa, njang tǝ kuni hur hanɗǝkiketa. Tepi sakaɗi miya nifi sǝk witǝ iniyu, nda njangsa mbǝnniyu.
5.4: Ma hwimunihi a hur thlǝm Lǝmwandǝ Yǝso njang tǝ kuni mbǝnniyu hur hanɗǝkiketa, paɗ alchita Lǝmwaɗengnǝm Yǝso mbǝnniyu,
5.5: witǝ nifiniyu kǝ fǝranguni Sheɗan kǝthlǝm kǝ ɓǝllang ficha hur fata, mbah na shemeɗ'ena hǝrǝkta farǝ ɓata Lǝmwandǝ Yǝso.
5.6: Thla'a'ndǝ inchengnuni ndǝɗuwa. Sǝnwuniwa, mehndǝ nguɗehkicha la huppang humbat tahasǝ njohmǝ wowa?
5.7: Pa'amǝn ɗohhǝt mehniɗiyu fechengnuni, kǝ sokuni kǝ yuwa ɗokyeta le nguchit mehndǝsa fi'en, kǝthlǝm kittǝkǝn nakuni kichu. Kǝthlǝm teppa thlafichi ɓurat hwan shohraɗengnǝm i chohhǝm tala, mǝlan naka Kǝrǝsti.
5.8: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn kǝsam chohhǝmtengnǝmhar nga tǝ ɗohhǝt mehndǝwa, mehǝn sǝɓfata tǝ ɓǝɓifata. Kǝla sǝm chohhǝmtengnǝm tǝ njohmi nguchit mehndǝsi, ndǝkǝn naka njohǝm kachita tǝ kitchita.
5.9: Yaraɗi kunisa hur thlǝn yarat ɗelwer engna ndatwa mǝlla humiɗunihi tǝ fǝlauchiwa.
5.10: Nga yarengnǝwa nofchi kisshi'iya naka fǝlauchiwa, tǝ fa yah'ichǝwa, tǝ fa ɗathlanda nofchifǝwa, tǝ fa sǝt tor ɗǝhhachǝwa. Kǝthlǝm ma nakǝn kichu sokkǝn waat kǝ chunikissha hur kisshita.
5.11: Yarayi kunisi mǝ sokiɗuni tǝ chikawun la at fichiwa hwanmanda lǝ tǝrmbanda, ma la sǝkǝn fǝlawichita, ndu lǝ yah'icha, ndu lǝ mwanandǝ ɗǝhhacha, ndu lǝ erǝfata, ndu lǝ sat icha, ndu hara. Chika sǝm'ǝn mǝ sǝmiɗuni tǝ witǝ nofchiniyuwa.
5.12: Mǝ kǝmikǝ tǝ sakamiya fichile nguchika hur tǝrmbanda? Nga fichile naka hur tǝrmbandǝ natuni sakamiya kandǝwa?
5.13: Farǝ na sakamiya fichile nguchika hur tǝrmbanda: "Chamǝn ɓǝɓi nifa hurnuni."

6.1: Ma yunǝsa hurnuni naka thlangǝtmi tǝ shekkǝn, mǝ ɗiɗa muhhanharkǝna mbǝɗa fa ɓah fǝrkitwa, nga kweshkǝn kǝ mbǝɗa fa fǝrkitwowa?
6.2: Awi sǝnwuniwa fa fǝrkit na sakamiya kisshitǝwowa? Makunang na sakamiya kisshita, nguni mbǝla sakmi ichi top-topyawowa?
6.3: A sǝnwuniwa kǝmnang na sakamiya Mala'ika chiwowa? Kana cheta ichi natma soktǝsa kisshi'iya!
6.4: Ma witǝ muhhanhar chini engnunisiyu, mǝsǝk la ɗǝtuni tǝkǝna mbanitǝ fichile nguchika miya ǝna mbanitǝ fa tǝrmbanda?
6.5: Mbuki iniyu kǝthlǝm kǝ harangfat kuni. Sokkǝnyawa yunǝsa hurnuni ǝrtǝ nak ɗathlchin na tahsandǝ thlerǝ fa fǝrkitaɗǝwa?
6.6: Paɗ mǝsǝka hwanmanda la ɗǝtna muhhanhar hwanmankǝn a mbanitǝ fa ɓah fǝrkit?
6.7: Muhhanhar ndani ti la muhtuniyu kǝttǝhi mbǝɗengnuni. Nga kweshkǝn kǝrǝstuni kǝ nuni ɓomchǝwowa? Mǝsǝk nguchituni kǝrǝstǝ kǝ ɗathlang ficha kuni fa?
6.8: Kunang tǝ inchengnuni kuna ɗathlanda ndanifa kuna puppuk ndanihi, ta hwanmanchǝnuni la sanduni ichiniyu kanda.
6.9: Awi sǝnwuniwa fa ɓah fǝrkit ngunda mbǝs yimta kutǝrichita Farǝwowa? Mǝ lǝmi fichi kuniwa, kǝthlǝm fa sǝɓtaɗaɗisi ndu fa sǝt torɗǝhhacha, ndu fa sǝt fǝlauwichita, ndu hishchǝ fa che fechengnanda, ndu hishchi fa mundǝ tǝ hishcha,
6.10: ndu harcha, ndu fa yahta, ndu fa sat'icha, ndu fa erǝfata, ndu fa ɗathlanda nofchǝfa na mbǝs mbǝta hur kuturichita Farǝwa.
6.11: Nak funengnuni kichuyu. Anakǝn sapa fichǝ kuniɗi, tahsafichǝ kuni, chafichǝ kuni kish a hur thlǝm Lǝmwandǝ Yǝso Kǝrǝsti, paɗ tǝ mbǝɗa Shemeɗa Farengnǝm. Mwanamǝn Fara tǝ Fechengnuni
6.12: "Chikamǝ ngǝmifichǝsi", Paɗ nga chikamǝ na kǝsitisǝwa. "Chikamǝ ngǝmifichǝsi", Chika kichu ngi sokta mafata chikamǝwa.
6.13: "Ɗǝsǝmta kǝthlǝm hura, hur paɗ kǝthlǝm ɗǝsǝmta" Farǝ nan thlǝrtandǝ kandaɗǝ hwaa. Sufichǝ fata kǝthlǝm kǝ i fǝlawichitwa, kǝ naka i Lǝmwanda, Lǝmwandǝ paɗɗaa i fata.
6.14: Thla'ang Farǝ Lǝmwanda hur mǝmatcha tǝ alchit'en, paɗ chika kǝm nan thla'a'ndǝ kǝm.
6.15: Awi sǝnwuniwa fechengnuni njarǝ fata Kǝrǝsti tǝ indǝ'enwowa? Kemsǝ hachiya kǝ hari njarǝ fata Kǝrǝsti kǝ humayi kandǝ tǝ ɓǝɓimanda? Ngu tamtasǝtwa!
6.16: Awi sǝnwuniwa nifi humangfat tǝ ɓǝɓimanda sokkǝndǝ fat ǝrtǝ tǝ ndǝwowa? Kǝthlǝm nda i nat yarat laulawatkǝn: "Chapndǝyu naknda soktǝ kǝ fat ǝrta."
6.17: Le humang fat'enhi tǝ Lǝmwanda, sokkǝndǝ ǝrta hur shemeɗ tǝ ndi.
6.18: Rahamna fǝlawichithar! Tahhǝt ɓǝɓichitfechi nat la sǝt nifa nakna kisshitǝ fat'en, paɗ le sǝk ɓǝɓichitfat tǝ mbanda fǝlawichita sǝkǝn ɓǝɓichitfat kǝ fa fat'en.
6.19: Sǝnwuniwa fechengnuni kapat hura'a Fara le naktǝ Shemeɗ Chiɗchiɗ, naka a hanndǝkikechengnuni, le thlǝtuni ɓǝɗa Farǝ wowa? Nga nakuni tǝ alchit inchengnuniwa.
6.20: Hikkǝ fichǝ kuni 'yang'yang. Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn mwanamǝn Farǝ tǝ fechengnuni.

7.1: Nakǝnya kǝ ichi yaratuni ɗarkǝn, ndiichinsi hishnifǝ mǝ kahindǝ kanwa.
7.2: Kǝthlǝm rahhanda fǝlawichit har, chikawun hishnifǝ kǝnan tǝ nuhkǝnsi, paɗ chikawun nuhnifǝ kǝnan tǝ sǝmahsi.
7.3: Hishnifǝ kǝ fǝraǝn i kamkǝsa nuhkǝn i reta, nuhnifǝ paɗ kǝ fǝraǝn i kamkǝsa sǝmahha i reta.
7.4: Kǝthlǝm nuhnifǝ alchit'ensǝ kǝ fa fat'en ichitkǝnwa, sǝmah ndak. Kichu paɗ sǝmah alchit'ensǝ kǝ fa fat'en ichitkǝnwa, nuhkǝn ndak.
7.5: Mǝ njaɗuni ndaniwa, kǝnan tǝ ngǝmtengnuni hwaa, kǝ fari ɗǝftuni kǝthlǝm kǝna hur'inchengnuni hur hwanda kanuni ngǝr kǝmta, kǝthlǝm mǝ limi sheɗan kuni a ɗar ɓah kǝrǝstǝwa.
7.6: Mbuki iya i kamkǝsi yarandǝhi, nga waatwa.
7.7: Mamuwa nansǝta kǝna nofchǝ nat nda njang. Nakǝn chikawun hishnifa tǝ i fǝrandǝ Fara, leya tǝ witǝ i fǝrandǝn leyu paɗ tǝ witǝ ikǝn.
7.8: Kǝ mbǝɗa fichile kahuchikkan tǝ ndǝllat nishcha fichile mǝrtǝ hishchengnandǝyu, a kǝllaɗengna keekesi kǝ soknda kahundǝ kanwa nda i nati.
7.9: Ma ngunda mbǝla kǝs fechengnandǝ harwa, kǝ kahndǝ kan. Kweshkǝn kǝ kah nifǝ kan mǝni ita ɗi tǝ yahta.
7.10: Kǝ mbǝɗa fichile kahkǝ kan nja ndandakuniwa, nga njangwa Lǝmwanda, ndatwa: "Nuhnifǝ mǝ sakindǝhi tǝ sǝmahwa."
7.11: Ma ɓeɗa saktǝhi tǝndi, kǝ sokǝn kichuyu kǝnretsǝwa, manga kichuuwa kǝ tahsangndǝ thlerǝnandaɗi tǝ sǝmahha. Hishnifǝ paɗ mǝ sakiɗǝhi tǝ nuhkǝnwa.
7.12: Kǝ mbǝɗa tahchikǝn paɗ ndakiwa: "Nga Lǝmwandǝ mbukǝwa." Ma yunǝ hwanmandǝsi nat nuhkǝn kǝla ɓahfǝrkit, ngim nuhnifǝkǝn kǝ sokǝn tǝndi, mǝ cheriɗǝndǝwa.
7.13: Ma nuhnifǝsǝ nat sǝmah kǝ lǝ ɓahfǝrkit, ngim hisnifǝkǝn kǝ sokǝn tǝndi, mǝ cheriɗǝndǝwa.
7.14: Kǝthlǝm hishnifǝ lǝ ɓahfǝrkit, tahsafichǝ chiɗchiɗ tǝ mbǝɗa nuhkǝn, paɗ nuhnifǝ lǝ ɓahfǝrkit, tahsafichaɗi chiɗchiɗ tǝ mbǝɗa sǝmahha. Manga kichuwa, hwechengnuni naknda nat tǝ putafa, nda i natǝn nakǝnya, nakndǝ chiɗchiɗ.
7.15: Ma lǝ ɓahfǝrkittiyu yahkǝsa saktǝhi tǝ shetkǝn kǝnan kichu. A witǝ mbǝnniyu, hwanmandǝ kǝ nuhnifǝ ndu kǝ hishnifǝ nga waatsa sokkǝnwa. Kǝthlǝm Farǝ akǝn kǝm kǝ sok yuyurchit tǝ ndani.
7.16: Sokǝn nuhnifa, shinnǝ ndu mbahya sokǝn na hǝrkandǝ sǝmatuuwa? Sokǝn hishnifa, shinnǝ ndu mbahya sokǝn na hǝrkandǝ nuhwuwa? Witǝ Soki Yahtǝ Lǝmwandǝsǝ Kǝ Sokficha
7.17: Chika witǝmǝ natma hurkǝn, chikawun kǝ sokka mbǝɗi ɗǝftǝ Lǝmwandǝndǝsi a nat'enhi, kǝ i at Farǝ ndi. Ndǝkǝn naka mbutengna kǝ mbǝɗa fafǝrkit nat.
7.18: Wun taɓkǝ kǝ heshang ficha kǝ fari at fichǝndi? Mǝ sokiɗǝ kǝ lǝ ɓah heshiwa. Le heshuchika kǝ fari at fichǝndi, mǝ kiɗǝ heshiwa.
7.19: Hesha tǝ ɓah hesha nga ǝn nakndǝwa, kuwur kussa Farǝ ndak naka ka'ǝna.
7.20: Chikawun kǝ nan nda i natǝn kǝ fari at Fara ɗi.
7.21: Naku kǝ mafat kana ficha atsǝwa? Mǝ kǝmu ǝnwa. Manu ɓǝs alchit iɗeku, sǝku tor tǝ mbayiniyu.
7.22: Chikawun naka mafata kana Lǝmwanda atndi nakǝn kǝ nifi ɓǝske alchit iɗi'en a Lǝmwanda. Kichu paɗ le nguchika mafata kana ficha atndi nakǝn kǝ mafata Kǝrǝsti.
7.23: Hikkǝ fichǝ kuni 'yang'yang mǝ niɗuni mafecha nofchǝwa.
7.24: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn hwanmancha, chika hur witǝ sokmǝ atfichǝ chikawuni, kǝ sokǝn kichu nda i at Farǝndi, kǝnan tǝ Farǝ'en. Fichǝle Kahuchikkan tǝ Fichile Mǝrtǝ Hishchengnanda
7.25: Kǝ ɗar nishchi tamuchika kan, fǝriwu Lǝmwandǝ alchit shuɗe kǝ ɗarkǝnwa, paɗ naki fǝr i naka yarengna kǝ ɗar ndatwa njangti ngǝmitǝ fichǝsi a ɗar shisshetfata Lǝmwanda.
7.26: Ma yarengna, kǝthlǝm ɓahhi natma hurkǝn nakǝnya, keekesi kǝ soknifǝ ichitkǝn nda i natǝn.
7.27: A kehnikanwa? Mǝ kǝnǝ saktǝhiwa. Ma kahunikanwa, mǝ kǝnǝ nuhnifǝwa.
7.28: Ma kehnikan sunǝ ɓǝɓichitfatwa, ma keh nuhhwekan sutǝ ɓǝɓichitfatwa. Fichile kahkǝkan nanda yimta ɓahtǝ somsomǝn a naɗihiya, njang tǝ yahhisǝ kǝnan paapa'a mbǝɗengnuni.
7.29: I yarti hwanmancha, ndatwa hanmunchikǝn nguɗeh. Thlata nakǝnya kǝ mban fichile nat nishchengnandǝsi kǝ sokndǝ nda ngusengnandǝwa,
7.30: Fa tita nda nga tǝnnda titwa, fichile naka mbǝnfata nda nga kanda mbǝnfatwa, fichile hikkǝ'ǝna kǝ nandǝ nda nga ichengnandǝ kǝ kǝsndǝharwa.
7.31: Fichile naka sǝt tor tǝ ǝnat kisshita mǝ ɗǝfindǝ fatsǝwa. Kǝthlǝm kisshikǝn a naɗi nakǝnya, tǝ naka mbǝrtǝhi.
7.32: Yahkisi kǝnuni cha'a hur thlahur i'nda. Nifi kahhuchikkan nak yarǝ'ena ɗar torcha Lǝmwanda, i natna sǝta kǝ tǝraǝn hura Lǝmwandǝhi.
7.33: Le kahkǝkan nak yarǝ'ena nata ɗar ǝnat kisshita, mbayi natna sǝt kǝ tǝraǝn hura nuhkǝnhi.
7.34: Paɗ shek hur'indǝ'enhi. Nuhnifǝ kahhuchikkan ndu nuhhweya nak yarǝ'ena ɗar torcha Lǝmwanda, la ɗǝfkǝn indǝ'en kaǝn kǝ mbǝɗa Lǝmwanda a hur fat tǝ shemeɗa. Nuhnifi kahkǝkan yarǝ'ena ɗar ǝnat kisshita, mbayi natna sǝt kǝ tǝraǝn hura sǝmahhi.
7.35: Naki mbu ichiya kǝthlǝm kǝ kǝsangka kunisi, ngauwa kǝ ɓweshikuniwa, kǝthlǝm soktengnuni kǝnaka mbandǝ ndiichin mǝ saki yarengnunihi hur mwanandǝ Lǝmwandǝwa.
