7.36: Ma yaraa yunǝhiwa i natna sǝt kǝ ɗar nuhhwani ngwantǝn nga keekewa, a nakǝn hurrecha nuhhwankǝna mbǝrtǝhi paɗ a fat'en kemsǝ kǝ kahhǝnkan, kǝ sǝn kichu nda i yahtǝn. Nga tǝna sǝt ɓǝɓichitfatwa, kǝ kǝnangndǝ reta.
7.37: Nifi thlarkǝ kit kǝ ɗar yara hanndǝkiketǝ'en ndatwa ǝnatkǝn nga waatwa paɗ nan mbǝlla kǝs indǝ'enhar, paɗ tira hanndǝkiketǝ'enwa ngu kahhandǝ nuhhwaniyuwa, mǝlan ma shiɗtǝ i nak keeke.
7.38: Nifi kahhang nuhhwani ngwantǝn shiɗ keeke, paɗ nifi kahhauchik nuhhwani ngwantǝn shiɗtǝ i kamkǝsǝ kaǝn.
7.39: Nuhnifǝ nakna kǝnda kǝ mbǝɗa sǝmahha ma tana mweehi tǝ shishingta. Ma mir sǝmahha, cheɗa kissha sahta kǝ kahhǝn chikawun yahtǝn, sokkǝn waat kǝ na hishnifǝkǝna i Lǝmwanda.
7.40: A thlandǝ shuɗengnǝhi, nan nat tǝ mbǝnfat kaǝn manan soktǝ ichitkǝn nda i natǝn. Paɗ la sikǝnfǝ Shemeɗa Farengnǝsi.

8.1: Nakǝnya pathlǝ ɗǝsǝmi fǝrandǝ ficha ɗǝhhacha: "Shinǝmwa nattǝm sǝɗengnǝmsi." Sǝndǝ la ɓakǝn tǝ thla'inda, mbǝnfata la tinaǝn.
8.2: Ma tiryunǝwa shintǝ'ǝna, paaya sǝnu nda i kamkǝsi kǝ sǝnǝnwa.
8.3: Ma yuna mbǝnfat Fara, shin Farǝ ndi.
8.4: Pathlǝ sǝm ɗǝsǝmi fǝrandǝ ficha ɗǝhhacha: "A shinǝmwa ɗǝhhata nga ǝnnakǝnna kisshitǝwa paɗ Farǝsǝ somǝnwa ǝrta."
8.5: Chika sokkǝnwa funisǝ la atfichǝwa farǝcha a Afshi ndu kisshita (nda i nat, "farǝchǝsǝ" ka'ǝn "shinchǝsǝ" paɗ kaǝn),
8.6: Chika kichu a mbǝɗengnǝm Farǝ ǝrta, le naka Shinda, ichi natya ɓakna mbǝɗ'en, naɗengnǝmhi kǝthlǝm mǝlan. Lǝmwandǝsi ǝrta Yǝso Kǝrǝsti, tǝ mbǝɗ'en chet ichi kish natya, kǝmnang paɗ naɗengnǝmhi tǝ mbǝɗ'en.
8.7: Nga chikawun sǝnkǝ iyawa. Funǝ paaya sǝɗengnandǝhi tǝ tor ɗǝhhacha, la saǝn kandǝfǝwa ɗǝsǝmi la sǝmtǝnda nda i fǝrandǝficha ɗǝhhata. Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn nguchikndǝ kwaakwa'a hur hanndǝkiketa la tǝrkǝndǝwa shiɓndaɗaɗi.
8.8: Ɗǝsǝmtǝ ɗutǝkǝm nduk tǝ Farǝwa. Ma sǝmwumwa ngǝma tahtǝhiwa, ma shimǝm ngǝma chektǝwa.
8.9: Kǝ ɗǝfuni indǝsi, mbǝs thlǝt indengnuni mǝ sokiɗa ǝnat chit hansarǝhi mbǝɗa fichile nguchit alchiɗengnandǝsi.
8.10: Kǝthlǝm ma neɗ yunǝsa le nguchik kwaakwa'a hur fǝrkit, sokǝn tǝ sǝnka sa sǝm'ǝna kǝtǝn mwanandǝ ɗǝhhacha, fǝrauni alchit sǝm i tahsandǝ ficha ɗǝhhachǝwowa?
8.11: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn hwanmani nguchik kwaakwa'a na sǝndeku sokta mba hǝmtǝ'enhi, le mǝrtǝ Kǝrǝsti ɗi kǝthlǝm mǝlan.
8.12: Ma shiɗnǝ ɓǝɓichitfat kǝ mbǝɗa hwanmanchiwa, tǝ mbǝnniyu paɗ ɗǝfau ndindita kandǝ kǝ ɗar ɓah kwaakwaa chiɗengnanda, tǝ sǝnǝ ɓǝɓichitfat kǝ mbǝɗa Kǝrǝsti.
8.13: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn, ma sǝm'ǝn na ɗǝf hwanyaa kǝ yimka hur ɓǝɓichitfata, mwawi tamta chi thlu paɗwa, kǝthlǝm mǝ ɗǝffiɗǝ ndǝ kǝ hǝmǝnhiwa.

9.1: Njang mbǝs thlǝt indengnǝsǝwowa? Njang nga lǝthlǝndǝ nakiwowa? Anuwi Yǝso Lǝmwaɗengnǝmwowa? Kunang nga kǝni torengnǝ nakuni a hur Lǝmwandǝwowa?
9.2: Chika sokkǝnwa nga lǝthlǝndǝ naki mbǝɗa funiwa, kittǝkǝn mbǝɗengnuni njang lǝthlǝnda, kǝthlǝm kunang naka sheta tǝ tor lǝthlǝɗengna a hur Lǝmwanda.
9.3: Tǝ ndǝkǝn la chandǝ faɗengna kish a mbǝɗa fa tauwasǝnji.
9.4: Alchiɗengnanisǝ kǝ fǝranguni sǝm'ǝna kani tǝ satwowa?
9.5: Nga alchiɗengnanisǝ kǝ tǝrani kan kǝ wi'yani tǝ nishchengnani fafǝrkit nda i la sǝt tahhǝt fathlǝncha, tǝ hwanmancha Lǝmwanda tǝ Kefas yuwowa?
9.6: Nga njang tǝ Barnabas ndak sokkǝ waat kǝ sani tor sǝma'ǝn inchengnani kǝ nanihiwa?
9.7: Wun la sǝk tor thlǝrhwata kana sǝma'ǝn indǝ'en? Wun na pat affǝt inabi kǝ cherka chi hwanchikǝn? Wun na hǝrǝm chaɓa kǝ cherka sat yahkǝn?
9.8: Naki mbu ichiya ɗar yara nifǝwa? Ndu kustǝkǝn kichuwowa?
9.9: Yarang fichǝhi a hur kussa Musa ndatwa: "Mǝ panǝ hwan sokroka latami mamǝla sǝt tora hurhitǝwa." Lat ndak la hǝrǝmtǝ Farǝwa?
9.10: Nga shuwunkǝn kǝthlǝm kǝmnangwowa? Aa kǝthlǝm kǝmnang yarandǝ ficha. Kǝthlǝm lǝ huɗata, nakna huɗat tǝ ɗǝffatsǝ nan mbǝs ǝna, le naka ɗǝktǝ paɗ nakna ɗǝktǝ tǝ yarǝ mbǝs'ǝna hur ɗǝsǝmi hitǝkǝn.
9.11: Ma hifani hanwitǝ shemeɗa Fara hur hanɗǝkikecheng'nuni, kapat ǝnwa ma mbishani icha mbǝɗengnuni?
9.12: Mana funa mbǝs mba sǝt kichu mbǝɗengnuni, sherawani kandǝ tǝ mba sǝt kichuwowa? Chika kichu suwani tor tǝ mbayiniyuwa, kǝriskani tǝ chikamǝ kǝthlǝm mǝ ɓiɗani tǝ i na njat tor laulawata Kǝrǝstiwa.
9.13: Sǝnwuniwa fichile la sǝk tora kapat hura'a Fara, la mbǝskǝndǝ ɗǝsǝmtengnanda kapat hura'a Farǝkǝnwowa? Fa sǝt tora bagadi la mbǝskǝndǝ ɗǝsǝmta hur ichi la fǝrtǝ fichi i fǝr pofǝnwowa?
9.14: Kichuyu paɗ mbutǝ Lǝmwanda ndatwa, fichile naka ɓassǝ laulawata kǝ thlǝndǝ ǝnat nathi engnandǝ tǝ mbǝɗa laulawatkǝn.
9.15: Njang tamwi sah ǝn kuni hur ichiniyuwa, paɗ nga naki yarat'iya tǝ ɗǝffatsǝwa kǝ sikǝ fichǝ kichuwa. Kweshkǝn kǝ mǝri, mǝni yuna nji wilwirtengna tǝ ndǝkǝn.
9.16: Chika kichu ma ɓesshi laulawatkǝn, ngi wilwirtǝwa, kǝthlǝm ɗǝfkǝ fichǝnji waat kǝ ɓassi. Ai engna ma ɓasswi laulawatkǝnwa.
9.17: Mamuwa la ɓasski a ɗar yahtengna mala kwanikǝ ficha. Sokkǝnwa nga ɗar yahtengnǝwa, tǝni sǝt i malitǝ fichǝhi.
9.18: Mǝnaka kǝnikǝn engna? Kǝnikǝn engna ndǝkǝn naka ɓasse laulawatkǝn, kǝ ɓassǝ pofǝn. Sǝwitor tǝ cheta mbǝɗengnǝ nat a hur ɓassǝkǝnwa.
9.19: Chikama sokkǝn naki kweɗeleng nga hara chikawunwa, saɗi faɗengna mafata nofchǝnat, kǝthlǝm kǝ mbǝsi nofchǝ oi.
9.20: Kǝ mbǝɗa Yahudawecha, naki nda lǝ Yahudawata, kǝthlǝm kǝ mbǝla'i kahhandǝ hur'incha Yahudawecha. Kǝ mbǝɗa fichile nat kussa alchiɗengnanda, naki nda le naka kakǝn paɗ (chikama sokkǝn njang tǝ indengna nga naki ka kustǝkǝnwa) kǝthlǝm kǝ kahhayi hur'incha fichile naka ka kus tǝkǝn.
9.21: Fichile nguchika ka kus tǝkǝn sokki nda kandang (chika sokkǝn nga naki kisshitǝ kussa Farǝwa naki ka kussa Kǝrǝsti) kǝthlǝm kǝ kahhayi hur'inda fichile nguchika ka kus.
9.22: Kǝ mbǝɗa fichile nguchit alchitsi njang ma naki alchitsǝwa, kǝthlǝm kǝ kahhayi hur'incha fichile nguchit alchiɗengnandǝsi. Sokki kǝ ichinat kǝ mbǝɗa nofchǝ nat kǝthlǝm chika tǝ kǝni kǝ hǝrkayi funa.
9.23: Sǝki ichini natyu kǝthlǝm kusheng shundǝ mbinchin, kǝthlǝm kǝ mbǝsi ǝnhar hur mbǝs'ichihar.
9.24: Sǝnwuniwa hur fa teri rahta, nat fa teri rahkǝn la kweekǝndǝhi kǝ pǝɗangnda ndanihi, ǝrtǝ ndak la thlǝk kǝnikǝnwowa? Yimamma rahkǝn kǝthlǝm kǝ mbǝsuni kǝnikǝn.
9.25: Nat fa yimta terriyiniyu, la fǝrangndǝ ɓahta fechengnandǝ chika tǝteni. La sǝkndǝ kichu kǝthlǝm kǝ mbǝsndǝ kǝnikǝn lena sǝɓtaɗi, kǝmnang paɗ la sǝkǝm inǝm kǝ mbǝsǝm kǝnikǝn le nguchika sǝɓtaɗǝ kǝpwaree.
9.26: A rahwi pofǝn nda nga mbǝt ɗǝtsǝwowa, a tokwi fat nda lela tokkǝ rǝnnawa.
9.27: Tǝ fǝrayi ɓahta faɗengna kǝ sayi mafata, kǝthlǝm ɗiffitǝ ɓassanda nofchǝsi njang tǝ indengna mǝ nji fichǝ mbǝs kǝnikǝnwa.

10.1: Yahkǝsi kǝ sǝnuni, hwanmancha, ndatwa kakechinǝm nat wikǝnda ka husomba'a, paɗ natndǝ ɗǝkndǝ tǝ hur hawurta.
10.2: A ka husombi'iniyu tǝ hur hawurkǝn sandǝ fichǝ baptisma kandǝ uf kǝ kuwur Musa.
10.4: Natnda sakndǝ ama shemeɗa, kǝthlǝm sheɗndǝ ama a ngwiya shemeɗa le wiikǝ tǝ kanda. Ngwikǝn Kǝrǝsti nakǝn.
10.5: Chika tǝ kichu, sǝku Farǝ mbǝnfat tǝ funǝ oi a hurnandǝwa, tǝkang fichǝ kandǝhi a loktara.
10.6: Sǝk ichininatyu kǝ naka sakchikǝna mbǝɗengnǝm, kǝthlǝm mǝɗi hanndǝkikechengnǝma ɗar ɓǝɓi ichǝ nda i sǝtndǝwa.
10.7: Mǝ sokiɗuni kǝ fa sǝt tor ɗǝhhachǝ nda i sǝt funengnandǝwa, nda i natna hur yarat laulawatkǝn ndatwa: "Sokkǝ nofchikǝnhi kǝ sǝmndǝ kǝ sanda, thlaakǝnda naknda rǝɓta a hur sǝɓtaɗǝ i fǝlawichita."
10.8: Mǝ yimindǝma fǝlawichit nda i sǝt funengnandǝwa, ɓaka sǝt nifǝ aru kumchitkum chap tǝ aru kumchit mǝkkan (23,000) mǝrka farǝ ǝrta.
10.9: Ngǝma kikeɗandǝ Lǝmwandǝwa nda i sǝt funengnandǝwa, ɓak hwithlincha tǝkandǝ kandahi.
10.10: Mǝ hurmiɗǝm nda i sǝt funengnandǝwa, Mala'ika tǝ ɓǝlta tǝkaǝn kandahi.
10.11: Kǝskǝ ichini kandǝyu kǝ naka sakǝtkǝn, yarang fichǝ kandǝhi kǝthlǝm kǝ sǝka ǝnat kah thlǝmaɗengnǝm, kǝmnang ti ɓat ndukwat kisshikǝna mbǝskǝm.
10.12: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn chikawun yarkǝwa nakǝn kit, kǝ mbǝrǝnsi mǝ hǝmiɗǝhiwa.
10.13: Kiketǝsi tamka mbǝskuni le mbǝsuchitǝn nifǝwa. Farǝ lǝ kachita, ngu tamta ngǝmtǝ kǝ kikeɗang fichǝ kuni tǝ i na sheranda allengnuniwa. Ma kikeɗa fichǝ kuni nan mbǝssa mba chetakissha kuni, kǝthlǝm kǝ mbǝla'uni kǝrǝskǝn.
10.14: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn shikechina, rahamna tor ɗǝhhachihar.
10.15: Shuwunki tǝ kuni kunang fa hur'incha, kǝ yarangunihi kunang tǝ iɗengnuni i mbuti.
10.16: Kop i mbǝs'inhar le la sǝtǝm usoko kǝ ɗarkǝn, nga ndǝkǝn la ɗǝfkǝkǝm kǝnǝm ǝrta a hur fwara Kǝrǝstiwowa? Njohmi la chichaɗǝmhi nga ndǝkǝn la ɗǝfkǝkǝm kǝnǝm ǝrta a hur fwara Kǝrǝstiwowa?
10.17: Kǝthlǝm njohmiya ǝrta, kǝmnang ti nak terchin fat ǝrta, kǝthlǝm nattǝm njohmǝ ǝrtǝ la chiitǝm.
10.18: Kǝlamǝn Isra'ilawecha: Fichile la sǝmka hur i fǝrtǝ ficha, nga la humndǝhi tǝ ndani hur sǝm ichi fǝrandǝ ficha Fara a bagadi tǝ fǝr'ichǝwowa?
10.19: Mǝ nati yarǝ hachiyu? Ɗǝsǝmi fǝrandǝ ficha ɗǝhhacha naka ǝnwa, ndu ɗǝhhakǝn naka ǝna?
10.20: Auwa, yarengnaa i la fǝrtǝ fa sǝt tor ɗǝhhacha la fǝrangnda lǝwurcha nga Farǝwa. Yahwisǝ kǝ la nuni humtǝhi tǝ lǝwurchǝwa.
10.21: Nguni sat tǝ kop a Lǝmwandǝ kǝ suni paɗ tǝ i lǝwurchǝwa. Nguni sǝm'ǝna a mbǝt sǝmɗǝsǝmta Lǝmwanda kǝ sǝmuni paɗ a i lǝwurchǝwa.
10.22: Nǝma ɗǝf Lǝmwandǝ kǝ sǝrǝhtǝwa? Sheraɗǝm tǝ alchitwa? Su Chikamǝ Kǝthlǝm Kǝ Mwanangfichǝ Fara
10.23: "Nat icha ngǝmaficha kǝmsi", Nga nat ichǝ na kǝsanda kǝmsǝwa. "Nat icha ngǝmaficha kǝmsi." Nga nat ichǝ la tinangwa.
10.24: Mǝ si nifǝ ǝn ndiichin kǝ ɗar indǝ'en ɗengwa, kǝsǝn kǝ ɗar'inda funǝ paɗ.
10.25: Chi'u chikawitǝ thlumi, la hi'yandǝ fichaɗa mbǝt hi'yandǝ thluwaɗi, nga tǝ sahmi mbǝɗi ɓat thlukǝnwa, kǝthlǝm mǝni yarengnuni nata mbǝɗi chet thlukǝn.
10.26: Kǝthlǝm: "Kisshitǝ i Lǝmwanda nat tǝ ichi naka hurkǝn."
10.27: Ma eɗ lǝ ɓah fǝrkit sa sǝm ɗǝsǝmta, ngǝmkufǝ ɗǝkuni, sǝmu i ɓandǝ ficha kuni nga tǝ sahmiwa, kǝthlǝm kǝna hur'indǝ ngwalngwal.
10.28: Ma ndu yunǝwa: "Ɗǝsǝmiya i ɗǝhhata", Mǝ sǝminǝwa, kǝthlǝm le mbukǝ paɗ kǝna hanndǝkiketǝ'en yuyur tǝ sokǝn.
10.29: Nga yarkiwa hur'iɗekuwa, ikǝn. Yunǝ nan ndatwa kǝthlǝmmǝ nat ficha nji i yahtǝ faɗengna, kǝthlǝm yuyurchit hanndǝkiketa yuna?
10.30: Ma saɗi Farǝ usoko, kani sǝm ɗǝsǝmkǝn, kǝthlǝmmǝ nat ficha ishnji kǝ ɗar i sandǝ Farǝ usokosi?
10.31: Ndu tǝ sǝmna ndu tǝ sana, ndu chika witǝmǝ natu sǝta, su nat kǝthlǝm mwanandǝ thlǝm Fara.
10.32: Mǝ siɗuni kǝ ǝnat chit hansarǝhiwa, ndu Yahudawecha, ndu fichile nguchika Yahudawecha ndu nofcha Fara.
10.33: Naki kweetǝhi kǝ tǝrayi hura nofchihi nat chika tǝteni. Nga tǝni kat i na mbǝnanda faɗengnǝfǝwa, paɗ i na mbǝnanda nofchǝfǝ oi, kǝthlǝm kǝ hǝrǝknda.

11.1: Sakamnji nda i nati sak Kǝrǝsti. I Kamkǝsi kǝ sa Ficha ka Mwanandǝ Fara
11.2: Nja hamkuni kǝthlǝm la kuɗukkuni nji chika hurmi, kishshuni ichi sakandǝ kuni har ɗichin nda i fǝrandi kuni.
11.3: Yah kisi kǝ sǝnuniwa le naka inn chikawun hishnifa Kǝrǝsti, le naka inn chikawun nuhnifa, hishnifa, le naka inn Kǝrǝsti Fara.
11.4: Chikawun hishnifǝ hwanka ndu tǝ mbu'ǝn icha Fara indǝ'ena supta, njirtǝ Kǝrǝsti le nak mwanchinna mbanitǝkǝn.
11.5: Chikawun nuhnifǝ hwanka, ndu tǝ mbu'ǝn icha Fara supwawutǝ i'ndǝwa, njirtǝ sǝmahha le nak mwanchinna mbanitǝkǝn, nakǝn keeke tǝ hǝsandǝ i'ndǝ'enaɗi.
11.6: Ma cher nuhnifǝ supwandǝ i'ndǝ'en, kǝ hǝsaǝn hwasǝ'enaɗi. Manakǝn harǝfatsi ma hǝsa nuhnifǝ hwasǝ'enaɗi ndu kǝ hǝsangkaɗǝ tukulmur, kǝ supwaǝn.
11.7: Kamusi hishnifǝ kǝ supwa'ǝn i'ndǝ'enwa, nakǝn kǝ mirshingta paɗ mwanda Fara. Nuhnifa paɗ mwanda hishnifa.
11.8: Kǝthlǝm a tǝrkakǝn hishnifa nga chekna fata nuhnifǝwa, nuhnifǝ cheka fata hishnifa.
11.9: Su fichǝ hishnifǝ kǝthlǝm nuhnifǝwa, nuhnifǝ sǝt fichǝ kǝthlǝm hishnifa.
11.10: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn sokkǝn waat nuhnifǝ kǝ kǝnǝn ɗankwali i'ndǝ'en, che sakǝtkǝna sǝmah nak mwanchin, paɗ kǝthlǝm mala'ikacha.
11.11: Chika tǝkichu, a hur Lǝmwanda nuhnifǝ nga somǝnhi tǝ hishnifǝwa, hishnifǝ paɗ nga somǝnhi tǝ nuhnifǝwa.
11.12: Nda i nat nuhnifǝ chekna fata hishnifa, kichu paɗ nuhnifǝ ngǝtkǝ hishnifa. Ichi nat paɗ ɓaknda mbǝɗa Fara.
11.13: Yaramǝnhi tǝ inchengnuni, keekesi nuhnifǝ kǝ hwanaǝn Farǝ tǝ indǝ'en chaawa?
11.14: Sakkawu nathi kǝmharwa ma mel hishnifǝ hwasǝ'en njang, nga ǝnat harǝfata mbǝɗ'enwowa?
11.15: Ma hwasa nuhnifǝ njang nga mwandǝ'enwa? Fǝrang fichǝ hwasǝ njang kichuyu kǝthlǝm kǝ ngǝlaǝn i'ndǝ'ensi.
11.16: Ma yunǝsǝ nat halǝ'indǝ'ensi kǝ ɗar iniyu, kanang sǝnwani ɗǝsǝchǝ somǝnwa, nakǝn kichu mbǝɗa tahhǝt nofcha Fara. Njirandǝ Sat Jibi Lǝmwandaɗi
11.17: Kǝ ichiya hamwi kuniwa, kǝthlǝm ma hwimunihi nga i katkǝnwa i sǝɓkǝn.
11.18: A tǝrkakǝn, sǝkkiwa ma hwimunihi humta fa tǝrmbanda, a lanak saktǝhisa hurnuni. Ɓeɗi fǝrkita ɗar shuwunkǝn nguɗeh kicha.
11.19: Sokkǝn waat kǝ mbǝs fichǝ saktǝhi hurnuni, kǝthlǝm kǝ sǝnfichǝ fa kachita hurnuni.
11.20: Ma hwimunihi nga jibi Lǝmwandǝ la sǝm tuniwa.
11.21: Kǝthlǝm a chikǝn, chikawun la ɗǝkna mban tǝ sǝm ɗǝsǝmtǝ'en pu'utǝ nifǝwa. Yunǝ tǝ mita fa, yunǝ ngeli har tǝraɗa.
11.22: Nga hurechengnunisǝ kǝ sǝmuni kǝ suni hurkǝnwowa? Tǝ njiruni fa tǝrmbanda Fara, paɗ kǝnuni ɓahhandǝ fichile nguchit ichengnandǝsi? Mǝnati mbwa'anda kuni? Kǝ hamikuni kǝ iniyuwa? Auwa ngi hamkuniwa.
11.23: I fǝrandi kuniya thlǝki mbǝɗa Lǝmwanda ndatwa: Lǝmwandǝ Yǝso, a fiɗiki fǝrtǝ fichǝndi, tǝrkǝn njohma,
11.24: ɗifitǝ sǝt usoko'en, chichaanhi ndakǝnwa: "Faɗengnǝniya, fǝrtǝ fichǝ kǝthlǝm kunang. La sam kichu kǝthlǝm kuɗuktǝ tǝnji."
11.25: Mbandǝ ǝrtǝ paɗ, ɗifitǝ jibi tǝkǝn tǝrkǝn kop, ndakǝnwa: "Koptiya i yuwa ɗǝf shundǝhi a hur fwarengna. Sam kichu nat kǝ farǝ natuni sata kǝthlǝm kuɗuktǝ tǝnji."
11.26: Chika kwat natuni chi njohmiya, paɗ natuni sata a koptiya, nuni mbu mǝrtaɗa Lǝmwanda kǝ fari natna ɓata.
11.27: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn, nat le chiikǝ njohmiya, sheɗɗa hur kop ti Lǝmwandǝya nga hur chiɗchiɗchitwa, shiɗtǝ ɓǝɓichitfat kǝ fata tǝ fwara Lǝmwanda.
11.28: Chikawun kǝ kikeɗaǝn fat'en, kana chi njohhǝmkǝn paɗ kana sata koptǝkǝn.
11.29: Kǝthlǝm chikawun chiika a sheɗ paɗ ngatǝ mwanandǝ fatkǝna Lǝmwandǝwa, paɗ saɗǝ sakmiya fat'ensi, tǝ mbǝɗa chi'ini tǝ saɗini'enyu.
11.30: Ndǝkǝn sǝka nofchǝ oi a hurnuni alchiɗengnandǝsǝwa, funǝ haachinnda, paɗ terchina hurnuni a mirnda.
11.31: Ma yaraɗǝm inchengnǝmhi poo, ngu ficha sakamiya kǝmwa.
11.32: Ma Lǝmwandǝ sakang miyakǝm, na ficha eltandǝkǝm kǝthlǝm mǝ thlandǝ kita kǝmsǝ tǝ kisshitǝwa.
11.33: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn hwanmanchina, ma hwimunihi kǝthlǝm sǝm'ǝna, kǝ pu'uni ndani.
11.34: Ma yunǝsǝ tǝ mitafa, kǝ sǝmǝn'ǝna huri, kǝthlǝm humtengnuni mǝ ɓandǝ thlet shunda kuniwa. Kǝ ɗar tahhǝt icha, ni mbwa'a mbachǝkǝna kuni ma ɓeɗi.

12.1: Nakǝnya paɗ hwanmancha, pathlǝ fǝr shemeɗ somsomǝn, yahwisǝ kǝnuni tǝ ɓahsǝndǝwa.
12.2: Shinuniwa fari natuni nga fa tǝrmbandǝwa, limfichǝ kuni paɗ shekɗang fichǝ kuni kǝ fa kuwur ɗǝhhachi nguchit shishingchengnandǝsi.
12.3: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn yahkǝsi kǝ sǝnuniwa nifǝsǝ na shunda hur Shemeɗa Fara na ndatwa: "Yǝso nga'ǝn nakǝnwa" paɗ nifǝsǝ na ndatwa: "Yǝso Lǝmwandǝ nakǝn." Manga nakna hur Shemeɗ Chiɗchiɗ wa.
12.4: Nakǝnya fǝrtǝsǝ somǝn somǝn, Shemeɗ ǝrtǝ la fǝrkǝ kanda.
12.5: Mbachǝsi somǝn somǝn i sǝt torcha, chika kichu Lǝmwandǝ ǝrta.
12.6: Torchǝsi somǝn somǝn, chika kichu kǝmka Farǝ ǝrtǝ la fǝrkǝ tori nat chikawuna sǝta.
12.7: Chikawuni fǝra Farǝ mba ɓata Shemeɗa kǝthlǝm kǝ kǝsangka chikawunsi.
12.8: Yuna fǝrang fichǝ Shemeɗ mbǝr shunda, tǝpaɗ yuna Shemeɗ shuwun sǝn'ǝna, natyu tǝ mbǝɗa Shemeɗ ǝrta.
12.9: Yuna i fǝrkit tǝ mbǝɗa Shemeɗ ǝrta, yuna i kǝnandǝ nofcha ɗi tǝ mbǝɗa Shemeɗini ǝrtǝyu.
12.10: Yuna fǝrangndǝ alchit sǝt ǝnat pǝɗandǝ nifǝfa, yunǝ i mbu icha Fara le na sǝt kǝmban, yuna i mbǝla sakandǝ shemeɗchǝhi, yuna i sǝn hanshuwunchǝ somǝn somǝn, yunǝ paɗ mbǝla sǝn i nat hanshuwunchi somsomǝnna mbuta.
12.11: Ichini natyu tora Shemeɗ ǝrtǝ la sǝk kanda, le la sakangnga chikawun nda i yahtǝn. Fat Ərta Njarǝchi Somsomǝn
12.12: Nda i nat fat ǝrta njarǝchi'en terchin, chikama sokkǝn njarǝchi'en terchin, nakndǝ kǝ fat ǝrta, nak Kǝrǝsti kichuyu.
12.13: Sangfichi baptisma kǝm nattǝm tǝ Shemeɗ ǝrta kǝ hur fat ǝrta, ndu Yahudawecha, punofcha, ndu mafecha, ndu fichile thlǝk inchengnandaɗi, nattǝm ɗǝfkǝ fichǝkǝm kǝsǝma hur Shemeɗ ǝrta.
12.14: Fatkǝn nga tahsang fichǝ tǝ njarǝ ǝrtǝwa, paɗ njarǝchǝkǝn terchin.
12.15: Mana sara ndatwa: "Njang nga har nakiwa, makichu nga naki fa fatwa." Mbutǝ kichu ngu ɗǝfndǝ kǝ sakndǝhi tǝ njarǝchikǝnna fatkǝnwa.
12.16: Ma na thlǝmata ndatwa: "Kǝthlǝm njang nga hwanitǝwa, makichu nga naki fa fatwa." Mbutǝ kichu ngu ɗǝfndǝ kǝ sakndǝhi tǝ njarǝchikǝnna fatkǝnwa.
12.17: Ma fatkǝn nat kǝ hwanita, nakficha la sǝkmbǝt tǝ mi? Ma fatkǝn nat kǝ thlǝmata, nakficha la sa mbǝt tǝ mi?
12.18: Kittǝkǝn Farǝ tahsang njarǝcha hur fata, chikayeni nda i yahtǝn kǝ nandǝsi.
12.19: Ma nak fatkǝn nat kǝ njarǝchǝ ǝrta, nak fatkǝna natwa kǝni?
12.20: Nda i natǝn, njarǝchǝ terchin chika kichu fat ǝrta.
12.21: Hwanitǝ ngu ndanda harwa, "Kǝmiwu'ǝntǝsǝwa." Ndu inda kǝ ndangka harchǝwa, "Kǝmiwu'ǝntǝkuniwa."
12.22: A mbandǝ somǝn, njarǝchi fafat la kǝlandǝ fichǝwa nda nga kwaakwa'a ndǝwa, kandang naka kechikǝn,
12.23: Njarǝchi fafat la kǝlandǝ fichǝ nda nga ǝnnakndǝwa, kandang la mwanandani kaǝn. Njarǝchi kamuchiksi kǝ nafichiyu, la kǝlak fichasa kanda,
12.24: njarǝchi'engnǝm nak ndiichinyu, nga ma safichǝ ǝn kandǝwa. Humang Farǝ njarǝcha fata, nda i ngǝrandǝn njarǝchi farawuchit fichi mwanda, sokkǝn tǝ mwanda fa.
12.25: Sǝkǝn iniyu kǝthlǝm mǝni saktǝhisa hur fatwa, njarǝchikǝn kǝ la tǝrndǝwa nakndǝ nat keeke.
12.26: Ma njarǝsǝ ǝrtǝ naka ɓahta, nat ndǝ nanda nata hur ɓahta, ma njarǝsǝ ǝrtǝ fǝrandǝ fichǝ mwanda, nat njarǝchikǝn kǝ mbǝnndǝ fata.
12.27: Nakǝnya kunang naka fata Kǝrǝsti, chikawun ǝrta hurnuni nakǝn kǝ njarǝchi'en.
12.28: A kǝtǝn mwanandǝ Fara hertǝ nofchǝhar, saǝn funa tǝrkakǝn kǝ Fathlǝncha, chapatǝkǝn Tapǝnecha, mǝkkatǝkǝn fa sakaɗaɗi, funǝ fa sǝt ǝnat pǝɗandǝ nifǝfa, funǝ fa kǝnandǝ nofchaɗi, funǝ fa kǝsanda nofchǝsi, funǝ fa kǝlandǝ tora nofcha paɗ funǝ fa shundǝ tǝ hanshuwunchǝ somsomǝn.
12.29: Nat fatǝrmbakǝn fathlǝnchǝwa? Nat fatǝrmbakǝn tapǝnechǝwa? Nat fatǝrmbakǝn fa sakandaɗaɗiwa? Nat fatǝrmbakǝn fa sǝt ǝnat pǝɗandǝ nofchǝfǝwa?
12.30: Nat fatǝrmbakǝn fa mbǝs fǝr kǝnandǝ nofchandǝwa? Nat fatǝrmbakǝn fa shundǝ tǝ hanshuwunchǝ somsomǝnwa? Nat fatǝrmbakǝn fa mbu sakǝt i shuwuntǝ fichǝ tǝ hanshuwunchǝ somsomǝnwa?
12.31: Paɗ kam fǝrtǝ somsomǝn tǝ rahta fichile nak ka mwanchin. Ni cheɗa mbanda kuni le sherkǝ nat tǝ ndata.

13.1: Chikama la mbǝrki shundǝ tǝ hanshuwuncha nofcha tǝ i Mala'ikacha, nakǝn mbǝnfatsa faɗengniwa, sokki nda pupwandǝra lǝ la tik kaǝn, manga kichuwa nda thlǝmra.
13.2: Chikama fǝrtengnǝsi i mbu'icha Fara paɗ la mbǝsayi ichi ɓuɓweeta tǝ sǝndǝ nat, ma fǝrkitchiɗengnǝsǝ kaǝn ni mbǝla mbasandǝ shohlachaɗi nga mbǝnfatsa faɗengniwa nga ǝn nakiwa.
13.3: Chikama ni fǝra ichi naksengnǝ nata fa ɓahcha kǝ fǝri faɗengna kǝ 'yangfichaɗi manga mbǝnfatsa faɗengniwa, ǝnsǝ nati mbǝstisǝwa.
13.4: Mbǝnfata kǝrǝstǝ'ensi, tǝ kafata, sǝrǝhtǝsa hur mbǝnfatwa, thla'andǝ'ensǝwa, mwa'indǝsǝwa.
13.5: Mbǝnfata thla'indǝsǝwa, yah'indǝsa hur mbǝnfatwa, sǝɓhursǝ paapawa, kǝs'ǝnsahurwa.
13.6: Mbǝnfata yahutǝ sǝɓfatwa, la mbǝnkǝnfat kǝ i sǝtficha ɗar kit.
13.7: Mbǝnfat la nakǝn tǝ kǝrǝstafa kǝɗing chika hur witǝmi, la nakǝn tǝ fǝrkit hur chikamǝ nat, la ɗǝfkǝn hanndǝkiketa ichinat, la kǝrǝskǝn tǝ ichinat.
13.8: Tamu mbǝnfata tuɓwatwa kǝparee. Mbu'ichi Farǝ na sǝt kǝmban nan thlǝrǝttaɗi, shundǝ tǝ hanshuwunchi somsomǝn nan shekata, sǝn'ǝna nan thlǝrǝttaɗi.
13.9: Sǝn'ǝnengnǝm nǝhɗuhiwa. Mbu'ichi chandǝ Fara kish ngǝ mbǝɗengnǝm nǝhɗuhiwa.
13.10: Ma ɓeɗ le nǝhhǝɗkǝhi, le nǝhɗuchikhi nan thlǝrǝttaɗi.
13.11: Thlahmbǝɗi nati kǝ hweya, la shuwunkǝ nda hweya, la yarki nda hweya, la mbuki ichi kamkǝsi nda hweya. Kǝ sǝkti nifa, malayi hwanchita.
13.12: Nakǝnya la nakǝm nda a hur shishing'ama, shummǝ shumma, farǝkǝn nakma nat hwanitǝ tǝ hwanita. Sǝn'ǝnengna nakǝnya nǝhɗuhiwa, a farǝkǝn na sǝɗengna nǝhhatǝhi nda i sǝntǝfichinji ndiichin.
13.13: Nakǝnya, ichi mǝkkanya shokndǝ kichu, fǝrkit, ɗǝf hanndǝkiketǝsi, tǝ mbǝnfata. Le nak mwanchina hurnanda mbǝnfata.

14.1: Kwe'yamhi kǝ kuni mbǝnfata, kǝ kuni fǝrta Shemeɗ Chiɗchiɗ, nda i yah mbu ichi naka yara Fara.
14.2: Kǝthlǝm le la shuwunkǝ tǝ hanshundǝ somǝn, nga tǝ nofchǝ natna shundǝwa tǝ Fara, nifǝsǝ la sǝnkǝ i natna mbutǝwa, la mbukǝn icha ɓuɓweeta mbǝɗa alchita Shemeɗa.
14.3: Le la mbukǝ ichi na yara Fara, na shunandǝ nofcha kǝ tinaǝn kanda, kǝ chekaǝn alchita kanda, kǝ saǝn sǝssi kanda.
14.4: Le naka shundǝ tǝ hanshundǝ somǝn naka tinaɗǝ fat'en, paɗ le naka mbu'ichi na yara Fara tinaɗǝ fatǝrmbanda.
14.5: Yahkisi natuni kǝ shununi tǝ hanshuwunchǝ somsomǝn, ɓureɗi yahtǝ kǝ mbu'uni ichi na yara Fara. Le la mbukǝ ichi na yara Fara, sheraɗa le la shuwunkǝ tǝ hanshuwunchǝ somsomǝn, ma mbwi yunǝ hanngalǝ i mbutǝn, kana tinandǝ fatǝrmbanda.
14.6: Nakǝnya hwanmancha, ma ɓeɗi mbǝskuni nja shundǝ tǝ hanshuwuncha, mǝ natna chekanda kuni ma mbwa'awi hangngalǝ shuwunkǝna kuniwa, ndu sǝnda, ndu ichi na yara Fara, ndu sakandaɗi?
14.7: Nakǝn kichu tǝ ichi nguchit shishingtǝsa fechengnanda, nda kǝla'a tǝ ǝnat pecha, ma chu ɓurechengnanda kish ɗiichinwa, wun na sǝn i nat ficha futa tǝ i nat ficha peta?
14.8: Ma pyawu fichǝ kutmetǝ keeke tǝ i nat ficha sǝndǝwa, wun na sǝhatǝfǝ kǝ mbata?
14.9: Nakǝn kichu mbǝɗengnuni, ma shununi tǝ hanshuni mbǝsauchit ficha, nakficha sǝn i mbutuniwa kǝni? Shuwunkuniyu mere pǝɗakna hur rǝnna'a.
14.10: Michisi somsomǝna hur kisshita, chika yen miya tǝ sakǝtkǝnsi.
14.11: Ma sǝnwi sakǝt mikǝnwa, naki nat kǝ roma mbǝɗa lǝ shuwunkǝn, lǝ shuwunkǝn paɗ nakǝn kǝ roma mbǝɗengna.
14.12: Nakǝn kichu mbǝɗengnuni, nakuni tǝ ɓwechit hura a ɗar mbǝs fǝr Shemeɗchi somsomǝn, fǝram alchiɗengnuni kǝ suni tor tǝ fǝr Shemeɗǝ na tinandǝ fatǝrmbanda.
14.13: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn, chikawun na shundǝ tǝ hanshundǝ somsomǝn kǝ hwanǝn kǝ fǝrang fichǝ mba sǝn i mbutǝn.
14.14: Kǝthlǝm ma hweni tǝ hanshundǝ somǝn, shemeɗengnǝ hwanka, paɗ yarengnǝ cheku tǝ ǝnwa.
14.15: Mǝnati sǝta? Ni hwandǝ tǝ shemeɗengna, ni hwandǝ tǝ yarengnǝ paɗ. Ni ǝn'imshi tǝ shemeɗengna, ni i'ndǝ tǝ yarengnǝ paɗ.
14.16: Manga kichuuwa, masa sǝt usoko tǝ shemeɗeku, tǝ kǝni le naka kuthlǝmata mbǝsauchik hanshuniniyu ndatwa: "Kǝ sokǝn kichu wa kǝnǝ." Kǝ ɗar usoko tǝ natu sǝta, ma sǝnutǝ i natu mbutǝwa?
14.17: Chika sokkǝnwa shiɗi usoko kaǝn, ǝnsǝ chekandǝna le nak nduk tǝsǝ le sǝnuchikwa.
14.18: Saɗi Farǝ usoko sheraɗi kuni tǝ shundǝ tǝ hanshuwunchǝ somsomǝn.
14.19: Chika kichu, a hur kǝtǝn hwanda kweshikǝn kǝ mbu'i ichi ɗurman tǝ hanndǝkiketengna kǝthlǝm kǝ sakayi funǝhar mǝni mbu ichi aru kumchitkum (10,000) tǝ hanshundǝ somsomǝn.
14.20: Hwanmancha, malamǝn yarǝ'ichǝ nda hwecha. Kǝnuni hwecha a hur ɓǝɓichitfata, kǝnuni pǝktecha hur yarengnuni.
14.21: A hur kus yara fichǝhiwa: "Tǝ mbǝɗa nofcha fa hanshuwunchǝ somsomǝn paɗ tǝ miya romcha nati shundǝ tǝ nofchiya, chika tǝkichu ngunda kithlǝmatwa, ndat Lǝmwanda."
14.22: Awi shundǝ tǝ hanshuwuncha nakndǝ kǝ sakǝtkǝn nga kǝ mbǝɗa fa fǝrkitwa kǝ mbǝɗa fa ɓahfǝrkit. Mbu yara Fara i fafǝrkit nga i fa ɓahfǝrkitwa.
14.23: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn ma hwim fatǝrmbandǝhi, kana chikawunna nata shundǝ tǝ hanshuwunchi somsomǝn, nakǝn funǝsǝ mbǝsaundǝ i nat ficha sǝtwa, ndu funǝ fa ɓahfǝrkit yimkǝsi, ngunda ndatwa nga nakuni hur'inchǝwa?
14.24: Ma chikawuna mbu yari Farǝ na sǝtta, kana lǝ ɓahfǝrkit ndu yunǝ roma yimtǝsi le sǝnuchik i nat ficha sǝtta, ɓak shunda chikawuna tǝka harfa a kakǝn tǝrtǝhi.
14.25: Naficha chaɗǝ ɓuɓwee ichi kissha hanɗǝkiketǝ'enyu, tǝ kichu hǝmkǝnhi mwanaǝn Fara ndakǝnwa: "Kittǝkǝn Fara hurnuni." Kǝ Mwanang Fichǝ Fara Mbayi Kamkǝsi
14.26: Mǝ natma mbuta hwanmancha? Ma hwimunihi yuna imshǝ'ensi i mwanandǝ Fara, yunǝ sakandaɗi, yunǝ mbu'icha, yunǝ shundǝ tǝ hanshundǝ somsomǝn, yuna fǝr hanngalǝ shunda. Sam ichǝnat kǝthlǝm tinandǝ fafǝrkit.
14.27: Mana yuna shundǝ tǝ hanshundǝ somsomǝn, mǝ sheraɗa nifǝ chap ndu mǝkkanwa, kǝ sǝndǝ ɗeɗerra paɗ yunǝ kǝ fǝrǝn hanngalǝ shuwunkǝn.
14.28: Manga yunǝsǝ na fǝr hanngalǝ shuwunkǝnwa, chikawun kǝ ngasǝn ɓa'a hur fatǝrmbakǝn, kǝ shunaǝn fat'en tǝ Fara.
14.29: Tapǝnechǝ chap ndu mǝkkan kǝ shuwunnda, tahchikǝn kǝ kikeɗangndǝ hǝɓakkǝ i mbutǝnda.
14.30: Ma yunǝsa mbǝnniyu ɗas ɓat sǝn'ichikǝna mbǝt'en, le naka shunda tǝrkakǝnyu kǝ ngasǝn ɓa.
14.31: Natuni nuni mbǝla mbu ichi na yara Fara ǝrtǝ ǝrta, kǝthlǝm kǝ sak chikawuni paɗ kǝ mbǝs chikawun alchita,
14.32: Tapǝnecha la mbǝllakǝndǝ hǝrǝm inchengnandǝ har.
14.33: Fara nga Farǝ la shekɗandǝ i'ndǝwa, i yuyurchita. Nakǝn kichu mbǝɗa fatǝrmbaɗǝ chiɗchiɗ,
14.34: kǝ ngas nishchǝ ɓa a hur kǝtǝn hwacha. Kǝthlǝm fǝrau fichǝ mbanda kandǝ kǝ shuwunndǝwa, kǝ kuwurndǝ ndak nda i mbutǝ kus.
14.35: Ma ǝnsǝ yahtǝnda sahta, kǝ sahhangndǝ hishchǝngnanda huri. Kǝthlǝm ǝnat harǝfata kǝ shuwun nuhnifa a hur kǝtǝn hwanda.
14.36: Tǝrkaakǝ shunda Fara ɓat tǝ mbǝɗengnuniwa, ndu kunang ndak sa'andǝn?
14.37: Mala yarkǝ yunǝwa tapǝnaa nakǝn, ndu le mbǝskǝ fǝrta shemeɗa, kǝ sǝnǝnwa ichi nati yaranda kunisǝya mbuta Lǝmwanda.
14.38: Ma cher yunǝ mbǝnnifiyu, mǝlan ma kǝ cherunindǝfa.
14.39: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn hwanmancha, namtǝ ɓweechit hur mbu ichi na yara Fara paɗ mǝ malaɗuni shundǝ tǝ hanshuwunchǝ somsomǝnwa.
14.40: Kǝ suni chikama a mbayi kamkǝsi, paɗ a hur tahhasǝkǝn.

15.1: Nakǝnya, hwanmancha, ni kuɗkanda kuni kwescha shuni ɓassandi kuniyu, le thlǝtuni thlartuni ɗarkǝn.
15.2: Tǝ mbǝɗa kwescha shuwunkǝn hǝrǝktuni, ma kisshuni shunihar mbwa'andǝ kuni kwaakwaa. Manga kichuuwa fǝrkit engnuni mere.
15.3: I kamkǝsi sǝnandi kunisi, ndǝkǝn naka i thlǝta, ndatwa: "Kǝrǝsti mǝrkǝnaɗi kǝthlǝm ɓǝɓichitfechengnǝm, nda i natna hur yarat laulawata Farǝ le mbutǝn,
15.4: ndatwa thloha ficha, farǝ mun mǝkkatǝkǝn thla'aficha, nda i natna hur yarat laulawatkǝn,
15.5: cheɗaɗǝ fat'ena Kefas kana fichile kumngǝrǝnsǝ chapyu.
15.6: Kana cheɗa fat'ena hwanmancha fichile sheranga aru ɗurman (500) a farǝ ǝrta, mweefunǝsi tǝ shisshingtafa, chikama sokkǝn funa mirnda.
15.7: Kana cheɗa fat'ena Yakubu, tǝ tahhǝt fathlǝnchǝkǝn nat.
15.8: A mweshitkǝn nat, cheɗikǝn fata, nda le ngǝttǝ ficha a fari kamuchiksǝ.
15.9: Kǝthlǝm njang naka mweshitmiya fathlǝncha, kamuchiksǝ kǝ afichǝwa lǝthlǝnda, kǝthlǝm fǝraɗi ɓahta fa tǝrmbanda Fara.
15.10: Tǝ mbǝɗa kafata Fara nati kǝ i natiya, kafat'en kǝ mbǝɗengna nga merewa. Shiɗi tor sheraɗi chikawuna hurnanda, chikama sokkǝn nga njangwa, kafaɗi Farǝ nak tǝ njiyu.
15.11: Ndu njang ndu kaɗang, ɓasskani kichuyu, tǝ kichuyu paɗ fǝrtuni kit. Thlata Mǝmatcha
15.12: Ma ficha ɓassǝ thlata Kǝrǝsti a hur mǝmatcha, mǝsǝk la ndat funengnuniwa thlata mǝmatchǝsǝwa?
15.13: Ma nga thlata mǝmatchǝsǝwa, sokkǝn chika Kǝrǝsti thla'awu fichǝwa.
15.14: Ma thlaawu fichǝ Kǝrǝstiwa, ɓassengnani pofǝn, fǝrkitchiɗengnuni pofǝn.
15.15: Ma tana nakǝn kichu, shiɗani fa lekta Fara, kǝthlǝm shiɗani sheta kǝ ɗar Farǝwa thla'aɗǝ Kǝrǝsti hur mǝmatcha, le thla'awuchitǝn, ma tǝ kitwa thla'awu fichǝ mǝmatchǝwa.
15.16: Kǝthlǝm ma thla'awu fichǝ mǝmatchǝwa, sokkǝn Kǝrǝsti ma thla'awu fichǝwa.
15.17: Ma sokkǝn thla'awu fichǝ Kǝrǝstiwa, fǝrkitchiɗengnuni pofǝn paɗ paaya mwakuni hur ɓǝɓichitfechengnuni.
15.18: Sokkǝn fichile fǝrkǝkitta hur Kǝrǝsti, kannda mǝrtaɗi thlǝrǝtkǝndaɗi.
15.19: Ma ɗǝfǝm hanɗǝkiketengnǝm kǝ Kǝrǝsti kǝthlǝm naɗihiya ɗeng, sheraɗima chikawun kǝ ǝnat haɗandǝ nifǝfa.
15.20: Kitchitkǝn thla'afichǝ Kǝrǝsti a hur mǝmatcha, mǝlan naka tǝrka thlata fichile mǝrkaɗi.
15.21: Nakǝn ɓak murtǝ tǝ mbǝɗa nifa ǝrta, tǝ mbǝɗa nifǝ ǝrta paɗ ɓat thlata mǝmatcha.
15.22: Nda i nat ficha mǝmattǝ kǝthlǝm Adamu, kichu paɗ kǝthlǝm Kǝrǝsti nat ficha thla'andǝ nofchǝ nat.
15.23: Nak thlakǝna nata ndera chikawun tǝ witǝ ikǝn, Kǝrǝsti na nata tǝrkakǝn, kana fichile naka ikǝn a fari natna ngǝrandǝ'in.
15.24: Kana mweshitmikǝna ɓata, fari natna fǝra kuturǝchita Fara Shinda, ɗifitǝ wuwwelandǝ fa kuturǝchitaɗi, nat tǝ kuturcha tǝ alchita.
15.25: Waat nan sok kuturǝchita, kana ɗǝf atikrechikǝn kǝ ka sarǝchi'en.
15.26: Hanmurtǝ naka mweshitmi atikretǝkǝn ti natna ɓǝllanda.
15.27: "Kǝthlǝm shiɗtǝ ichinat kǝ ka sarǝchi'en" Ma ɗeɗfichǝwa: "Shiɗtǝ ichinat kǝ ka sarǝchi'en", cheɗakissha ɗwaachitkǝnwa nga nat tǝ Farǝ tǝ indǝ'enwa, le ɗǝfkǝ chikamǝnat kǝ ka Kǝrǝsti.
15.28: Kǝ ngǝrandǝ Farǝ ichiniyu kǝ ka sarǝchi'en, hwankǝn paɗ sokkǝna ka Fara, kana Fara nata chikamǝ tǝ tǝmǝ nat.
15.29: Manga thlata mǝmatchǝsǝwa, mǝnat nofchiya sǝta, fichile sandǝ fichǝ baptisma kanda kǝthlǝm mǝmatcha? Ma thla'awu fichǝ mǝmatchǝwa kǝpware, kǝthlǝmmǝ la sandǝ fichǝ baptisma nofchǝ kǝthlǝm kandang?
15.30: Kǝthlǝmmǝ la natma ɗǝf inchengnǝma hur mboro chikayen hanthlǝkta?
15.31: Wembǝta nja miya hanmurta! Yarkiyaa hwanmancha, kittǝkǝn la thla'ayi'indǝ kǝthlǝm kunang hur Yǝso Kǝrǝsti Lǝmwaɗengnǝm.
15.32: Ma mbeɗi tǝ pǝktat hanthlucha a Afisa, kǝthlǝm yarengnǝ kǝ ɗar nifa, mǝ naka mbǝstengnǝhar? Mangu ficha thla'andǝ mǝmatchǝwa, "Nga kwesh kǝ sǝmǝm kǝ sǝmwa nakǝn ishki nǝma mǝrta?"
15.33: Mǝ lǝmi fichǝ kuniwa: "Soktǝ tǝ ɓǝɓinofcha la sǝɓaǝn ka hur'indaɗi."
15.34: Ɓamaɗi kǝ hur'inchengnuni ndiichin, kǝ malanguni sǝt ɓǝɓichitfata. Kǝthlǝm funengnuni sǝnundǝ Farǝwa. Mbuki iniyu kǝthlǝm kǝ harangfat kuni. Thlata Fata
15.35: Paɗ funǝ nanda sahtǝ ndatwa: "La thla'ang fichǝ mǝmatchǝwa kǝni? Tǝ witǝ fatmǝ natnda ɓata?"
15.36: Ɓoma! I hǝftu ngu tiftǝwa se ma mirwa.
15.37: Ma hifna, nga cheta i hǝftu tǝ fatkǝn na tiftǝwa, hanwitǝkǝn ndak. Ndu i alkama ndu hanwitǝ ǝn somǝn.
15.38: Farǝ la fǝrang fata hanwitǝkǝn nda i yahtǝn, paɗ chika witǝ hanwitǝmi la fǝraǝn fatkǝn'en.
15.39: Nga nat thlu ǝrtǝwa, nofchǝ tǝ witǝ thlǝwengnanda ǝrta, ɗǝhǝrǝmchǝ tǝ witǝ innanda, ɗishchǝ tǝ witǝ innanda, tinchǝ paɗ tǝ witǝ innanda.
15.40: Tinɗǝsi i afshi neɗsǝ paɗ i kisshita, mwanda i afshi somǝn, mwanda i kisshitǝ paɗ somǝn.
15.41: Mwanda hwatfarǝ somǝn, i ndǝraa somǝn, i hanndǝrechǝ somǝn; kǝthlǝm yunǝ hanndǝraa somǝn mwandǝ'en tǝ le.
15.42: Nakǝn kichu tǝ pathlǝ thlata mǝmatcha. I hǝftǝ ficha nan yirataɗi, i thla'andǝ ficha yirat'ensaɗǝwa.
15.43: La hǝfkǝ ficha tǝ ɓah fǝr mwanda, thla'ang ficha hur mwanda. La hǝfkǝ ficha hur ɓah alchita, thla'ang ficha hur alchita.
15.44: Hǝfkǝ ficha hur cheta fata, thla'ang ficha hur fata shemeɗa. Nakǝn fatsǝ i cheta fata, fatsǝ paɗ i shemeɗa.
15.45: Nakǝn kichu hur yaratkǝn, "Adamu tǝrka nifa sokka nifǝ tǝ shisshingtafa, ndukwalat Adamu shemeɗa lela fǝrkǝ shisshingta.
15.46: Nga le naka i shemeɗ naka tǝrkakǝnwa, i punifǝchita, kana i shemeɗa.
15.47: Tǝrka nifa chekna hur furta a hur kisshita, chapatǝ nifa ɓakna hur afshi
15.48: Nda ini chet nifa hur furtuyu, nakǝn kichuyu tǝ fichile naka i furta. Nda i'ni nat leni hur afshiyu, kichu paɗ natna nata kǝ fichile naka i hur afshi.
15.49: Nda i'ni tǝrtǝm mirshingta leni cheka hur furtuyu, kichu paɗ natma tǝr mirshingta le naka hur afshi.
15.50: I nati mbwa'anda kuni, hwanmancha, ngusǝtta faɗengnǝm nda thlu tǝ fwara kǝ yimnda kuturǝchita Farǝwa. Kichu paɗ lǝ yirata ngu mbǝs ǝna a ratǝ le nguchika yiratwa.
15.51: Kamthlǝmathi, ni mbwa'a ǝna kuni ɓuɓweeta. Ngǝma mǝrtǝ natǝmwa, natǝm naficha ɓuɓweɗandǝkǝmhi,
15.52: Nda nakǝnya a tǝɓǝrta hwanitǝhi, a mweshitmi kutmeta. Naficha pyandǝ kutmeta, thla'ang fichǝ mǝmatcha tǝ faɗi nguchika yirata, kana ficha ɓuɓweɗandǝ kǝmhi.
15.53: Kǝthlǝm faɗi na yirata waat kǝ ɓuɓweɗang fichǝhi tǝle nguchika yirata, lela mǝrkǝ paɗ kǝ ɓuɓweɗang fichǝ tǝle nguchika mǝrta.
15.54: Le na yirata ma ɓuɓweɗa fichǝhi tǝle nguchika yirata, le na mǝrta kǝ ɓuɓweɗang fichǝ tǝle nguchika mǝrta, a mbǝnniyu nat i yarandǝ fichǝhi hur shunda Farǝ nan nǝhhatǝhi ndatwa: "Mǝhɗafichǝ hanmurta, shera ficha al'en."
15.55: "Ai hanmurta, mbǝs'ǝnekuhara ayi? Ai hanmurta, alchiɗeku ayi?"
15.56: Alchita hanmurta ɓǝɓichitfata, kus naka alchita ɓǝɓichitfata.
15.57: Usoko Fara le fǝrang mbǝs'ǝna kǝmhar tǝ mbǝɗa Lǝmwaɗengnǝm Yǝso Kǝrǝsti.
15.58: Kǝthlǝm ndǝkǝn hwanmanchinǝ ti yahti, thlaramhi kit, mǝ fohha ǝnkuniɗiwa. Kǝnding kǝ fǝrunǝ fechengnuni nat kǝ tora Lǝmwanda, kǝthlǝm shinuniwa ɓahtengnunihi hur Lǝmwanda ngu nat pofǝnwa.

16.1: Nakǝnya pathlǝ kǝsaanda fichilesǝ nak chiɗchiɗ, sam nda i ndaɗi mbǝt ngǝlhwanichi a Galatiyayu.
16.2: A farǝ ladi, tǝrka chika yen mundǝ muɗ, chikawuni kǝla ɗǝfǝn hanndǝɓǝltǝhi kǝlar hur i la mbǝlaatǝn mbǝsta kǝ kǝsǝnhar, kǝthlǝm ma ɓeɗi mǝni hum'icha natsǝwa.
16.3: Ma she'i ni thlǝn fichile hartunihar, ngǝmtuni tǝkanda, tǝ yarat ɗelwer kǝ ɗǝndǝ tǝ fǝrpofǝn engnuni kǝ Urshelima.
16.4: Ma sokkǝnwa keekesi njang paɗ kǝ ɗi, natnda ɗǝfkǝɗǝnji. Tahhasǝfǝ i Wita
16.5: Ni ɓata mbǝɗengnuni ma ɗiɗi tǝ Makidoniya, kǝthlǝm yahkisi kǝ ɗi tǝ Makidoniya.
16.6: Mbah kǝ si tolla mbǝɗengnuni, mbahya ma kǝ mbǝrayi fektǝhi mbǝnniyu, kǝthlǝm kǝ kǝsikunisi nat mbǝɗi nati ɗǝta.
16.7: Nga yahtengna kǝnikuni nakǝnya kǝ mbǝrihi ndakwa, ɗǝfi hanndǝkiketǝsi kǝ muni tolla mbǝɗengnuni, ma ngǝma Lǝmwandǝ.
16.8: Paɗ ni thlarǝhi a Afisa kǝ farǝ Pentekos,
16.9: Kǝthlǝm i'ni fichǝ mikǝnndǝsǝ hauyang i tor nat tǝ mbǝs'ǝnsi chika sokkǝn atikrechisǝ kaǝn.
16.10: Ma ɓeɗ Timoti, kǝ ngǝmangnguni kǝ kalǝn fathi hurnuni, kǝthlǝm mǝlan ma na sǝt tora Lǝmwandǝ nda i nati sǝtta.
16.11: Mǝ cherinduni thlǝtndǝwa, kǝ kǝsangngunisa hur witǝ'en yuyur, kǝthlǝm kǝ ngǝraǝn i'na mbǝɗengna, nja kǝlata mba ɓat'en tǝ hwanmancha.
16.12: Nakǝnya pathlǝ hwanmanǝm Afolos paɗ, hwanaɗi tǝ alchitafa kǝ ɗǝka mbǝɗengnuni tǝ tahhǝt hwanmancha, nakǝn nga yahtǝ'en kǝ ɗǝn nakǝnyawa. Nan ɗǝta ma mbish tǝ mbanda. Mweshit Mi Shunda
16.13: Sokam tǝ tahhasǝfa, kǝ thlaruni kit tǝ alchita a hur fǝrkitengnuni, kǝnuni nda hishcha, kǝnuni tǝ alchitafa.
16.14: I natuni sǝtnat kǝ suni hur mbǝnfata.
16.15: Hwanmancha, shinuni nofchi hura'a Istifanus kanda tǝrkakǝ tǝrtǝhi a hur hachahai Akaya, paɗ firndǝ fechengnanda kǝ sangndǝ tora fichile nak chiɗchiɗ.
16.16: Nja hwanandǝ kuni kǝ fǝranguni mwanda witǝ nofchiniyu, tǝ fichile naka shikechǝ torchengnani tǝ ɓahtengnani.
16.17: Shiki mbǝndǝfǝ tǝ ɓata Istifanus, tǝ Fartunatus, tǝ Akaikus, le sokkǝ nda kunang ɓaka.
16.18: Tǝrandǝ hurengnǝhi nat tǝ innuni. Witǝ nofchiniyu kǝla fǝranguni mwanda kanda. Mweshitmi Ndat'icha
16.19: Fa tǝrmbayi Asiyayu kanda nda'icha kuni. Akila tǝ Biriskila tǝ fa tǝrmbayi la humkǝhi hure'engnandǝyu, kanda nda'icha kuni kaǝn hur thlǝm Lǝmwanda.
16.20: Hwanmanchi natta mbǝnniyu kanda nda'ǝna kuni. Kǝ ndangnguni icha ndani tǝ chiɗchiɗ tǝ kǝsndanihar.
16.21: Njang Bulus yarak ndat'ǝnaɗiya tǝ harengna.
16.22: Ma yunǝsǝ nguchit mbǝnfat'ensi kǝ mbǝɗa Lǝmwanda, kǝnaka sǝɓkǝn. Lǝ Lǝmwada a ɓu.
16.23: Kafata Lǝmwandǝ Yǝso kǝnan tǝ kuni.
16.24: Malan mbǝnfaɗengna kǝnan tǝ kuni natuni hur Yǝso Kǝrǝsti. Kǝsokǝn kichu.
